Friends,
Welcome back to another edition of the “Weekly Wyoming Wrap-Up.”

This week we have a couple of key points to share with you:

1) It was a really good week for Harriet and Team Hageman. Harriet completed her tour of all 23 counties since getting into the race. If you missed her – don’t worry, she’ll be back soon!
2) It was a very bad week to be Liz Cheney.
Check out the details below!

For Wyoming,

Team Hageman

**ICYMI - It’s been a very, very bad week for Liz Cheney

In one terrible week, Liz Cheney exposed as dishonest pawn of the Democrats
**
It’s difficult to imagine a worse week for an incumbent member of Congress than the one Wyoming Rep. Liz Cheney just caused for herself. In the space of one January 6th Committee hearing Monday, Cheney managed to destroy her own theory of the cause of the January 6th storming of the U.S. Capitol, permitted the presentation of obviously doctored evidence, and personally introduced a January 6th timeline of events that has been revealed to be a work of fiction.

Over the course of the week, Cheney’s dishonesty was exposed one piece at a time.

On top of it all, it was disclosed that her re-election campaign is being heavily bankrolled by major donors to The Lincoln Project, which has moved on from attacking President Donald Trump and has focused its attention on defeating Republicans from coast to coast.

It is now beyond doubt that Cheney is happy to be used as a tool of the Democrats simply because it furthers her quest to inflict damage on President Trump.

_**Cheney wrecked her own theory
**_
Cheney has spent months publicly building the case that President Trump orchestrated a conspiracy with the intent to cause mayhem at the U.S. Capitol, but she blew her own theory apart with her stunt of reading aloud texts to White House Chief of Staff Mark Meadows from [_**Fox News hosts and Donald Trump Jr**_](https://u23309276.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=cNjdLOXrNVuGJHRASJfKfkVYvArOvQTBKeGunrBDbVdeUPN0xWaAwNFY1BH8DwLLvPJURbJxnM-2FMhxV48TZ2XNf2dxbGg6zrXHXL4OAkKpY-3DXQ0-_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6vIjbTIraqgM2tgjsJniMenRq6XKqB0MXLu5PxprLh1Oj-2FSNVyZjuvYJKkDmvegjAUgeEOtrV0zM3-2F7h9FuMNaG70rN8vect2sG9r-2FG8XqIVDUHBvG-2BUqTgl9qbV0S7HlC-2FUZhDJbmY4uA9mGiUEWJGKV0-2FlDqmk4airnxtqs0476l61BSwEG3Rlh6uIrZqpk2Y-2B5-2FRGLG2npM9Vc1kES44ag9A5ubvuYZdYeeTnEBeSo4DeDjRP7X-2Bs523qYyP-2BpS16Gj-2Fe0-2FxwLTNKcvbd1GFNu37oeDhQ-2BPArVarZxWDInkOWu-2FpP01AASX6HriotQ3E8XFhb7pJclFPBnQTg4IKQS35AhDYdfe9pcElqxcVmtCTqj1YvC9PYI-2FkKSHPEo6CP0ZEi68OpxoOtxxux3JtUqjmM4dzKn85mNi5841e2IQJTbrL9SHjZ99Paov7a07LAbb5hLQyxl7ciXlIbuWTkdGDLNtxH2NfRYHAmx3OjwBKFsvyKuEcqH-2FZIQ04YXXWfbU674agbGhxgIkWMucTS0E8quXCqxEtRyaFaQgpKIXoJ7-2FNti7JTi6067Dof60QABLnAiuxa0tT7Mam7oO10HJYC3699e5aml4Io2tyg-2BqT3x1GVXbKo5HSHv3pOUT-2Flg-2F0FfRcyT-2FKUxnH-2Fx49OxrqaxSXx-2B-2FRXVlhbzbBsl9SyKvVCN2yS8fRie-2FpPsJT9Zj2NQl-2BuLgsBdwNFUHLtPEtFM5tfgunwGCBmQmRRIcmnxeajcqccg5LRMqQgSdy4T73cHvrf8DYen2waYzxDBTnjlHrlyhv-2F0cKYod7ZmczS3u4ncMBZcBxEng8mW).
Far from proving the grand scheme she imagined, Cheney instead illustrated that the conservative media figures she reviles, and the President’s own son, were shocked and horrified by what they saw occurring on January 6th and urged Trump to publicly call for calm. That these major media figures and Trump Jr. were taken aback by events only bolsters the previous finding of the FBI that there was [_**no**_ _**organized plot**_](https://u23309276.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=cNjdLOXrNVuGJHRASJfKfrwGxEZjPFbl2CD-2F0c3tLM8VonZ8ns43jXRCif7SvQOIXwaplGp4rIAByi7wmF3fkFGfzhHHxb55x0jf6zN9Q7uibTg2xmRUz7ueIcF2BjN04J1UcfSQIkDubyRccQ1ppYZLu5F6pAERVvK24xdHTng-3DtbM7_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6vIjbTIraqgM2tgjsJniMenRq6XKqB0MXLu5PxprLh1Oj-2FSNVyZjuvYJKkDmvegjAUgeEOtrV0zM3-2F7h9FuMNaG70rN8vect2sG9r-2FG8XqIVDUHBvG-2BUqTgl9qbV0S7HlC-2FUZhDJbmY4uA9mGiUEWJGKV0-2FlDqmk4airnxtqs0476l61BSwEG3Rlh6uIrZqpk2Y-2B5-2FRGLG2npM9Vc1kES44ag9A5ubvuYZdYeeTnEBeSo4DeDjRP7X-2Bs523qYyP-2BpS16Gj-2Fe0-2FxwLTNKcvbd1GFNu37oeDhQ-2BPArVarZxWDInkOWu-2FpP01AASX6HriotQ3E8XFhb7pJclFPBnQTg4IKQS35AhDYdfe9pcElqxcVmtCTqj1YvC9PYI-2FkKSHPEo6CP0ZEi68OpxoOtxxux3JtUqjmM4dzKn85mNi5841e2IQJTbrL9SHjZ99Paov7a07LAbb5hLQyxl7ciXlIbuWTkdGDLNtxH2NfRYHAmx3OjwBKFsvyKuEcqH-2FZIQ04YXXWfbU674agbGhxgIkWMucTS0E8quXCqxEtRyaFaQgpKIXoJ7-2FNti7JTi6067Dof60QABLnAiuxa0tT7Mam7oO10HJYC3699e5aml4Io2tyg-2BqT3x1GVXbKo5HSHv3pOUT-2Flg-2F0FfRcyT-2FKUxnH-2Fx49OxrqaxSXx-2B-2FRXVlhbzbBtLHeAjlYpDW-2F-2BXi7IWXLh9b4-2F-2BxAuEuXik8y9m3gESnCBqqcu0Dlz9hNR57BTRAXoJh1pYICWBrePIpMdKqZ02imV0Yg-2FVssGNZI1L0fEfkQFabQXlp7RMbyp6ZpL-2BMs9UVg9FkHL-2FURNdOT0PsCUR) on that day.
_**Sham hearing relied on bogus evidence
**_
Cheney was a key participant in the hearing in which Rep. Adam Schiff (D-CA) presented a slide purporting to show a text message from a member of Congress arguing that Vice President Mike Pence could overturn the 2020 presidential election results. Schiff showed an image he claimed was a text from Rep. Jim Jordon (R-OH) to Meadows.

As first [_**reported by The Federalist**_](https://u23309276.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=cNjdLOXrNVuGJHRASJfKfhhbVCux-2BknkLhhuu0Tp-2BpehP4XGUo4papV3iysQwTvTM32hjiIVdx066a1HxdaG5-2FuRobF-2FcYNAnHw77Xd4yEHciEO7SlHyKuMsai594ezAaAXLUzjMSwvo28fS3dht20IglAj0QWodpfIVjWBoZ3p3-2FjoISfsd8GMLjEEQed-2Fv1wKe_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6vIjbTIraqgM2tgjsJniMenRq6XKqB0MXLu5PxprLh1Oj-2FSNVyZjuvYJKkDmvegjAUgeEOtrV0zM3-2F7h9FuMNaG70rN8vect2sG9r-2FG8XqIVDUHBvG-2BUqTgl9qbV0S7HlC-2FUZhDJbmY4uA9mGiUEWJGKV0-2FlDqmk4airnxtqs0476l61BSwEG3Rlh6uIrZqpk2Y-2B5-2FRGLG2npM9Vc1kES44ag9A5ubvuYZdYeeTnEBeSo4DeDjRP7X-2Bs523qYyP-2BpS16Gj-2Fe0-2FxwLTNKcvbd1GFNu37oeDhQ-2BPArVarZxWDInkOWu-2FpP01AASX6HriotQ3E8XFhb7pJclFPBnQTg4IKQS35AhDYdfe9pcElqxcVmtCTqj1YvC9PYI-2FkKSHPEo6CP0ZEi68OpxoOtxxux3JtUqjmM4dzKn85mNi5841e2IQJTbrL9SHjZ99Paov7a07LAbb5hLQyxl7ciXlIbuWTkdGDLNtxH2NfRYHAmx3OjwBKFsvyKuEcqH-2FZIQ04YXXWfbU674agbGhxgIkWMucTS0E8quXCqxEtRyaFaQgpKIXoJ7-2FNti7JTi6067Dof60QABLnAiuxa0tT7Mam7oO10HJYC3699e5aml4Io2tyg-2BqT3x1GVXbKo5HSHv3pOUT-2Flg-2F0FfRcyT-2FKUxnH-2Fx49OxrqaxSXx-2B-2FRXVlhbzbBtVPK1Vv3FlqQteNAdXJ08oTLWN62OrTxTuZ-2F7CLvIVGeqRTTSvnQ9jADH4BfA1ey-2FMwOUw8SW4HnGgBFT8ekljcSaAPU71tTFDYqcrGTp2-2FVAML0yHZDl7SYmNSUCoX2Pvtcy28-2F1SvS-2FxP9R5xvNX) , the text was heavily doctored and redacted, altering the actual content of the message, misrepresenting its original source, and removing paragraphs that failed to support Schiff’s premise that the opinions presented were Jordan’s own. After the story of the falsified evidence broke, the committee issued a [_**partial admission**_](https://u23309276.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=cNjdLOXrNVuGJHRASJfKfhhbVCux-2BknkLhhuu0Tp-2BpeYoGysUIF3uHsgM2JZZrVBuUSAq80-2BVQokDVjV7HQaeTGfugOn5ncoXnxZSB4kyhPEyXVe5LsdgGrepcbkN3Dwjq2rGk3zTgLEXM8nC3UYuz2LNyBGTG5-2BRkFF28m9ubZkIEDjGn4CXBx7N-2FLdhAhHB_2I_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6vIjbTIraqgM2tgjsJniMenRq6XKqB0MXLu5PxprLh1Oj-2FSNVyZjuvYJKkDmvegjAUgeEOtrV0zM3-2F7h9FuMNaG70rN8vect2sG9r-2FG8XqIVDUHBvG-2BUqTgl9qbV0S7HlC-2FUZhDJbmY4uA9mGiUEWJGKV0-2FlDqmk4airnxtqs0476l61BSwEG3Rlh6uIrZqpk2Y-2B5-2FRGLG2npM9Vc1kES44ag9A5ubvuYZdYeeTnEBeSo4DeDjRP7X-2Bs523qYyP-2BpS16Gj-2Fe0-2FxwLTNKcvbd1GFNu37oeDhQ-2BPArVarZxWDInkOWu-2FpP01AASX6HriotQ3E8XFhb7pJclFPBnQTg4IKQS35AhDYdfe9pcElqxcVmtCTqj1YvC9PYI-2FkKSHPEo6CP0ZEi68OpxoOtxxux3JtUqjmM4dzKn85mNi5841e2IQJTbrL9SHjZ99Paov7a07LAbb5hLQyxl7ciXlIbuWTkdGDLNtxH2NfRYHAmx3OjwBKFsvyKuEcqH-2FZIQ04YXXWfbU674agbGhxgIkWMucTS0E8quXCqxEtRyaFaQgpKIXoJ7-2FNti7JTi6067Dof60QABLnAiuxa0tT7Mam7oO10HJYC3699e5aml4Io2tyg-2BqT3x1GVXbKo5HSHv3pOUT-2Flg-2F0FfRcyT-2FKUxnH-2Fx49OxrqaxSXx-2B-2FRXVlhbzbBuVzJGQIRFkXQA74naiyRgSex5JFmcne1Zp5xcRkT8UeWrW5xdTVsGspU87ZUXDsqlTzRka3kv45borvWVgIQrFZWqaczhYM0KspHFjvVAVSqbz3tEZyF4DPN2LVO5DwtzptOKRI7lEr3XeDus6Dg-2FH) of culpability.

While this was happening, Cheney sat silently and played along with the Democrat majority on the committee.

_**Cheney spun lies with January 6th timeline
**_
Having seen her dream of proving a conspiracy evaporate, Cheney shifted to claiming that Trump waited too long to react to the events unfolding at the Capitol. She charged that “for 187 minutes, President Trump refused to act,” which amounted to a “supreme dereliction of duty” from someone who should have stepped forward to stop the chaos.

In fact, [_**there was no 187-minute delay**_](https://u23309276.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=cNjdLOXrNVuGJHRASJfKfhhbVCux-2BknkLhhuu0Tp-2BpfZe41WEuVDOzPfxD1b4JjyOZ1nbS4i6-2B3yf17W9nS-2BZkwsNsSCwHCp4MB7NpjzNZHnlph4WlTT-2FunXM7Ua155tsQ6cXaPC8nK4v-2BVocnKN2tZFig-2Fk3QHwsT0-2BOrf9hYpmHg6txyFqFUCxm5XYnMqd9ByjKjlFtoq-2BxBQPszL56g-3D-3D620W_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6vIjbTIraqgM2tgjsJniMenRq6XKqB0MXLu5PxprLh1Oj-2FSNVyZjuvYJKkDmvegjAUgeEOtrV0zM3-2F7h9FuMNaG70rN8vect2sG9r-2FG8XqIVDUHBvG-2BUqTgl9qbV0S7HlC-2FUZhDJbmY4uA9mGiUEWJGKV0-2FlDqmk4airnxtqs0476l61BSwEG3Rlh6uIrZqpk2Y-2B5-2FRGLG2npM9Vc1kES44ag9A5ubvuYZdYeeTnEBeSo4DeDjRP7X-2Bs523qYyP-2BpS16Gj-2Fe0-2FxwLTNKcvbd1GFNu37oeDhQ-2BPArVarZxWDInkOWu-2FpP01AASX6HriotQ3E8XFhb7pJclFPBnQTg4IKQS35AhDYdfe9pcElqxcVmtCTqj1YvC9PYI-2FkKSHPEo6CP0ZEi68OpxoOtxxux3JtUqjmM4dzKn85mNi5841e2IQJTbrL9SHjZ99Paov7a07LAbb5hLQyxl7ciXlIbuWTkdGDLNtxH2NfRYHAmx3OjwBKFsvyKuEcqH-2FZIQ04YXXWfbU674agbGhxgIkWMucTS0E8quXCqxEtRyaFaQgpKIXoJ7-2FNti7JTi6067Dof60QABLnAiuxa0tT7Mam7oO10HJYC3699e5aml4Io2tyg-2BqT3x1GVXbKo5HSHv3pOUT-2Flg-2F0FfRcyT-2FKUxnH-2Fx49OxrqaxSXx-2B-2FRXVlhbzbBtMRwFFYuPi64SsKsa4aGOJM85PaYX8KjsK-2FfpDJtaYWAu6AE8vDyvn7NL1xkKPoh4FL38bAKd-2BLh02opHYPbtJSMImcy-2FzIeLfpyG3-2FACi6AjKa05KVBy728WqV2RoyCC-2B0QZx8SW6kCWxsl9hQF0F).

According to a sequence of events compiled by the New York Times, the first building breach occurred at 2:13 p.m. Trump’s first tweet calling for calm was posted at 2:38 p.m., when he said, “Please support our Capitol Police and Law Enforcement. They are truly on the side of our Country. Stay peaceful!”

Half an hour later, Trump tweeted again, writing, “I am asking everyone at the U.S. Capitol to remain peaceful. No violence! Remember WE are the Party of Law & Order – respect the Law and our great men and women in Blue. Thank you!”

At 4:17 p.m., Trump tweeted a video calling on the protestors to be peaceful and go home, but _**it was removed**_ when Trump’s Twitter account was locked by the social media platform.

Cheney’s claim of a delay of more than three hours is indisputably false.

_**Lincoln Project Loves Cheney
**_

clean_body: | | | | www.hagemanforwyoming.com Friends, Welcome back to another edition of the “Weekly Wyoming Wrap-Up.” This week we have a couple of key points to share with you: 1) It was a really good week for Harriet and Team Hageman. Harriet completed her tour of all 23 counties since getting into the race. If you missed her – don’t worry, she’ll be back soon! 2) It was a very bad week to be Liz Cheney. Check out the details below! For Wyoming, Team Hageman In Case You Missed It: Harriet joined Laura Ingraham to discuss state of the race. Harriet joined Laura Ingraham to discuss the recent poll that showed Harriet beating Liz Cheney and the feelings that the people of Wyoming have towards Cheney. View the entire segment on our Facebook page . ICYMI - It’s been a very, very bad week for Liz Cheney In one terrible week, Liz Cheney exposed as dishonest pawn of the Democrats It’s difficult to imagine a worse week for an incumbent member of Congress than the one Wyoming Rep. Liz Cheney just caused for herself. In the space of one January 6th Committee hearing Monday, Cheney managed to destroy her own theory of the cause of the January 6th storming of the U.S. Capitol, permitted the presentation of obviously doctored evidence, and personally introduced a January 6th timeline of events that has been revealed to be a work of fiction. Over the course of the week, Cheney’s dishonesty was exposed one piece at a time. On top of it all, it was disclosed that her re-election campaign is being heavily bankrolled by major donors to The Lincoln Project, which has moved on from attacking President Donald Trump and has focused its attention on defeating Republicans from coast to coast. It is now beyond doubt that Cheney is happy to be used as a tool of the Democrats simply because it furthers her quest to inflict damage on President Trump. Cheney wrecked her own theory Cheney has spent months publicly building the case that President Trump orchestrated a conspiracy with the intent to cause mayhem at the U.S. Capitol, but she blew her own theory apart with her stunt of reading aloud texts to White House Chief of Staff Mark Meadows from . Far from proving the grand scheme she imagined, Cheney instead illustrated that the conservative media figures she reviles, and the President’s own son, were shocked and horrified by what they saw occurring on January 6th and urged Trump to publicly call for calm. That these major media figures and Trump Jr. were taken aback by events only bolsters the previous finding of the FBI that there was on that day. Sham hearing relied on bogus evidence Cheney was a key participant in the hearing in which Rep. Adam Schiff (D-CA) presented a slide purporting to show a text message from a member of Congress arguing that Vice President Mike Pence could overturn the 2020 presidential election results. Schiff showed an image he claimed was a text from Rep. Jim Jordon (R-OH) to Meadows. As first , the text was heavily doctored and redacted, altering the actual content of the message, misrepresenting its original source, and removing paragraphs that failed to support Schiff’s premise that the opinions presented were Jordan’s own. After the story of the falsified evidence broke, the committee issued a of culpability. While this was happening, Cheney sat silently and played along with the Democrat majority on the committee. Cheney spun lies with January 6th timeline Having seen her dream of proving a conspiracy evaporate, Cheney shifted to claiming that Trump waited too long to react to the events unfolding at the Capitol. She charged that “for 187 minutes, President Trump refused to act,” which amounted to a “supreme dereliction of duty” from someone who should have stepped forward to stop the chaos. In fact, . According to a sequence of events compiled by the New York Times, the first building breach occurred at 2:13 p.m. Trump’s first tweet calling for calm was posted at 2:38 p.m., when he said, “Please support our Capitol Police and Law Enforcement. They are truly on the side of our Country. Stay peaceful!” Half an hour later, Trump tweeted again, writing, “I am asking everyone at the U.S. Capitol to remain peaceful. No violence! Remember WE are the Party of Law & Order – respect the Law and our great men and women in Blue. Thank you!” At 4:17 p.m., Trump tweeted a video calling on the protestors to be peaceful and go home, but it was removed when Trump’s Twitter account was locked by the social media platform. Cheney’s claim of a delay of more than three hours is indisputably false. Lincoln Project Loves Cheney It should come as no surprise, then, that major donors to the anti-Republican attack group The Lincoln Project are . Originally begun as a means to defeat President Trump in the 2020 election, The Lincoln Project has shifted its focus to attacking a wide variety of Republicans running for office across the country. Major Lincoln Project donors have given a total of almost $55,000 to Cheney’s re-election campaign and related committees in 2021: • Ron Conway gave $50,000 to the Lincoln Project and $21,600 to Cheney. • John Pritzker gave $100,000 to the Lincoln Project and $21,600 to Cheney. • Martha Karsh gave $50,000 to the Lincoln Project and $5,800 to Cheney. • Stephen Mandel gave $1,000,000 to the Lincoln Project and $2,900 to Cheney. • Christy Walton gave $30,000 to the Lincoln Project and $2,900 to Cheney. www.hagemanforwyoming.com | | | |

This is the most important survey I've ever asked you to complete.

So please, can I count on you to submit your feedback straight away?****
**
[https://action.dccc.org/survey/december-2021-priority-survey](https://links.e.dccc.)******

My final survey of the year is coming to a close.

Will you record your input before midnight tonight?**
****

I'm reaching out to you with a critical request:

**[Will you make sure to add your input to my FINAL survey of the year straight away?>>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

I know that you're highly informed and one of my most active grassroots supporters.

It's why my team knew to reach out to you.

Your thoughtful feedback has informed my strategy all year -- and I'm asking for it once again to protect and expand our Democratic House Majority.

**[Please: I'm calling on you -- one of my BEST supporters -- to complete your survey before midnight tonight. >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Ka_)**
---
****
Thanks,

Nancy

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46130456&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE0MjE5MjQwOAS2&l=14271489&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Dr. Neil Shah For Governor
subject: We Won Big Last Week
body:
| Peter -- Conservative Minnesotans who want to #SaveSota from the swamp and the radical left made their voices heard loud and clear last Wednesday. Our campaign to save the state we love received 48.5% of the vote in a straw poll taken immediately after the most recent Republican debate. If you missed the debate, you can [watch it here](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRY7Q_y8gylUG48rZfpnzF5j&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_debate&n=1). **Keep in mind this victory is not about me. This victory belongs to all of you.** When I am up on the debate stage explaining why we need to aggressively cut government, why the career politicians have consistently failed us, and why a return to conservative principles will save our state, I am constantly recalling conversations I’ve had with all of you across Minnesota. As a frustrated business owner trying to survive Walz’ lockdowns, and as a fed-up father trying to get my kids through zoom school, this message is just as much yours as it is mine. I am simply taking this message to the forefront, telling Walz and crooked politicians that we’ve had enough! The team is very happy to continue to see your message resonate with so many Minnesotans of many different backgrounds, but having the winning message is not enough. We need to act! **This victory will be fraught unless we get every Minnesotan who shares my frustrations to stand up and take the fight to the political elites and leftists that have been ruining our state and making your life unnecessarily difficult.** If we fail in taking action to defend our values, our families and our livelihoods, Republicans will run a milktoast candidate and we will all fail again next November. There are two important steps you can take!
1. Become a Delegate

In May, 2,200 delegates will attend the GOP endorsement convention and decide which one of us will go up against Tim Walz. Anyone can be a delegate! Securing the endorsement for Team Shah is the single most important thing we can do to get a conservative in the governor’s office next year. If you’re ready to help, please [contact our team here](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rIUT-mZ4lX_Eu1p670u2Bhs&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_debate&n=2). 2\. Support our campaign financially. If you do not have time you can support our efforts in finding those who do. [Pitch in $48.50](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=iUaD1gacZHU3dYzSqkV0rDwg01bMOn9gGWui5cl2dLg&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_debate&n=3) to give us the resources that will allow us to get our message out to other frustrated Minnesotans who are ready to take the fight to Walz. Thank you all for your generous support, and please know that **our campaign to Save Minnesota would not be possible without you.** Let’s keep the momentum going! I hope to hear from many more of you soon. Dr. Neil Shah Conservative Candidate for Governor electneil.com
---
-=-=- Dr. Neil Shah for Governor · 855 Village Center Drive #245, North Oaks, MN 55127-3016, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_debate&n=4). -=-=-
Created with [NationBuilder](https://electneil.nationbuilder.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=d39b8e369eb2bbdd6f36e913aaadeb34&utm_source=electneil&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_debate&n=5), software for leaders.

Look, residents of D.C. have ZERO representation in Congress.

If Washington D.C. became a state, Democrats would be FINALLY able to EXPAND our narrow majority in Congress and accomplish SO much.

_But it’s Mitch McConnell’s WORST NIGHTMARE... So he’s doing everything he can to STRIKE it down._

[We need 3,000 Democrats in your state to sign on right now and stand with Joe Biden in demanding DC Statehood. SIGN NOW >>](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/Senate-Make-DC-State/?source=VPP_20211219_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=1030%2E878179%2EA06L0d)

name: American Defense News
subject: What he says about the good life
body:
Are you struggling with a difficult question in your life? Often, I find myself in that position as well. It’s part of the hum
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqh8cdorjke5qc4b06v70r9a5mjvpica3rg57478_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicboe6dr36gon5crj68rb8s5iclhm9dr4sgq65d9ksuqe9cjjc4o69db36tjb8sb7mv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti61j38ppjc3jr4t3666ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5g60o34cdgmaoh5u)
| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrlsai7nc70lnmj28usnv77sefp3gofifil0fke0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1g68or1clh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Friend of Knowledge, Are you struggling with a difficult question in your life? Often, I find myself in that position as well. It’s part of the human condition to be faced with difficult situations, choices, and people. We teach at Hillsdale College that we must carefully consider concepts such as morality, ethics, happiness, courage, character, and justice when we face difficult questions. In the _Nicomachean Ethics_ —the first book written on how best to live—Aristotle argues that human happiness chiefly depends upon a person’s character, which is formed by making good choices. But good choices don’t come naturally. That’s why every student at Hillsdale studies Aristotle. In fact, understanding Aristotle is so important to living a good life that we’ve produced our online course, **“Introduction to Aristotle’s _Ethics_ : How to Lead a Good Life.” **
---
| | And now you can own the course on DVD, along with a special Hillsdale College edition of Aristotle’s _Nicomachean Ethics_ , for personal study. You’ll not only study what Aristotle says about the good life with Hillsdale College President Larry P. Arnn, but you will also explore ways to put this knowledge to work.
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z76b7ocbk096ddvotbckesqmaihn61ja0fpqusm8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1g68or1clh2bs)
---
| | The DVD gives you a seat at the table in a seminar-style class like those here on campus, and you’ll read from the same book the students are in the course. In addition to the topics I’ve already mentioned, the course focuses on subjects including:
* Aristotle’s _Politics_ and the Nature of Man
* Deliberation and Choice
* Practical Judgment
* Contemplation and Action

Just consider what Rebecca, a free online course student, recently said: _“I have learned [through the Aristotle course] that every choice we make etches into our soul.”_ Make a good choice, and watch a special preview video of the course. Then reserve your DVD and book today using this secure link: [**_https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/aristotle-dvd-book-offer_**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlk4iehcp4ri3srobbkl40lfs48mivoqo4cgsd2o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1g68or1clh2bs) After watching the preview, if you’re struggling with a thorny question, I hope you’ll join Rebecca and many others by reserving your DVD of [**“Introduction to Aristotle’s _Ethics_ ”**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zttk4tfqsoebua92lbce8dl5d80sb529ufo98mp0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1g68or1clh2bs)**** along with its companion book __ today _._ Quantities of the DVD and book are limited, so don’t wait too long to decide. Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americandefensenews.com/prefs/9z2zk840q4630rv7kice2m274emajov1b84dci169io).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqp4jhk5v4m93ngqdhs9qkdd909m9oqfinq6f3do_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1g68or1clh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

subject: there’s only one way to stop this tyranny
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
Joe Biden’s presidency is an unmitigated disaster. Our southern border is in crisis. The Afghanistan withdrawal was a mess.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zltblioup6cn7uv495dm5pchbfh42ihv71kjlodo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1g68or6cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onmmdojcodiesqnedr0edin4tj4e6oe1cr4sgrjedtncarbfc7268qb2sdkeerbfduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4c366hjj6o77m9pmcc3gm9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)

Friend, Joe Biden’s presidency is an unmitigated disaster.
__
* _Our southern border is in crisis._
* _The Afghanistan withdrawal was a mess. _
* _Americans are forced to choose between a vaccine and a job._
* _And China is watching closely, delighted by every failure._

__
**I’m sure you’ll agree that this isn’t leadership. It’s chaos.****_It’s tyranny. _**

There’s only one way to stop it: we MUST take back the Republican majority in the Senate to pull our country out of this leftist tailspin.

That's why I’m working with my conservative colleagues like Rand Paul to make sure we’re successful in 2022. And that’s why I'm contacting you today.

Will you chip in now to help us TAKE BACK THE SENATE?
__
[**TAKE BACK THE SENATE: $25**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0o52vjiaasvu26vag9fs8br77q03ppin1bfpo7g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1g68or6cph2bs)

The only hope we have to get America back on track is to make sure we limit Biden’s power.

Right now, he has full control in Washington.

The House - the Senate - and the White House.

And we’ve seen how he abuses that power!

We have a real chance to rein in the radical agenda if we take back the Senate.

And here’s the good news: we only need to gain ONE SEAT to win back our majority.

But friend, trust me - these liberals aren’t going to play nice. They’ll do whatever it takes to win.

We have to work together NOW to prepare for the fight.

**[Will you step up today and commit to taking back the Senate with a contribution of $25, $35, $50, or $75?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7i5d5lr6cf87rdj71q5t9ll8bm4nfuqhgh52lrg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1g68or6cph2bs)**

** If we value small businesses like we say we do, then it is time our policy actions match those values. [ | | |
---|---|--- ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39847442/321716000/-436133703?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWM1YzVjYS05NDYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xa4V8UPevAIqFluBFU0_YclXjcq9QH3TIpG7oikMdKM=&emci=2382af5a-3e61-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d1c5c5ca-9461-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=5354188)
Hi Peter,

My family runs a small business. One of the things my brother and I frequently talk about is how the tax structure is crippling small businesses. The previous administration's tax cuts focused on those for larger corporations, leaving small businesses, like the one my family owns, paying higher tax rates.

If we care for and support small businesses like we say we do, we need to ensure a fair tax structure, access to capital, and investments that make it easier for small businesses to recruit and retain good employees - particularly businesses owned by women and people of color.

Learn more about my ideas for supporting small businesses.
[**Read More**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39847443/321716007/-950812558?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzgwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMWM1YzVjYS05NDYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xa4V8UPevAIqFluBFU0_YclXjcq9QH3TIpG7oikMdKM=&emci=2382af5a-3e61-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=d1c5c5ca-9461-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=5354188)

clean_body: Support Small Businesses If we value small businesses like we say we do, then it is time our policy actions match those values. Hi Peter, My family runs a small business. One of the things my brother and I frequently talk about is how the tax structure is crippling small businesses. The previous administration's tax cuts focused on those for larger corporations, leaving small businesses, like the one my family owns, paying higher tax rates. If we care for and support small businesses like we say we do, we need to ensure a fair tax structure, access to capital, and investments that make it easier for small businesses to recruit and retain good employees - particularly businesses owned by women and people of color. Learn more about my ideas for supporting small businesses. | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward Friends of Ashley Ward P.O. name: Geoff Diehl
subject: Reminder: Massachusetts Democrats are at it again ...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Diehl for Massachusetts
body:
Please support my campaign against their progressive liberal policies!
| | | |
---
---
---
|
---
Dear Friend,
Have you seen the recent statements from my Democrat opponent, State Senator Sonia Chang-Diaz?
This past week, Chang-Diaz not only [defended a staffer](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gNU70YqRRXG2b_MDawxQBjxIDg1s5U0yX3F0S16uE2HgFmcXnnxt24HqNrC0a8GIwvxYYMKVSluE7dgQAnqKqjzcmhke6Dtl3pWTxIqO57JJYt9H-AZjWUBfbi7QyIcxLXDTO1oYS8MxltsY1kOI38P089Ijh5NLvdABab6hUpcx0YDwscf3BxhfOa96t-tyLOCV4yJmt_ahSV6tTPvnkeDfvbX5eR7YdrG7xb8rbwfA6PLGtok4-WHd1TxnqG7uuqQN5LMu6EVPpliXt-uoMuUkPLqECzaZ&c=inAyemKvZbcu_9mDFKbtma1smpYTrRF6mkVFCEdqOyV_5j-jTLz_eg==&ch=Wwj9ObJT3x-F2p12GnNINTx6lqlyAQGufQxJiPy06n9mKRZ5PZzw4g==) for wearing a hat with an anti-police slogan, but also doubled down on her own anti-police agenda:
"I'm the one running for Governor and my record is crystal clear: we need real police reform and accountability to restore community trust, we need to end qualified immunity, and we need to redirect funding from over-policing and unused prisons into communities that have been ravaged by the War on Drugs and mass incarceration." \- State Senator Sonia Chang-Diaz
Well, I've got news for my Democrat opponent: I am the one running for Governor who supports our first responders, especially the men and women who work in law enforcement. As your next Governor, I will always have the back of our police. I won't defund them, I'll defend them and their mission.
It doesn't stop there. Later in the week, Chang-Diaz was at it again, this time calling for a "[Green New Deal for Massachusetts](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001gNU70YqRRXG2b_MDawxQBjxIDg1s5U0yX3F0S16uE2HgFmcXnnxt24HqNrC0a8GITayT0Ld9bll8KrsBZF71NRBCZNN3ZLjSlCy9XitXZSl6dlt0S_O2sylbZISKOs5UaT9Uk79TRJEr0tadUeaJNylzUZQKI6Vk1BXKtt-J6wUsd-8SgPJBmZBnPHpyVlpvHFLLEy6c6N9Pcp7AVEABY2zF08Y7UduSobsbn4cAdSIEUTKg2TY3J3a3AL7ydzcQItA1WowKwsg=&c=inAyemKvZbcu_9mDFKbtma1smpYTrRF6mkVFCEdqOyV_5j-jTLz_eg==&ch=Wwj9ObJT3x-F2p12GnNINTx6lqlyAQGufQxJiPy06n9mKRZ5PZzw4g==)."
Whose side are the Democrats really on?
I'm running for Governor because I'm on your side. I'm advocating for policies to help people live a better life here in Massachusetts.
In short, I'm fighting for what's right for our state. But, I can't do it alone. I need your help.
Will you please help me as I work to get the message out and stand up against the progressive agenda of liberal Massachusetts Democrats? If you are able to, please consider making a donation today:
---

name: Jake Evans for Congress
subject: Cherokee County Rep. Brad Thomas endorses Jake
body:
Says Evans will stand up for parents’ rights, take the fight against CRT to Congress
---
| | | | | |
---
| | For immediate release Dec. 20, 2021 Contact: (470) 588-2028, news@jakeevans.org Cherokee County Rep. Brad Thomas endorses Jake
Says Evans will stand up for parents' rights, take the fight against CRT to Congress Cherokee County State Rep. Brad Thomas (R-Holly Springs) has endorsed Jake Evans' campaign for the Sixth Congressional District, saying that Jake would take the battle against CRT to Washington on behalf of Georgia parents. "Jake Evans will fight for our children and our families and lead the charge in Congress to stop the teaching of divisive ideologies like Critical Race Theory," Thomas said. "The Left knows that the best way to recreate America in its image is to brainwash our children with Marxist ideology, and conservative parents cannot let that happen. I'm introducing legislation in Georgia to ban this racist curriculum, and I know Jake won't let Washington liberals shame or silence him as he fights on our behalf. I'm proud to endorse his race for Congress and encourage fellow patriots to give their support as well." Earlier this year, Thomas spoke out in favor of Cherokee County's local decision to ban the teaching of CRT in its schools and vowed to introduce legislation on the matter in the General Assembly. "I appreciate the work that Brad is doing in the Cherokee community and for our state in standing up for the rights of parents to have a say on school curriculum," Jake said. "I fully support what he's trying to accomplish here in Georgia, and I'm ready to take up the cause on the federal level because I believe the future of our nation depends on uniting today's children with the common bonds of patriotism, not dividing a diverse nation along racial lines."
---

My dad’s pretty old school in a lot of ways – he grew up the son and grandson of sharecroppers, and didn’t have access to a lot of the resources that my siblings and I have.
That’s why I’m so impressed by his willingness to try new things to reach voters – especially young people. The campaign even convinced my dad to get on TikTok to reach the next generation of voters – and honestly, he’s killing it. Check him out @VoteCharlesGraham.
My dad’s working so hard and getting out of his comfort zone for the people of North Carolina, so my siblings and I want to show him how much we appreciate all the work he’s doing.

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: 9 Leftists Arrested for Attacking Free Speech
body:
Peter, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It's never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That's why it's of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I'm no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59060313:60o81AElN:m:1:3253819041:47E6D8A9AFB521EFA83933C23A611CC1:r) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn't disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event--with the likely intent to do harm.

It's no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It's about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn't have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony--a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left 's attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that's more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren't for the **Young America 's Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university --**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America's universities has not yet been broken. **Young America 's Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation's leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59060313:60o81AElN:m:1:3253819041:47E6D8A9AFB521EFA83933C23A611CC1:r)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America's Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, "Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness." YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they're told to trust. YAF's team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here's why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF's Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D 'Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes, **Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O 'Keefe, **NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News's**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan's ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan's lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America 's Foundation._ _That 's why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can't do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it's become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn't want a fair discussion of ideas. But that's why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment's notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF 's rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59060313:60o81AElN:m:1:3253819041:47E6D8A9AFB521EFA83933C23A611CC1:r) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can't be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can't think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, "There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds." I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America 's Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59060313:60o81AElN:m:1:3253819041:47E6D8A9AFB521EFA83933C23A611CC1:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59060313:60o81AElN:m:1:3253819041:47E6D8A9AFB521EFA83933C23A611CC1:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59060313:60o81AElN:m:1:3253819041:47E6D8A9AFB521EFA83933C23A611CC1:r) | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59060314:60o81AElN:m:1:3253819041:47E6D8A9AFB521EFA83933C23A611CC1:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59060315:60o81AElN:m:1:3253819041:47E6D8A9AFB521EFA83933C23A611CC1:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59060316:60o81AElN:m:1:3253819041:47E6D8A9AFB521EFA83933C23A611CC1:r)
---|---|---

11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor
Reston, VA 20191-1556

I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can't think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, "There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds." I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro | | | | ---|---|--- 11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor Reston, VA 20191-1556 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. name: Trump News HQ
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0g364vhcv9laug5qiaon9a8f6kfpsqs7en2cvv8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1g61o74c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgt0g2u87pqv736h7reurli840mrem4i0o4ogd9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1g61o74c3h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5qsegimhge6f1b9cfbv2pngnvc3k4c4dqfafq60_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1g61o74c3h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Control of the Senate hinges on Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39850818/321732989/-420428835?refcode=20211220_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTRhMzgzNy1hMTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MNaJXnUZSTgeUGRp8vnQqUOK_06OX6QqKYL77wDnoCs=) Friend - I'm one of the most vulnerable incumbent Senate Democrats up for reelection next year, and I need your help: while I've spent my time in office providing pandemic relief to struggling families, fighting for voting rights and delivering on our progressive priorities, extremist Republicans are doing everything they can to attack me and smear my record. Here's why: experts at _POLITICO_ say that Democrats' chances of defending our razor-thin majority hinge on keeping Georgia blue. This race will decide Senate control – but while GOP megadonors and dark money groups have millions to spend to try and buy this seat, we're running a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots support. **And unfortunately, with time running out before our crucial midnight fundraising deadline, we're falling incredibly short of our goal.** **So I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help today. I need to raise another $8,346 to fight back against GOP attacks and protect my seat – and I'm counting on you to help me get there:[ please, split $25 or more right now – as much as you can spare by midnight tonight – between my campaign and Seth Moulton's Serve America so we can win in Georgia and defend our Democratic Senate majority. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39850822/321732992/-392698372?refcode=20211220_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTRhMzgzNy1hMTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MNaJXnUZSTgeUGRp8vnQqUOK_06OX6QqKYL77wDnoCs=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39850826/321732995/-420428835?refcode=20211220_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTRhMzgzNy1hMTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MNaJXnUZSTgeUGRp8vnQqUOK_06OX6QqKYL77wDnoCs=)
As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black senator in Georgia's history. But here's the deal: **with the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to retake control – and they're coming after me as a top target for defeat.** That's why we have to fight back _now_ – and it's why falling short of important goals like this isn't an option. Because if we fail to keep Georgia blue, Mitch McConnell will be back calling the shots and obstructing our Democratic agenda at every turn. **The battle for Senate control will be won or lost in Georgia, friend. So if you care about defending our Democratic Senate, I'm counting on you to rush your immediate grassroots support before it's too late:** [**Please, split a donation of $25 or more now between my campaign and Seth Moulton's Serve America PAC – before our crucial midnight deadline – to help us fight back against GOP attacks, keep Georgia blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39850829/321732999/-392698372?refcode=20211220_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTRhMzgzNy1hMTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MNaJXnUZSTgeUGRp8vnQqUOK_06OX6QqKYL77wDnoCs=) I appreciate it – thank you so much. – Raphael Warnock [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39850832/321733002/-420428835?refcode=20211220_SA_RW&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTRhMzgzNy1hMTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MNaJXnUZSTgeUGRp8vnQqUOK_06OX6QqKYL77wDnoCs=)

clean_body: | | | = Friend - I'm one of the most vulnerable incumbent Senate Democrats up for reelection next year, and I need your help: while I've spent my time in office providing pandemic relief to struggling families, fighting for voting rights and delivering on our progressive priorities, extremist Republicans are doing everything they can to attack me and smear my record. Here's why: experts at POLITICO say that Democrats' chances of defending our razor-thin majority hinge on keeping Georgia blue. This race will decide Senate control – but while GOP megadonors and dark money groups have millions to spend to try and buy this seat, we're running a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots support. And unfortunately, with time running out before our crucial midnight fundraising deadline, we're falling incredibly short of our goal. So I'm personally reaching out to ask for your help today. I need to raise another $8,346 to fight back against GOP attacks and protect my seat – and I'm counting on you to help me get there:= = As a kid who grew up in public housing, I know what it's like to be counted out before you even get started. But through hard work and the support of my family and community, I was able to graduate from college and went on to become the senior pastor at Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s church. Now, I'm proudly serving as the first Black senator in Georgia's history. But here's the deal: with the Senate split 50-50, Republicans need to flip only one seat to retake control – and they're coming after me as a top target for defeat. That's why we have to fight back now – and it's why falling short of important goals like this isn't an option. Because if we fail to keep Georgia blue, Mitch McConnell will be back calling the shots and obstructing our Democratic agenda at every turn. The battle for Senate control will be won or lost in Georgia, friend. So if you care about defending our Democratic Senate, I'm counting on you to rush your immediate grassroots support before it's too late: = I appreciate it – thank you so much. – Raphael Warnock = | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Serve America PAC Serve America PAC PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: Leftists Arrested for Violently Attacking Free Speech
body:
Peter, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It's never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That's why it's of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I'm no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59063287:JnE-yAENm:m:1:3298722022:4AE1C1A91AFDF572A06F5685180A19DE:r) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn't disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event--with the likely intent to do harm.

It's no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It's about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn't have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony--a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left 's attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that's more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren't for the **Young America 's Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university --**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America's universities has not yet been broken. **Young America 's Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation's leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59063287:JnE-yAENm:m:1:3298722022:4AE1C1A91AFDF572A06F5685180A19DE:r)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America's Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, "Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness." YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they're told to trust. YAF's team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here's why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF's Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D 'Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes, **Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O 'Keefe, **NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News's**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan's ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan's lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America 's Foundation._ _That 's why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can't do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it's become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn't want a fair discussion of ideas. But that's why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment's notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF 's rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59063287:JnE-yAENm:m:1:3298722022:4AE1C1A91AFDF572A06F5685180A19DE:r) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can't be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can't think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, "There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds." I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America 's Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59063287:JnE-yAENm:m:1:3298722022:4AE1C1A91AFDF572A06F5685180A19DE:r) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59063287:JnE-yAENm:m:1:3298722022:4AE1C1A91AFDF572A06F5685180A19DE:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59063287:JnE-yAENm:m:1:3298722022:4AE1C1A91AFDF572A06F5685180A19DE:r) | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59063288:JnE-yAENm:m:1:3298722022:4AE1C1A91AFDF572A06F5685180A19DE:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59063289:JnE-yAENm:m:1:3298722022:4AE1C1A91AFDF572A06F5685180A19DE:r) | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59063290:JnE-yAENm:m:1:3298722022:4AE1C1A91AFDF572A06F5685180A19DE:r)
---|---|---
**[www.yaf.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59063291:JnE-yAENm:m:1:3298722022:4AE1C1A91AFDF572A06F5685180A19DE:r)**

11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor
Reston, VA 20191-1556

**[Privacy Policy](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59063292:JnE-yAENm:m:1:3298722022:4AE1C1A91AFDF572A06F5685180A19DE:r) **

name: Nikki Fried
subject: DC politicians won’t fight for us, but I will
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
It all comes down to Florida’s next Governor

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39852385/321738215/380302539?refcode=1220&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmMyOGY3NC1hMzYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qymdRtobVSoKDJAxdyOGNDmmFpA_AsXE8fPfPKlmHvQ=) Peter — Yesterday, we saw that Washington is not working for us. We need legislation that would provide eye glass and dental care for our seniors, cap insulin prices, provide universal pre-K, and combat climate change. **It just goes to show that politicians in DC aren’t working for us.** The old way of thinking—that Washington is going to save us—can’t be our top option. And if we’re going to make progress on issues that matter, we can’t depend on them to make it happen. **That’s why it’s absolutely critical to elect someone that works for you. I’m not a DC politician. ** As Ron DeSantis has proved, Governors have the power to make real change— for better or for worse. And unlike DeSantis, I will dedicate all of my time and power to making our lives better. [**But I can’t do it without your help, Peter. Can you chip in $10 today to elect a true champion for Floridians and bring something new to our state?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39852387/321738216/380302539?refcode=1220&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmMyOGY3NC1hMzYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qymdRtobVSoKDJAxdyOGNDmmFpA_AsXE8fPfPKlmHvQ=) As our next Governor, I will do what DC politicians won’t. I’ll fight to protect our environment, create good paying jobs, create more affordable housing, reduce costs for working families, and build a more prosperous Florida for every resident. [**We deserve a Governor who will fight for us no matter what. And with your help, we can make it happen. Click here to chip in $10 right now and help us win this race.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39852389/321738217/380302539?refcode=1220&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmMyOGY3NC1hMzYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qymdRtobVSoKDJAxdyOGNDmmFpA_AsXE8fPfPKlmHvQ=) **** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately._ | [$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39852390/321738219/380302539?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=1220&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmMyOGY3NC1hMzYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qymdRtobVSoKDJAxdyOGNDmmFpA_AsXE8fPfPKlmHvQ=) | [$10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39852391/321738220/380302539?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=1220&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmMyOGY3NC1hMzYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qymdRtobVSoKDJAxdyOGNDmmFpA_AsXE8fPfPKlmHvQ=) | [$20](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39852392/321738248/380302539?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=1220&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmMyOGY3NC1hMzYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qymdRtobVSoKDJAxdyOGNDmmFpA_AsXE8fPfPKlmHvQ=)

name: Skip Vasquez, Field Director
subject: voters in TX-35 are FIRED UP for Greg
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg Casar for Congress
body:
Hi Peter,
This weekend we held our first volunteer event since launching our campaign—and it was a huge success! Voters across TX-35 are fired up about the March 1st primary and are ready to elect a leader who can deliver progressive change for our state.
I talked to voters who are excited about Greg’s vision for good jobs, Medicare for All, protections for reproductive rights, and a functional power grid. We want to share that vision with as many voters as possible over these next few weeks. That’s why I’m hoping you can pitch in $15 or $25 to help us get out the vote. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=12.15-JD-email&amount=35]
Donate $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=12.15-JD-email&amount=35] Donate $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=12.15-JD-email&amount=35] https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Our first volunteer community canvass in Austin on Saturday!
Saturday’s community canvass was a blast, but it was just the start! We’ll continue to reach out over the coming weeks with other opportunities to get involved. We hope you can join us. But before then, we’d love your support for our get out the vote efforts.
Please chip in $15 or $25 today to help us reach every voter in TX-35. Now is a critical moment in our campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/greg-casar-for-congress?refcode=12.15-JD-email&amount=35]
Supporters like you are our most valuable asset. With your help, we can make sure our campaign reaches every voter from Austin to San Antonio, and everywhere in between. Thank you for being a part of this movement.
Best wishes,
-Skip
Skip Vasquez
Field Director, Greg Casar for Congress
http://facebook.com/gregcasar [http://facebook.com/gregcasar] http://twitter.com/gregcasar [http://twitter.com/gregcasar] http://instagram.com/gregcasar [http://instagram.com/gregcasar]

Austin, TX 78703

body:
We’re getting hit the hardest by the GOP, but we have the fewest resources to fight back | | |
---
Team – Mitch McConnell and dark money groups have spent over $7 million on attack ads against Maggie Hassan. **That’s more than they’ve spent attacking any other Democratic Senator in the country.** But last quarter, we didn’t raise as much money as other vulnerable Democrats. **That means that we’re getting hit the hardest by the GOP, but we have the fewest resources to fight back.** Our major end-of-year FEC deadline is around the corner, and right now it’s looking like we’ll be outraised and outspent yet again. body:
Gov. Ron DeSantis is the worst of all the Trump proteges. |
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39857431/321757177/1155534643?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGE5OGUyNi1hYjYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qSGnSctH-CTQaiUqVwR7GAOSS0o31p5V_10AVbfYTQc=&emci=d49a293e-965e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=5da98e26-ab61-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=8807089)

Folks,

Florida has always been a swing state -- but recently, I’ve heard folks say it’s swung too red for us to win.

**_They’re wrong._** Florida is a tough state to win, but I’ve done it before, and I can do it again. In fact, recent polls have me neck and neck with Gov. DeSantis! We can beat him -- but we have to do it together.

**Let’s show the doubters that we’re willing to fight for Florida: today, tomorrow, and every day between now and Election Day 2022.**

**[I need 5,000 grassroots Democrats to show their support for my campaign to defeat Gov. DeSantis and flip Florida blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39857432/321757178/1155534643?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGE5OGUyNi1hYjYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qSGnSctH-CTQaiUqVwR7GAOSS0o31p5V_10AVbfYTQc=&emci=d49a293e-965e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=5da98e26-ab61-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=8807089)**

---
**Gov. Ron DeSantis is the worst of all the Trump proteges.** He’s failed to lead on the COVID-19 pandemic, supports restricting abortion access, suppressed the vote, damaged Florida’s economy with his hyperpartisan actions, and refused to tackle the existential threat of climate change.

If Gov. DeSantis wins reelection and keeps Florida red, Republican governors across America will use him and his horrible record as a template in their own states.

**_We cannot allow that to happen._** **[Please add your name to my petition and publicly show that we need to keep fighting for Florida. Together, we can defeat Gov. DeSantis and turn Florida blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39857434/321757181/1155534643?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZGE5OGUyNi1hYjYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qSGnSctH-CTQaiUqVwR7GAOSS0o31p5V_10AVbfYTQc=&emci=d49a293e-965e-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=5da98e26-ab61-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=8807089)**

Thank you,
Charlie Crist

body:
Biden is pushing onward with his COVID winter plan.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kC0HtboGCfPljzRoKA1CRWQ5CWLsB3JNgtANZ6bH3Vk3x5BpqTI70eGwgfXQBeVWN0LZts-xu2qEH39VqJv6v1ONVsXCR8_6IXwy0nJpDvrksnLAeI-Zu0XDHnGILJjmO-6Els8JeDiEzON3IOgA6RiCVILAnf3g6o6Y3snp0hHYcREBKx7_pryhY2qxIUmiBXu8wZ6y9X8DxubtPj6VkZj0qW274MYW&c=DRSNver3lGhwl8KdZBTduAhnhAo53AZajclCE2dU_HjnTb1CcJRmhQ==&ch=QXDWSewpBh3IBkQye1WiA8R0mXQ5wJhMMTNbta2CtVpkPnh0hfPW7w==)
---
| Friend,
Biden is pushing onward with his COVID winter plan. The plan requires all travelers to be subject to COVID testing if they want to enter the country, regardless of vaccination status. However, the same rules and regulations do NOT apply to illegal immigrants.
When questioned about the possibility of COVID from illegal migration, Jen Psaki quickly deflected. She went on to state that the migrants "did not plan on staying for a long period of time," meaning they wouldn't have to follow the strict rules being forced on Americans.
Yet again, the Biden administration is showing their obvious preferential treatment to illegal immigrants over law-abiding American citizens.
---
| | | [PUT AMERICANS FIRST](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kC0HtboGCfPljzRoKA1CRWQ5CWLsB3JNgtANZ6bH3Vk3x5BpqTI70eGwgfXQBeVWN0LZts-xu2qEH39VqJv6v1ONVsXCR8_6IXwy0nJpDvrksnLAeI-Zu0XDHnGILJjmO-6Els8JeDiEzON3IOgA6RiCVILAnf3g6o6Y3snp0hHYcREBKx7_pryhY2qxIUmiBXu8wZ6y9X8DxubtPj6VkZj0qW274MYW&c=DRSNver3lGhwl8KdZBTduAhnhAo53AZajclCE2dU_HjnTb1CcJRmhQ==&ch=QXDWSewpBh3IBkQye1WiA8R0mXQ5wJhMMTNbta2CtVpkPnh0hfPW7w==)
---
| In the last year, there have been close to 2 million encounters at our southern border with a large percentage of that number making it across the border. It is beyond ridiculous that they are not subject to the same laws and restrictions as us.
Biden's open-border agenda is threatening the health and safety of our nation. The hypocrisy of the Far-Left knows no end and they must be held accountable.
With your support, Kat can help retake the House in 2022, secure our border, and end the big government attacks on your medical liberty. She can't do this without proud patriots like you.

Hi team, Since Ben shared our December Issues Survey last week, we noticed that fewer folks responded than we expected. We get it. The holidays are upon us and people are busy getting things done as we inch closer to the new year. We value your input because it informs everything from policy development to our voter outreach strategy. Our campaign is about you and everyone in the Commonwealth, after all. _\-----------------original message sent December 9, 2021-----------------_

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: What this campaign feels like
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39858776/321763718/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk488-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWZlOGQ5ZC1hZTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lUb1GxP3C13-vx9ESO9GszWj6xo7RP0ZdfQcNSRZWh8=)
Peter, I can't say that I've run a marathon before, but that's what this campaign to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) sort of feels like right now – a _marathon,_ not a sprint. Let me explain.
We're armed with polling data that proves Iowans are ready for change: More than 60% of likely Iowa voters have said they don't want to vote for Sen. Grassley; he's facing record-low approval ratings; and a pollster here in Iowa said he's facing weakness in his poll numbers.
But month after month, all the way until Election Day, it's my job to make the case to those voters that we _can_ secure the change they're hoping for. It's my job to make the case that it's time for Sen. Grassley to go. It's my job to make the case that, together, we can send a public servant to Washington who will actually lift up the voices of working families.
Simply put, Peter, it's why your donation – here and now, as we're reaching voters where they're at – matters _just as much_ as your donation a month or two out from the election. Your investment in our campaign _now_ is what will power us through. Frankly, it's how we win.
**So I'm asking you to join me in this marathon. I'm asking you to help me** _seize_**this momentum. With Republicans sitting on****on nearly $30 million in campaign cash to take back the Senate and protect incumbents like Sen. Grassley****, grassroots support from people like you is the** _only_**way we'll win.****[So please, can you make a contribution of $5 or more now – whatever you can chip in – to help me defeat Sen. Grassley and protect our Democratic Senate majority? Every dollar you contribute means invaluable resources for our campaign to flip this seat blue and fight for working families.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39858777/321763719/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk488-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWZlOGQ5ZC1hZTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lUb1GxP3C13-vx9ESO9GszWj6xo7RP0ZdfQcNSRZWh8=)**

name: Emma Guarino
subject: Happy Holidays!
body:
Happy Holidays!

I wanted to take a moment to thank you for supporting Kelly this past year and into next year! Our campaign is focused on ensuring that all Marylanders are afforded every possibility to succeed and pursue their dreams. We are so humbled by the support we get from all of you. As we move into 2022, we wish you Happy Holidays and a spectacular New Year.

Next year will be a busy one, but we are ready for the hard work. We are just getting started, and we look forward to working nonstop to earn the vote of every Marylander.

Please do not hesitate to reach out to me if you need anything.

From Kelly and our entire team, have a fantastic holiday season.

Talk soon,
Emma

Our campaign is focused on ensuring that all Marylanders are afforded every possibility to succeed and pursue their dreams. We are so humbled by the support we get from all of you. As we move into 2022, we wish you Happy Holidays and a spectacular New Year. Next year will be a busy one, but we are ready for the hard work. We are just getting started, and we look forward to working nonstop to earn the vote of every Marylander. Please do not hesitate to reach out to me if you need anything. From Kelly and our entire team, have a fantastic holiday season. Talk soon, Emma

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Peter - | CNN... What a corrupt organization. After lying about the Russia hoax, lying about Trump, and lying about me, should any of us be surprised that their "star" journalist Chris Cuomo got caught helping his sleazy brother behind the scenes? CNN has spent the month doing damage control after one of their top propagandists was caught red-handed helping a Democrat politician. All while being SILENT Talk about 'enemy of the people!' You might remember when a CNN technical director was caught on camera saying THIS about me... "He's a problem for the Democrat Party because he's so conservative and he can cause a lot of hiccups... So, we're going to keep running those stories to keep hurting him." They know that I'm effective and a problem for their biased, partisan agenda. | | | == | == | CNN ran with the lies against me and my family for months, and Chris Cuomo himself had the nerve to call the extortion against me a "fugazi." He even gave airtime to another one of my extortionists to lie about the crime! The shameless stunt that they pulled against me and my family to try to stop someone who's effective against their agenda might be classic CNN propaganda...but it's trash journalism. And it's hurting our country more and more by the day. I'm not going to stop fighting back. I won't be intimidated by the CNN attacks. The corporate, Fake News media propagandists are proven liars who will do anything and everything to prop up the Democrat agenda. == Help me keep up the fight by chipping in here: | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Thanks for helping me fight back, Matt Gaetz | == | | | | | | == == | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ | Copyright (C) 2021 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved.
