Hi there, folks, I’m reaching out today because our race just got moved closer to being a toss-up. Martin suggested I shoot you a note because **this race is even less secure than we originally thought.** Look, we never thought this was going to be an easy race. But, with our Republican opponents already running misleading attack ads about me all over Colorado and with the National Republican Senate Committee raising more than $75 million, this year alone, to take back seats like mine, we need to gear up faster than we originally planned. Now, I’m not here to fool you with fake astronomical goals or beg you for a donation because the “sky is falling!” That’s not how I do things. But I will be honest with you: we have a razor-thin, one-seat majority in the Senate right now and if we lose even a single seat, Mitch McConnell will be back in charge obstructing all the progress we’ve made this year. **So I’m asking (not begging! That’s not my style), if you’ll split a contribution today between my campaign and Martin.** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split between Michael Bennet and Martin Heinrich immediately:_ | [$10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39859591/321767388/-1695566697?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_NO_20211220_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzA5ZjUyYS1iMDYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7dWd-oVzLqLlgUe1-BRQWr7ucv9UEWOoq-Am58OyyhE=) | [$25 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39859592/321767389/-1695566697?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=AU_MTH_FR_TAN_GEN_NO_20211220_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzA5ZjUyYS1iMDYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7dWd-oVzLqLlgUe1-BRQWr7ucv9UEWOoq-Am58OyyhE=)

body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/h093xqc-_AV1r9F-yYhxGp90Rk9wdWMMAed0typU5cg=/6TwK1cOrTUkR2Nnnvv4WbXMhL4FA0-A6OtFoSd9-1KQ=?refcode=122021)
| | Friend, I was honored to be elected Majority Whip by my colleagues in the Minnesota House DFL this year. Being able to help lead House DFLers through this unprecedented and challenging time has taught me a lot about public service and how we can best address the challenges facing Minnesotans. Speaker Hortman has also selected me to support our candidates and outreach efforts on the campaign. I've quickly learned that we cannot be successful as candidates or as public servants without reaching out to Minnesotans across the state. That is the really special thing about the Minnesota House DFL Campaign. We have the opportunity to lift up voices and support people making a difference. Would you consider making a donation today to help us along in that goal? [**Make a Contribution**](https://act.myngp.com/el/h093xqc-_AV1r9F-yYhxGp90Rk9wdWMMAed0typU5cg=/6TwK1cOrTUkR2Nnnvv4WbXMhL4FA0-A6OtFoSd9-1KQ=?refcode=122021) This work is important, and we cannot do it without your support of time and resources to build up DFLers and organize for victory next fall. Your contribution today helps us as we develop plans for outreach in the coming year. We can build and be successful, we just need your help. Will you pitch in today? Thank you, Rep Kaohly Her Majority Whip Minnesota House of Representatives [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/h093xqc-_AV1r9F-yYhxGp90Rk9wdWMMAed0typU5cg=/6TwK1cOrTUkR2Nnnvv4WbXMhL4FA0-A6OtFoSd9-1KQ=?refcode=122021)

name: Team Ehasz
subject: Last survey of 2021!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39859736/321767879/-46617290?refcode=fl_em_su_20211220EOYsurvey_te_full_SLA_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTk5MDVkZi1iMDYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tyV3sr-2CsRTXMUHO0Px54-hHwk6S4zgQ3r0qhgDsNA=)
---
Team, With the end of 2021 rapidly approaching, we wanted to reach out one last time and ask you to share your thoughts and priorities with Ashley as we look ahead to the new year. This past year has certainly been a challenging one, especially as our country continues to grapple with the COVID-19 pandemic, and Republicans actively attack reproductive choice, voting rights, and our democracy as we know it. Despite this, Democrats achieved millions of vaccines in arms, provided financial assistance through the American Rescue Plan, and passed the largest infrastructure investment in decades. If we can expand our House and Senate majorities next year by winning races like this one, we can achieve even more: affordable healthcare, stronger voting rights, a higher minimum wage, and bold action on climate change. Peter,

Yesterday on Fox News, Senator Joe Manchin said that he will not be supporting the Build Back Better legislation that is currently pending in the US Senate.

This is what happens with a government that’s full of career politicians who have lost sight of the needs of the people they represent. Our citizens need to have faith that their government is working for them. Voters want candidates focused on results, not just more empty rhetoric.

**Washington looks like a real mess to the average voter right now with politicians like Ron Johnson spewing conspiracy theories and trying to destroy our democracy.**

That’s what the Build Back Better framework was attempting to do, and if the Senate is not going to pass BBB, those problems must still be addressed.

This is why Democrats must expand their majority in the United States Senate to ensure that no one Senator can hold up an entire agenda, and that starts right here in Wisconsin. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = We must not stop fighting, Alex Lasry ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. Alex Lasry has a fresh perspective and record of actually getting things done. We can beat Ron Johnson by building a grassroots coalition, but it will take all of us. Will you pitch in any amount to help us keep the Senate Majority and defeat Ron Johnson? = Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin Stay connected with Alex's campaign to defeat Ron Johnson: Lasry for Wisconsin P.O. Box 511549 Milwaukee, WI 53203 United States It's going to take everyone on this team to win this election, but if you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . If you'd like to stay on our list but receive fewer emails, fill out **.

body:
It’s almost the end of the year, which means there are just a few days left to make your tax deductible campaign contribution for this year.

| | Dear Peter, It’s almost the end of the year, which means there are just a few days left to make your tax deductible campaign contribution for this year. name: Salud Carbajal
subject: Protecting abortion rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/7ra4v-6i_ibN8h5cZIMIXM482UOjjplLScUcHEYWUXQ=/RyY_bjs4nXxJBsRZ0IZ4ByOsuGuJqOEsirHwKuLjs6U=)
As unbelievable as it may seem, the Supreme Court appears to be poised to overturn Roe v. Wade nearly five decades after it became the law of the land.
As a member of the Pro-Choice Caucus, I have always fought for and will continue to fight for women's rights to reproductive freedom and safe, legal access to abortion. Now it's time to tell the Senate to do the same. [**_Please click here to stand with me._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/7ra4v-6i_ibN8h5cZIMIXM482UOjjplLScUcHEYWUXQ=/RyY_bjs4nXxJBsRZ0IZ4ByOsuGuJqOEsirHwKuLjs6U=)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/7ra4v-6i_ibN8h5cZIMIXM482UOjjplLScUcHEYWUXQ=/RyY_bjs4nXxJBsRZ0IZ4ByOsuGuJqOEsirHwKuLjs6U=)
Stripping access to abortions will not stop them, it will only make them life-threatening when performed outside of a doctor's care. There is no question, reproductive rights must be protected and widely available to all.
[**_Please click here to add your name today and tell the Senate it 's time for action._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/7ra4v-6i_ibN8h5cZIMIXM482UOjjplLScUcHEYWUXQ=/RyY_bjs4nXxJBsRZ0IZ4ByOsuGuJqOEsirHwKuLjs6U=)
There is just too much at stake to let Roe v. Wade be overturned. We must stand together against these unconstitutional abortion bans so that every woman can make her own health care decisions.
Thank you for your support.
Sincerely,
Salud Carbajal

Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
---

P.O. Box 1290
Santa Barbara CA 93102 United States

name: Barrier To Entry PAC
subject: ✨ NEW ENDORSEMENT ALERT: Meet Amy Vilela
body:
Amy is changing the game in Las Vegas

| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39860476/321770656/1591037614?refcode=211220_FR_amyvilelaspotlight

_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI3MTgwZDIxLWIyNjEtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pELnrsfwQs7ZOKh4eOuup__DvlcmZwNbo1M2uSpLAdA=)
---
Peter, We are proud to announce our official endorsement of **Amy Vilela for Congress in Nevada’s 1st District!**

Amy knows firsthand the challenges many families face. She was born into poverty, became a single mother of bi-racical children, survived off food stamps, and was the first in her family to graduate from college while working multiple day jobs.

You may have heard the story of Amy’s daughter, Shalynne, who died at the hands of our nation’s profit-driven healthcare system after she was denied care because she couldn’t provide adequate proof of insurance at a local emergency room. Her daughter’s tragic death was a product of a broken system. Her story is all too relatable for low-income families struggling with medical bills. Live saving treatment should not be a privilege.

**Since then, Amy has given everything she has to the political revolution.**

Between engaging progressive women to run for office and helping Sanders’ 2020 Nevada Caucus victory, she’s proven her dedication to the cause. She continues to help organize her community, made up of working class and immigrant people. Amy is ready to take on an established Democrat because she knows her party deserves better.

Her platform is built of progressive solutions -- both in Las Vegas and across the country. She will fight to stop climate change, for immigrant solutions, better education, stronger jobs and wages while improving the economy. She fights on her belief that housing is a human right, that our justice system is broken and needs to be reformed, and that healthcare should not be driven by profit. She believes in science and that this pandemic is affecting low-income communities and people or color the most.

We need leaders like Amy, who believe that solutions in our country need to evolve and grow in order to help everyone. Her campaign needs our help and momentum to create this change.

Barrier To Entry is excited to help fuel this grassroots campaign. We believe in supporting candidates that have a chance to win and Amy is no exception. **[Would you support Amy’s campaign and donate to help this progressive movement grow in Nevada’s 1st Congressional District?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39860481/321770664/1591037614?refcode=211220_FR_amyvilelaspotlight

_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI3MTgwZDIxLWIyNjEtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pELnrsfwQs7ZOKh4eOuup__DvlcmZwNbo1M2uSpLAdA=)** **______[DONATE TO AMY →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39860483/321770668/1591037614?refcode=211220_FR_amyvilelaspotlight

_B1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI3MTgwZDIxLWIyNjEtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=pELnrsfwQs7ZOKh4eOuup__DvlcmZwNbo1M2uSpLAdA=)** Thank you for supporting the working class, **_Barrier To Entry PAC_**
**BARRIER TO ENTRY PAC supports candidates and campaign staff from working class backgrounds as they carve their paths in the Democratic political space. We provide direct cash assistance for essential items like phones, cars, laptops, and living stipends -- which often times, these candidates and their campaigns don't have access to. We also serve as a resource for individual mentorship and training to ensure candidates and their staff feel supported and equipped to enter the political space.** _****Pitch in today to help provide necessary support and resources for working class candidates today! >>****_ **______[DONATE TO BTE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39860485/321770670/1300596418?refcode=211220_FR_amyvilelaspotlight

name: Stephanie Murphy
subject: An Important Decision
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
Stephanie Murphy for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39861474/321776241/-1065962055?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk3MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGFlZjk3My1iNjYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xcO_ZJfVJEIE_h-VU7C90PKZuSxSeK8wWrnCgz-R5lY=&emci=88f8ce75-ad61-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=18aef973-b661-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=20387125)

| | Hi Friends,

I wanted you to be among the first to know an important decision: I will not be seeking another term as your representative in Congress.

Over the last five years, it has been my incredible honor to represent you in our nation’s capital. Working in the halls of Congress as an immigrant, a refugee, an Asian woman, and as a proud American has been the great privilege of my life. My journey - from fleeing a violent, communist regime, to being rescued by the U.S. Navy, to working in national security at the Pentagon, and now as the first Vietnamese-American Congresswoman - is a journey that could have only happened here in America. For that, I will always be grateful to you and this nation.

But like any good journey, it is time for me to take another path. This was not an easy decision, but it was the right decision.

These last few years have been some of the most rewarding moments of my life, but also some of the most challenging. Public service is not without personal sacrifice. And as a mom of two young children, my time away from them has been hard. For them. For me. And for our family.

I am incredibly proud of what we accomplished together over these last five years. I am most proud that through it all - whether the Democrats were in charge or the Republicans, whether under President Trump or President Biden - I was consistently named one of the most bipartisan and effective Members of Congress. Because from day one, I have always put people over politics.

On a personal note, thank you for the faith you have placed in me these last three terms. Whether you voted for me, donated money, knocked on doors, made phone calls, put up yard signs, or attended one of our numerous public events over the years, I will be forever grateful for your support. From the bottom of my heart, thank you. I will never forget the gracious, steadfast support you gave to my campaign, my family and me.

Several years ago, I departed public service by leaving the Pentagon and moving to Central Florida to start my family. I knew then I wasn’t done with public service, just as I know now I am not done with public service. But my time in the U.S. House of Representatives will come to an end with the completion of this term.

Now I still have a job to do and will work just as hard this next year as I have the last five. And rest assured, after I leave office, I will continue to find ways that I can serve this great nation that has given so much to my family and me.

Thank you again for everything. May God bless our troops, our veterans, and the United States of America.

Respectfully,
Stephanie Murphy P.S. I am so proud of the work we have done together over the last five years, having passed more than 55 measures into law. Because you played such a pivotal part, I wanted to share just some of our accomplishments, including, but not limited to:
* **Repealed the Dickey Amendment.** I announced my candidacy two weeks after the Pulse shooting. Since then, I not only led the successful fight to repeal the Dickey Amendment, but I secured millions in federal gun violence research for the first time in decades.

* **Secured critical federal dollars for Florida’s schools.** We successfully secured millions to support Florida public schools and universities who took in new students from Puerto Rico and the U.S. Virgin Islands following Hurricane Maria.

* **Authored and expanded the ERTC to save jobs during the pandemic.** As a member of the powerful Ways & Means Committee, I authored and successfully expanded the Employee Retention Tax Credit during the COVID-19 pandemic to reduce layoffs and put people back to work. Now, I am currently leading an effort to reinstate this critical, job-saving tax credit.

* **Secured Historic Investments in Florida’s Infrastructure.** I stood up to my own party to pass a historic bipartisan investment in our nation’s infrastructure, helping to ease traffic congestion, combat climate change, improve water quality, and create good-paying jobs.

* **Secured Investments to Protect Florida’s Environment, Waterways, and Marine Life.** I spearheaded bipartisan efforts to fund research on harmful algal blooms, preserve and restore the Little Wekiva River, and safeguard marine mammals like manatees. I also secured $3.3 million with Republican Congressman John Rutherford to count the red snapper population in the South Atlantic, hopefully leading to a longer recreational fishing season.

* **Helped Ensure a Local Hero was Properly Honored.** I worked with Republican Congressman Michael Waltz to pass legislation that led to President Biden posthumously awarding Sergeant First Class Alwyn Cashe the Medal of Honor - our nation’s highest honor for military service. I also passed a law naming an Oviedo post office in honor of this American hero.

* **Passed Several Measures to Support Servicemembers & Veterans.** While serving two terms on the House Armed Services Committee, I passed historic reforms to the Transition Assistance Program to help the nearly 250,000 servicemembers who leave the military each year better transition to civilian life and provide for their families. I passed a measure to help disabled military veterans transition to the civilian workforce and passed another measure to help veteran and women entrepreneurs start and grow their small businesses. I also helped secure funds for UCF’s RESTORES Clinic to develop its own virtual reality software to treat active-duty servicemembers and military veterans with post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD).

* **Passed Historic Rules Changes to the House of Representatives.** As a member of the Problem Solvers Caucus, I led the effort to pass historic changes to House rules designed to make it easier for bipartisan bills to get a vote.

* **Delivered for Central Florida.** My office and I held numerous public events and town halls every term - even holding virtual events during the COVID-19 pandemic - and helped thousands of constituents recover money they were owed by the federal government -- more than $6.3 million to date.

* **Helped Improve Capitalism and Defend Democracy.** Throughout my term, I worked to protect and improve the two great pillars of our nation: capitalism and democracy. I passed measures to improve access to capital for small business owners and pushed back against attempts from some within my own party to advocate for socialism. At the same time, I cosponsored legislation to strengthen voting rights and strongly condemned far-right attempts to dismantle our democracy, proudly serving on the January 6th Select Committee to protect and preserve our great democracy.

* * *

Friend, I'm reaching out personally because I have some very big news to share:
Even after Marco Rubio launched deceitful attack ads against me, **polling shows us neck and neck in this critical Senate race!**

**But this isn't going to be easy:** The GOP has already raised more than $85 MILLION to defeat Democrats like me, and they're preparing to bombard us with nonstop attack ads from now until Election Day.

name: Celine Ryan Ciccio
subject: Hold universities accountable
body:
Campus Correspondents write stories that reverberate across America. They hold colleges and universities accountable.
|
---
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59065195:6v8X2AEN-:m:1:3298722022:D2252D8F75E5601BFEBEEE4D43A01E99:r) Dear Peter, Do you want to help conservative college students take a stand against the left? [**If so, please support the Leadership Institute 's Campus Reform.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59065195:6v8X2AEN-:m:1:3298722022:D2252D8F75E5601BFEBEEE4D43A01E99:r) LI's Campus Reform features a team of **more than 180 brave student Campus Correspondents**. These dedicated conservative student journalists conduct investigative research, write articles, and appear on national television. Campus Correspondents expose the leftist indoctrination, bias, and abuse they often witness firsthand in the classroom or on campus. [**Fight leftist abuses**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59065195:6v8X2AEN-:m:1:3298722022:D2252D8F75E5601BFEBEEE4D43A01E99:r) **[Your support today will help:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59065195:6v8X2AEN-:m:1:3298722022:D2252D8F75E5601BFEBEEE4D43A01E99:r)**
* Hire and train more Campus Correspondents
* Expose more incidents of leftist bias, abuse, and indoctrination
* Hold universities accountable for the leftist nonsense they promote
* Reverse unfair policies, fire abusive professors and administrators, and **score more victories for conservatives**

So much of today's radical leftism starts on college campuses. If not exposed, these leftist abuses go unchecked, and grow ever worse. **If you and I don 't act now to hold colleges and universities accountable, an entire generation of students will graduate hating America.** [**If you want to take a stand against the left and help conservative college students in the process, please support the Leadership Institute 's Campus Reform. name: Mike Gibbons
subject: Politicians are reckless with your money
body:
Basic economics is lost on the Left. They do not realize that their out-of-control spending is the reason inflation is the highest it has been in nearly 40 years!
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IuTG6N7H_EsyTxf8y9zJ8gdH-pFPdfrz97ssJ8crhOqpMgp64TktgyhEU4fe_SricDSOYn2hzSknp00ZM00j0wyCciD8cCUOeSNm9XMm2h3TVHFZ5i538fwt_ZbJdvFIiaceejSpt10Xt7YlA07fOtmQRV5KJAXbTZ7XV6d67Nx9HmF6iN-QNg==&c=ui6eCb-dAJUy-QxmHDi6L22gtdFSwjMBaucr_TtJVFLnfrozIPZ6EA==&ch=8Pjh3GtWUyIOLuhZV_tEazpP7DZPjiKiFwKApHoJj22BdK_cA7u_ug==)
---
| Peter,

Basic economics is lost on the Left.
They do not realize that their out-of-control spending is the reason inflation is the highest it has been in nearly 40 years!
Inflation is a huge financial burden and a hidden tax on all Americans. It's not a "high-class problem" like the Biden administration claimed.
Inflation is hurting hard-working families across Ohio and the country.
We need new people in Washington who actually understand the economy. We have to get our fiscal house in order. It's why I'm running for Senate.
[Peter](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IuTG6N7H_EsyTxf8y9zJ8gdH-pFPdfrz97ssJ8crhOqpMgp64TktgyhEU4fe_SricDSOYn2hzSknp00ZM00j0wyCciD8cCUOeSNm9XMm2h3TVHFZ5i538fwt_ZbJdvFIiaceejSpt10Xt7YlA07fOtmQRV5KJAXbTZ7XV6d67Nx9HmF6iN-QNg==&c=ui6eCb-dAJUy-QxmHDi6L22gtdFSwjMBaucr_TtJVFLnfrozIPZ6EA==&ch=8Pjh3GtWUyIOLuhZV_tEazpP7DZPjiKiFwKApHoJj22BdK_cA7u_ug==)[, will you generously contribute $20.22, $50. $100, or any amount today to help me put an end to the spending in Congress?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IuTG6N7H_EsyTxf8y9zJ8gdH-pFPdfrz97ssJ8crhOqpMgp64TktgyhEU4fe_SricDSOYn2hzSknp00ZM00j0wyCciD8cCUOeSNm9XMm2h3TVHFZ5i538fwt_ZbJdvFIiaceejSpt10Xt7YlA07fOtmQRV5KJAXbTZ7XV6d67Nx9HmF6iN-QNg==&c=ui6eCb-dAJUy-QxmHDi6L22gtdFSwjMBaucr_TtJVFLnfrozIPZ6EA==&ch=8Pjh3GtWUyIOLuhZV_tEazpP7DZPjiKiFwKApHoJj22BdK_cA7u_ug==)

Peter, I'm not a politician. I am a businessman like President Trump.
I'm not going to Washington to rub elbows with the political elites. I'm going to fight Pelosi, Schumer, Biden and all the other career politicians who traded in their moral compass for wealth many years ago.
You and I can no longer afford to let politicians recklessly spend TRILLIONS of dollars in taxpayers' money. We have to take the Senate back from the Left in 2022 and stop the spending.
I'm counting on you, Peter, to help me take back the Senate. Please click below to donate today.

clean_body: Basic economics is lost on the Left. They do not realize that their out-of-control spending is the reason inflation is the highest it has been in nearly 40 years! | | | | | | == | Peter, Basic economics is lost on the Left. They do not realize that their out-of-control spending is the reason inflation is the highest it has been in nearly 40 years! Inflation is a huge financial burden and a hidden tax on all Americans. It's not a "high-class problem" like the Biden administration claimed. Inflation is hurting hard-working families across Ohio and the country. We need new people in Washington who actually understand the economy. We have to get our fiscal house in order. It's why I'm running for Senate. == Peter, I'm not a politician. I am a businessman like President Trump. I'm not going to Washington to rub elbows with the political elites. I'm going to fight Pelosi, Schumer, Biden and all the other career politicians who traded in their moral compass for wealth many years ago. You and I can no longer afford to let politicians recklessly spend TRILLIONS of dollars in taxpayers' money. We have to take the Senate back from the Left in 2022 and stop the spending. I'm counting on you, Peter, to help me take back the Senate. Please click below to donate today. | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | They Left is spending MILLIONS of dollars in Ohio to flip this seat. Friends — we are emailing for $4. Yes you read that right, just $4. It may not seem like a lot, but when 1,000 or 2,000 or even more people chip in $4 it helps give us the resources to put up a strong fight in the 4 races that we absolutely need to win next year to defend the Senate. All of these Senators are in tough fights to maintain their seats — and losing just ONE will cost Democrats Senate control. So you can see how this all adds up and how high the stakes are for our Senate majority and the country, which is why we have to ask: [_**If you are able, will you chip in just $4 to support candidates like these and help power our grassroots work of Defend the Senate? subject: Who can win?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR
body:
The stakes have never been higher in Minnesota | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/90234c91a0ca/who-can-win?e=33b11688c1)
---
| | [ ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=4c1377a4fc&e=33b11688c1)
---
| | Peter,

If we don't win, Minnesota will be lost for a generation. We've seen what the disastrous policies of Tim Walz have wrought: locked down businesses, uncontrollable crime, politicized classrooms, and a diminished future for our kids and grandkids. Over the past 9 months, we've proven: a Scott Jensen campaign can win.

Poll after poll shows our campaign with the highest favorable numbers - and we've seen incredible numbers at our rallies and campaign events. People are FIRED UP to take back our state. As the year winds down, we need YOU to give and help continue this momentum:
* [give $10 to help us fund a phone-a-thon](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=ac836c6216&e=33b11688c1)
* [give $25 to sponsor a statewide door knocking effort](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=c0635eb7b5&e=33b11688c1)
* [give $50 to help us do voter contact in MINNEAPOLIS & get **new** voters](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=0de4cf4c06&e=33b11688c1)
* [give $100 or more to help us do a targeted direct mail campaign](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=eb537db6a0&e=33b11688c1)
* [give $250 or more to help us open FIELD OFFICES across the state](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=6d32306c6d&e=33b11688c1)

We can win if we are unified going into the new year! Conservative principles can once again rule the day in Minnesota. Instead of the chaos and confusion caused by the last two decades of far-left politics, we can attain SAFE STREETS, SECURE ELECTIONS, SCHOOLS FOCUSED ON STUDENTS, and a return to SCIENCE (_NOT_ Political Science). **Click the image below if you want to see a better Minnesota!**
---
| [ ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=9bd8853f70&e=33b11688c1)
---
| I’ve grown up here, I’ve seen the challenges, I’ve stood strong because that’s what Minnesotans do. We will not be smothered by a culture war or partisan politics any longer. We want to move into the future with a pioneering spirit guided by courage and seeking greatness. Yes – We have our wounds, we have calloused hands, and hard-fought scars – but as we heal from the policies of the past, we must also take back the reins of who we are and lead: lead the nation in education, in good jobs, in safety, and in human dignity and personal freedom. **Are you ready?**
---
| [Give $17](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=95cc446b13&e=33b11688c1 "Give $17")
---
| [Give $27](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=615f2d9545&e=33b11688c1 "Give $27")
---
| [Give $37](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=5a166273ab&e=33b11688c1 "Give $37")
---
| [Give MORE!](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=d43d81afba&e=33b11688c1 "Give MORE!")
---
| Our great State has suffered under unilateral control, partisan bickering, and political brinksmanship by the professional politicians. Given our history and resources, I truly believe Minnesota can become the beacon it once was and lead the country in recovery and healing. We need a new vision, a new prescription. That is why I am running for Governor. Let's unify and win in November!

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor - Minnesota
---
| [ ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=0e20bb31d9&e=33b11688c1)
---

Can you pitch in and make a contribution today?**_ [HELP US GET TO OUR GOAL](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39864996/321781088/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDA3ZDU1My1iYTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5uUEkNsNIkpXGJPeUf4uRWBC2kwzYgW0Lujcu8qppjw=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39864997/321781089/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDA3ZDU1My1iYTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5uUEkNsNIkpXGJPeUf4uRWBC2kwzYgW0Lujcu8qppjw=) [ON-CLICK IMMEDIATE $29 DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39864998/321781090/1277889215?express_lane=true&amount=29&refcode=express_lane_29&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDA3ZDU1My1iYTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5uUEkNsNIkpXGJPeUf4uRWBC2kwzYgW0Lujcu8qppjw=) Good morning, Friends. I can't help but comment on members of Congress and their recent positions on important issues – issues that affect everyone in our nation. I'm disappointed to consistently learn of what appears to be a conflict of interest in governing, and it boils down to money. The influence of special interest groups, lobbyists, corporate PACS, and wealthy donors on American politics is too great. Congressional rules should not be more lenient than the executive branch which is reviewed for potential conflicts of interest, subjecting them to a requirement to divest, recuse or seek a waiver. The corruption isn't limited to a specific party either. Money influences Republicans and Democrats incumbents alike, and money gets them reelected. Even if legally acquired, politicians' financial benefit hinders their ability to do their jobs effectively. The more outside money politicians take, the less well they represent their constituents. The best leaders in Congress will follow their districts, not their donors. When you look at how our members of Congress vote, ask yourself — Did it benefit us in the district? Did they compromise their principles and not vote in the best interest of their constituents? Did they do it to get reelected? Too often what’s best for the people is thwarted for positions that benefit wealthy people’s wallets. We need to elect candidates that dare to do what is right and stand on principle regardless of how it will affect their campaign finances. **Campaign finance reform is overdue and much needed.** Establishing a winning campaign requires a lot of resources, but at the expense of what? Our campaign prides itself on being funded 100% by individual donors, like you, and fundraising is going well. I grew up in a working-class rural household with six children, so I know the value of a dollar, and nothing is going to waste. Nobody has bought my vote or influenced my political positions with a check. If asking for money is the quality of a good politician, I’m no politician. But I know where I stand, and I know the source of our donations. I believe in a democracy, not a society ruled or controlled by people of great wealth. If you agree with me, we are 10 days from our FEC fundraising deadline, and to meet our goal, we need dozens of small donors to step up and pitch in. Can you contribute today to help us build the momentum and people-power we need to defeat corporate PAC influence in Congress? Any amount you can give will help our grassroots effort in unseating an incumbent who isn’t representing the hardworking people of Northern Michigan and the Upper Peninsula. Jack Bergman is not answering to the people. – Dr. Bob Lorinser [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39865000/321781091/1277889215?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDA3ZDU1My1iYTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5uUEkNsNIkpXGJPeUf4uRWBC2kwzYgW0Lujcu8qppjw=) _**The Dr. Bob Lorinser for Congress campaign is 100% funded by individual donors. name: Great America Update
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6690%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=dye0v%2bExV8VjohTkNHlONw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68008%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2feOctSYJzMhs7YlW8TanA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68009%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=i7IIiedo4%2bJMO9TyVDiaCw&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68000%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9HDBJUNaVbSA0v1P73ZzkQ&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Donna Imam
subject: Working Americans need representation
body:
For the first time in decades, Austin has a huge opportunity. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39865902/321782217/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjc4OWExZS1iYjYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MR2QLzLSVpdg9eq4UaNjAEUR7d9oflKyQ6PZfRZ8_as=)
Friend,

**Yesterday, Senator Joe Manchin declared he'd vote "no" on Build Back Better.** First, prescription drug price negotiation was removed from the bill, then it was 2-year tuition free community college, and now, the bill is completely off the table for the rest of the year.

**The child tax credit expired this month, which means over 35 million working families will experience financial hardship. Many of them will experience food insecurity and child hunger.**

It's imperative that we send Democrats to Congress who champion solutions for working Americans and deliver without any excuses or finger pointing. For the first time in decades, Austin has the opportunity to elect Democratic leadership that can champion the needs of working families and advance technologies that will deliver solutions for the next generation.

We need leadership to represent the diverse community that Austin has become. I'm running for Congress in Texas' new Democratic-leaning 37th District because we can't afford to send someone to DC who doesn't fight for everyday Americans. The stakes are too high.

**[Will you chip in an urgent $50, $25, or even just $5 to our grassroots campaign? We have a few weeks left to fill the gap on our end-of-year fundraising goal. name: Freedom Caucus
subject: RINO vs Conservative Showdown
disclaimer_text:
Paid for by
House Freedom Fund
body:
Fellow Conservative:

There are two types of Republicans in Congress -
those who will stand up to their own party's leaders to advance
conservative policies, and those who won't. It's that simple.

And with very few exceptions, the Republicans who
will stand up to the establishment and actually fight for our
principles are members of the House Freedom Caucus. You see,
these conservatives know they have to work arm-in-arm with other
like-minded lawmakers to overcome opposition from established
elites in both parties.

This is why freedom-loving Americans in every state
should support Christian Collins for Congress in the 8th District
of Texas.

Christian CollinsCandidate for Congress, TX-08

Christian is a strong conservative leader who has
publicly pledged to join the House Freedom Caucus if he's elected
to replace retiring Congressman Kevin Brady (R-TX).

However, Christian is running against another
Republican in the March 1 primary election, Marcus Luttrell, who
has said he will NOT join the Freedom Caucus.

It's why pro-establishment Republicans have endorsed
Luttrell, not Collins. They want more yes-men, not principled
leaders in the Freedom Caucus who will buck them when they side
with the Democrats to mortgage our future.

Please join us in supporting Christian Collins with
a generous contribution to his grassroots campaign.

HFF will pay all processing fees so Christian can
spend 100% of your donation on voter contact.

Our polling shows Collins surging in this race and
our goal is to get him into a head-to-head runoff with Luttrell
next year. We're confident Collins can win that match-up, but he
needs your help today.

Please support Christian Collins now.

This race is very important because we're not going
to build a conservative Congress and stop the Left's assault on
our liberties with more pro-establishment Republicans. We need
fighters with guts to stand up for our values - even if that
means rejecting the liberal policies promoted by their own party
leaders.

If we help elect Christian Collins, he will do just
that. He will join Jim Jordan (R-OH), Lauren Boebert (R-CO),
Scott Perry (R-PA), Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-GA), and others in
the fight for our freedoms.

This is our chance to make a real difference so
please take immediate action to support this outstanding
candidate.

Thank you for considering this important request and
for doing so much to help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,

Ray Yonkura
Executive Director
House Freedom Fund

FREEDOM CAUCUS
CANDIDATES

END OF THE MONTH
COUNTDOWN

DONATE

"The House Freedom Fund helps grassroots candidates
get the financial support they need to compete with establishment
candidates." - Congressman Jim Jordan (R-OH)

House Freedom Fund300 Independence Ave SEWashington,
DC 20003

House Freedom Fund (HFF) is a multi-candidate
political action committee that helps elect conservative
candidates to the U.S. House of Representatives. HFF only
supports candidates who are dedicated to open, accountable, and
limited government, and who support policies that promote
liberty, safety, and prosperity for all Americans.Paid for by
House Freedom Fund. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.
Contributions to House Freedom Fund are not deductible as
charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or
foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not
permitted. Federal law requires House Freedom Fund to report the
name, mailing address, occupation, and employer for each
individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a
calendar year.

PAID FOR BY HOUSE FREEDOM FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY
ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. HOUSEFREEDOMFUND.COM

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Please renew your support today
body:
Anti-Americanism has long been evident in higher education.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8105iu8k8p37fnlrnf0rcldobse4qh5g7knrfu0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1h64ob3c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6sdk6pqr4d1lmpom8p9ncko66d366upr9cjjcopr3dpnmpgbbcrhm5h36odkmsrt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m8o6cd30mdgmfchmcor61cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zevnmop180qeen1gglo1ui5ttllbfbgpu8s6jhgg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1h64ob3c3h2bs)
---
| |
Dear fellow American, Anti-Americanism has long been evident in higher education. But recently, it has spread from college campuses to other areas of American life. Today it asserts itself in many forms—including critical race theory—in our government, in our K-12 schools, in our corporations, in the media, in sports, and even in our military. The recent election in Virginia brought the corruption of American K-12 education, in particular, to the forefront of our national conversation. The breakdown (especially among younger Americans) of informed patriotism—without which self-government is impossible—is not something we can allow to continue. While there is reason to remain hopeful, there is much work to be done to reverse the current trends in the months and years ahead. **Education is where this attack on America began—and it is the battlefield on which we must engage the Left in defense of liberty and limited constitutional government.** Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. We are now determined, with the help of supporters like you, who agree with Hillsdale’s mission, to redouble our efforts at this crucial time for our nation—no matter the cost. That’s why we have set a goal to raise $5.5 million online by December 31 to expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** in 2022. This vital project will give informed patriots across the country the effective ability to defend liberty through education. And we need your help. The**** project has three key objectives:
1. _**Expand**_ the circulation of _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans.

2. _**Increase**_ the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in our free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution,” “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope,” and our newest course, “American Citizenship and Its Decline” with Victor Davis Hanson.

3. _**Launch**_**** additional Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide and **provide, free of charge,** our American classical K-12 curriculum (including the new **Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum**) to thousands more American teachers and homeschoolers.

And your generous support is critical to our success. Here’s why... As I’ve written to you in the past, Hillsdale College**conducts its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** —as it does all of its work—while refusing to accept one penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. So, to meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we will need thousands of gifts between **$25** and **$100**. This is the range in which most supporters give. We will also need a significant number of **$500** to **$1,000** donations. But contributions of any size are appreciated. Since we only have days remaining in 2021 to fund this project for the coming year, we urgently need your help. **You can safely and securely renew your support using this link:[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/calendar-year-end-2021](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zumnuv7bejj0ffv1vu90p959916d1vvqj3sbmor8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1h64ob3c3h2bs)** As the forces of anti-Americanism redouble their own efforts to undermine informed patriotism in our schools and our culture, and to subvert constitutionalism in our government, we must engage them ever more aggressively—including on the central battlefield of education. That’s why I hope you’ll make your most generous year-end gift before our December 31 deadline. Every dollar you can give will get us closer to our $5.5 million online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** in 2022. Thank you for your generosity. I hope you’ll continue to stand with us by making a tax-deductible, year-end gift before December 31. Together, we will work to preserve freedom for future generations of Americans. Please renew your support today. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Friend, I have a personal update for you about our fundraising this quarter, and I’ll be blunt: we’re behind on our goals because of the winter slump. It’s understandable! People are shopping and spending more time with their families and less time reading messages like this one. These slumps hit us hard, though, because grassroots contributions through emails, like this one, power our work to reelect Michael. We don’t take a cent from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists, so when folks head offline, we see a downturn. Mitch McConnell’s warchest will only continue to grow and Michael’s wealthy and self-funding opponents aren’t slowing down, so it’s critical that we turn things around before the election heats up in January. **If everyone reading this email chips in just $5, we’ll make up ground and head into the new year right on track. People are shopping and spending more time with their families and less time reading messages like this one. These slumps hit us hard, though, because grassroots contributions through emails, like this one, power our work to reelect Michael. We don’t take a cent from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists, so when folks head offline, we see a downturn. Mitch McConnell’s warchest will only continue to grow and Michael’s wealthy and self-funding opponents aren’t slowing down, so it’s critical that we turn things around before the election heats up in January. name: Peter Franchot
subject: Housing Justice
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
If you feel that housing has become far too expensive for the average Marylander, then you’re not alone. As Governor, I’ll take a bold approach to housing justice to ensure that Marylanders can better capture the value of the money that they spend on housing. As part of my plan, I will introduce a program that offers the State of Maryland as a guarantor of mortgages in target communities, with a goal of creating parity across race and zip code for new home ownership rates by 2030.
For renters, I’ll pilot an eviction diversion program in which the state makes direct payments to landlords for up to 3 months for renters who demonstrate a temporary and significant loss of income. This is a compassionate approach that also saves the state money in the long term, by helping drive down housing insecurity and the increased dependence on social services it tends to generate.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/zk8ldV759kqHsnPFAORCZA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/zk8ldV759kqHsnPFAORCZA2]Housing justice is economic justice -- and the hard truth is that far too many of our communities have been shut out of building generational wealth through persistent institutional bias and racism. As Governor, I’ll take important steps to level the playing field for housing. I’ll make addressing the ongoing effects of redlining a priority for my administration, and I’ll seek to eliminate predatory loans in the housing industry, which disproportionately affects Black homeowners.
I’m also going to tackle the scourge of home appraisal bias. According to a 2018 report by Brookings, homes in majority-Black neighborhoods are undervalued by an average of $48,000 -- which amounts to a shocking $156 billion in cumulative losses for Black families nationwide. As Governor, I’ll ensure equitable appraisal standards in all communities, so that Black families are assessed the true value of their home and other properties.
Whether you are a renter or a home-owner, a young student or a retiree, I’d like to hear from you directly about your experience with housing. If you have a moment, will you take my quick Housing Justice survey? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/zk8ldV759kqHsnPFAORCZA2]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/franchot?refcode=em122021&amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/86c517ed-f15c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/b30b19b0-be61-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzBiMTliMC1iZTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ODh_8H5X6NWFpyPDt1UozHcE7bUvWoFsJyzSQekU59w=&id=136194660 .
We're building a grassroots movement -- so make sure to forward this email to a friend!
Want to receive email updates from Team Franchot? Then click here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/MCeSEGOJC0GwhHyQim-AWg2] to sign up!

subject: Why I am asking for $3
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
Our campaign is being outraised by our opponent, and we need your help to pick up the pace. Our campaign is being outraised by our opponent, and we need your help to pick up the pace. |
---
Fellow American,

We were just reviewing a campaign update that our finance team sent over, and we wanted to personally follow up with you.

Our Democrat opponent in the Georgia Senate race is off to a record-breaking fundraising pace, and he already has $17 MILLION in his war chest.

**[We have to pick up the pace today, Fellow American. We cannot afford to fall behind.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=dd84a4152dde42a2b4841db088143190&_e=O8uehbgcfMDkh_jmIbvWuMeZ1gV6qmHBRI4ekAQMDTzzq8u4xEwUpavRt__HWA9GR7PI_0g2TWwAwEG2TjSqznn9wG_zRidvtBU1OY20Ud8C1BbLzHLXfoabRh8gEclHMkMVCUGRmN3oWfXUboBhjVKOeM8dGGYUepGpCmoHa3HqY_jj3BgUbK7F5B5wAYyVoA619T9VumCSOf3fna-CWRovjgLtjwBouFe58VoDQYGf1jRuygKxtp0Rkq5JiCqGUMVm3Pr4ovD2iO-DNvyRXc786zyJ0LprG5wdpqScPNYOASHPXJzB6MtwPbqbUCDLLLXbVwwfkozC4T2o91P_PMuL152CBV9w4p1lernKKAAtJBAP6TNiXxk4wSrXHWWso7yBnNrIzPAvM4Felz5I_FvpXEAOfJdCJZZjpIMLuljKuTwPYcIeenzheGdLQyGOnyxuU8WHmbYKrQGPS5JHxA%3D%3D)**

If 450 new grassroots supporters will chip in just $3 right now, it will give our conservative campaign the boost it needs to WIN!

[**CHIP IN $3 ->**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=dd84a4152dde42a2b4841db088143190&_e=O8uehbgcfMDkh_jmIbvWuMeZ1gV6qmHBRI4ekAQMDTzzq8u4xEwUpavRt__HWA9GR7PI_0g2TWwAwEG2TjSqznn9wG_zRidvtBU1OY20Ud8C1BbLzHLXfoabRh8gEclHMkMVCUGRmN3oWfXUboBhjVKOeM8dGGYUepGpCmoHa3HqY_jj3BgUbK7F5B5wAYyVoA619T9VumCSOf3fna-CWRovjgLtjwBouFe58VoDQYGn-AruMZ6NSXGkQIcMLS7UXUsDI-1ic2NKQng36kja-2x7-KzaZKA__OydFKkItk1Kfo7uy99QE8Sy7zLKzesfY9u4Ny_ppv9MdCAA3PtkB1AK2qrsFjnfXszkLpgoQIVIsy6XD_xatTgKDNB26Ub-T-vnX0hTIWdgUdS0PNyC7pomNUkpNP8Weeq_uGUurA586qiwV54iYjJuFeYoFJQ5ygTJl1XvhJujFwmeQ3JNwSJlp6WVjD7jV7ptE09fkwI%3D)
[**CHIP IN MORE ->**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=dd84a4152dde42a2b4841db088143190&_e=O8uehbgcfMDkh_jmIbvWuMeZ1gV6qmHBRI4ekAQMDTzzq8u4xEwUpavRt__HWA9GR7PI_0g2TWwAwEG2TjSqznn9wG_zRidvtBU1OY20Ud8C1BbLzHLXfoabRh8gEclHMkMVCUGRmN3oWfXUboBhjVKOeM8dGGYUepGpCmoHa3HqY_jj3BgUbK7F5B5wAYyVoA619T9VumCSOf3fna-CWRovjgLtjwBouFe58VoDQYGf1jRuygKxtp0Rkq5JiCqG6tb1pP4Qpl4F4X_evSc19xe3oGrPL_6Zw1U8MmldDgVA6_3dAbYq7uTuZMPqp0f5nC3-svSYjFr1Rpc9b9u2yz5UHrrDmptmoEUJOxH9RseIN8kCBGXcwpfl10kMATEPhAcGNQRHEQotNqGrfSbXrpb7TDz8jUgaixdNQSoZ27G7gw6O69ucIPy6yIWP6sjBnBeyEHgxK0VLHiNQfl0bSw%3D%3D)
I entered this Senate race because our country is going in the wrong direction.
* The costs of food, gasoline, and heating fuel are skyrocketing.
* We can't keep store shelves stocked heading into the holidays due to supply chain problems or lack of workers.

Our campaign is being outraised by our opponent, and we need your help to pick up the pace. | Fellow American, We were just reviewing a campaign update that our finance team sent over, and we wanted to personally follow up with you. Our Democrat opponent in the Georgia Senate race is off to a record-breaking fundraising pace, and he already has $17 MILLION in his war chest. If 450 new grassroots supporters will chip in just $3 right now, it will give our conservative campaign the boost it needs to WIN! I entered this Senate race because our country is going in the wrong direction. The costs of food, gasoline, and heating fuel are skyrocketing. We can't keep store shelves stocked heading into the holidays due to supply chain problems or lack of workers. Brazen criminals are on smash-and-grab crime sprees in cities across the country. And around the world, our friends don't trust us and our enemies don't fear us after President Biden abandoned Americans and our allies in Afghanistan in a hasty pull-out against military advice. We've got to get this country back on the right track. This has been an undoubtedly difficult year as we continue to deal with the COVID-19 pandemic, attacks on voting rights and reproductive choice, the high costs of healthcare, and so much more. name: Valerie Foushee
subject: representation matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/QkBemqOb4KPcf7HSJfmrVUNs8_8dijFAWQV4ZNr98YU=/h4d6-lYBBr9Qr7w9k_TiLU8bpCaRpFbUN-GKVQ79ZFI=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20211220-1-EM)
---
| Peter,

**Representation matters.** Young people must be able to see themselves in all walks of life -- it reinforces that they can achieve anything they set their minds to.

I believe representation matters greatly in the people who hold public office. Seeing people like me, a Black woman, in an elected role reinforces to Black and Brown children that they can also make a difference in their communities by serving the public.

[_**Will you support my effort to represent my community in Congress by contributing to my campaign today?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/QkBemqOb4KPcf7HSJfmrVUNs8_8dijFAWQV4ZNr98YU=/h4d6-lYBBr9Qr7w9k_TiLU8bpCaRpFbUN-GKVQ79ZFI=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20211220-1-EM)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/QkBemqOb4KPcf7HSJfmrVUNs8_8dijFAWQV4ZNr98YU=/h4d6-lYBBr9Qr7w9k_TiLU8bpCaRpFbUN-GKVQ79ZFI=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20211220-1-EM)
---
**Today, women of color constitute only 9.2% of Congress.** While the number may seem low, it's actually the highest proportion of women of color who have ever served in the House and Senate.

I'm so proud to see how much progress has been made in my lifetime -- I attended a segregated school until 6th grade. But there is plenty of work that still needs to be done to move our country forward.

In Congress, I will be a leader to reform our criminal justice system and tackle systemic racism. I also will add to the diversity of Congress, bringing a needed voice and perspective to Washington.

[_**If you share my belief in the importance of representation, I hope you 'll consider contributing to my campaign for Congress today.->**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/QkBemqOb4KPcf7HSJfmrVUNs8_8dijFAWQV4ZNr98YU=/h4d6-lYBBr9Qr7w9k_TiLU8bpCaRpFbUN-GKVQ79ZFI=?refcode=BLU-VFC-20211220-1-EM)

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Kamala Harris' Disasterous Border Policy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,
It has been almost a year since Joe Biden nominated Kamala Harris to be our
country's Border Czar, and in that very long period of time, she has refused to
travel to our southern border to experience first-hand the growing crisis we
have in our country. Nearly 2 million illegal immigrants have crossed into our
country in the last year, and each month that passes by, it seems as if a new
record is shattered. Just last month, 173,000 illegal immigrants crossed our
border, which is more than double the previous record! This nonsense has to
stop.

Our country is built upon a system of laws. You either follow the law, or you
break it. And right now, millions of illegal immigrants are breaking our
country's laws with zero consequence, who even have the potential to be awarded
$450,000 by Joe Biden and his radical allies in Congress.

The surge in illegal immigration across our southern border has also brought
a surge in opioid deaths across our country. Millions of tons of Fentanyl,
Methamphetamines, Marijuana, and other illicit drugs are flowing across our
border and destroying countless lives and families right here in our community.
The first step in combatting this crises is by fully funding our CBP agents at
our border and allowing them to do their jobs.

Securing our southern border and stopping illegal immigration and drug
trafficking will be a big priority of mine in Congress. If we don't act now,
there is no telling what additional damage will be done by the time Joe Biden
exits the White House.

Sincerely,
Wesley

endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

.

If we’re going to stop Democrats from nationalizing our elections, Friend, then we must defeat Warnock and take back the Senate. ng-election-security-email?utmsource=sgrc&utmmedium=email&utmcampaign =2021dec20hf Will you help us ng-election-security-email?utmsource=sgrc&utmmedium=email&utmcampaign =2021dec20hf win here? When I’m in the Senate, I’ll stand strong against these Democrat power grabs. I’ll fight to ensure voter ID laws are protected and strengthened. And I won’t stand for practices like ballot harvesting that make our elections less secure. Stopping Democrats from ending voter ID and crippling election security comes down to winning back the Senate... and winning back the Senate comes down to Georgia. I’m standing in the gap. ng-election-security-email?utmsource=sgrc&utmmedium=email&utmcampaign =2021dec20hf I hope you’ll stand with me here. ng-election-security-email?utmsource=sgrc&utmmedium=email&utmcampaign =2021dec20hf Gary Black ng-election-security-email?utmsource=sgrc&utmmedium=email&utmcampaign =2021dec20hf DONATE NOW » Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary: I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why. Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $17 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts. With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below. ng-election-security-email?utmsource=sgrc&utmmedium=email&utm_campaign =2021dec20hf DONATE NOW » We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, click here.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39872730/321792211/-2037180865?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzMxNzJlNC1jMjYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pKWYFUCOCQqr4nUyU9S0toP-LyjQeJeEPh6DByxlrd8=&emci=481fe54c-b061-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=a33172e4-c261-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12898431)

Friend,
Almost 50 years after the Supreme Court first recognized the constitutional right to abortion care, the fight for reproductive rights is more urgent than ever.
The Supreme Court's conservative majority is almost guaranteed to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ before 2022 is over.
[**We can't stop them, but _we can call on Congress to take action._ Join me in calling on the Senate to protect the right to abortion care by adding your name here >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39872732/321792213/324170042?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzMxNzJlNC1jMjYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pKWYFUCOCQqr4nUyU9S0toP-LyjQeJeEPh6DByxlrd8=&emci=481fe54c-b061-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=a33172e4-c261-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12898431)
As un unapologetically pro-choice elected official, as a Congressional candidate, and as the only woman in this race, I want to be clear: **I believe the government has no place in a person's intimate health care decisions.**
**As as your representative in Congress, I will fight like hell to ensure that _abortion care remains safe and legal._ **
[**Until then, can I count on you join me in raising our voices to protect the right to abortion care?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39872734/321792215/1297595518?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjcwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMzMxNzJlNC1jMjYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pKWYFUCOCQqr4nUyU9S0toP-LyjQeJeEPh6DByxlrd8=&emci=481fe54c-b061-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=a33172e4-c261-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12898431)

Kirsten

| Peter -
BREAKING NEWS: Joe Manchin on Build Back Better: "This is a no on this legislation."
America has dodged a serious bullet. Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi's socialist spending plan is dead.
This is what happens when we fight.
Thanks to patriots like you, we've been able to expose the truth about the dangerous policy packed into this bill. And because of your efforts and your willingness to commit resources to this fight, Americans will be spared from this socialist spending spree for now.
But we can't get complacent. We can't sit on our laurels.
Now is the time to double down to make sure Biden's Build Back Broke agenda is never revived. Now is the time to double down to make sure we take back the House from Nancy Pelosi next November.
The radical left can feel their socialist agenda slipping away, and they're going to do everything they can to hold on to power ahead of 2022.
I'm going into the New Year with a renewed commitment to expose the truth about these radical policies and fire Nancy Pelosi.
I hope you will join me in that fight.

subject: Swing and a miss
body:
Nov Jobs report falls short of expectations. | | |
---
| | [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=3022400152&e=ae0ea222da)
---
| Friend,

We are almost a year into Joe Biden’s presidency and our economy is in shambles, COVID-19 is still in our lives, and yet Abigail Spanberger and her Democrat Squad are insisting everything is okay.

But earlier this month the November Jobs report came out and once again we failed to meet expectations. America's top economists predicted an increase of 550,000 jobs, but that number was off by 340,000! We only added 210,000 jobs...
To fix our broken economy, we need to elect Republicans and bring back an **AMERICA FIRST ECONOMY.**
[**Help us SEND A MESSAGE by making a contribution of $34 to represent the 340,000 jobs that didn’t get added to our economy.**](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=a534a3f0a2&e=ae0ea222da)

Friend,
The past year has shown the true colors of the Democrats and their Washington, D.C. allies.
They will do _whatever_ it takes to further Biden’s socialist agenda. And Liz Cheney has shown that she would rather support Biden, Harris, and Pelosi than _**fight for the people.**_
---
_**That is why I am proud to stand with President Trump and endorse Harriet Hageman to serve as Wyoming’s next lone member of Congress.**_
---
We must stand up to “Republicans” who cave to the masses, and, in Liz Cheney’s case, join forces with Nancy Pelosi. Harriet understands the value of hard work, integrity, self-sufficiency, and honesty. Which is the type of person we need to FIGHT for your freedoms!

clean_body: | | | | And so should you. | Friend, The past year has shown the true colors of the Democrats and their Washington, D.C. allies. They will do whatever it takes to further Biden’s socialist agenda. And Liz Cheney has shown that she would rather support Biden, Harris, and Pelosi than fight for the people. That is why I am proud to stand with President Trump and endorse Harriet Hageman to serve as Wyoming’s next lone member of Congress. We must stand up to “Republicans” who cave to the masses, and, in Liz Cheney’s case, join forces with Nancy Pelosi. Harriet understands the value of hard work, integrity, self-sufficiency, and honesty. Which is the type of person we need to FIGHT for your freedoms! You know I am not afraid of the tough fights and neither is Harriet. I know that Harriet will fight for our entire Bill of Rights like she’s fought for Wyoming for over 20 years and Harriet understands that must have an America First foreign policy that makes our country safer and more secure. That’s why I’m proud to step up and support Harriet Hageman to be the next Congresswoman from Wyoming. Thank you, Rand Paul | | | |

name: Moms for Katie Porter
subject: We are losing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]Hi Peter,
Can I take a minute to tell you more about or friend and inspiration Congresswoman Katie Porter , Peter?
Katie is a force to be reckoned with. She’s a fearless advocate for working families, and one of our champions in the fight for paid family leave. You do know about her white board, right?
She’s also at serious risk of losing her House seat.
Here’s why: The GOP listed her as a top target in the midterm elections. They are determined to retake the House majority and in order to do so, they need to flip Katie’s seat.
Can you please rush a donation to support her re-election campaign today? We promised her that Moms for Katie Porter could raise her $10,000 by the end of this month and we are so close. We are counting on you to chip in to help us close the gap. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/momsforkatieporter?refcode=0920]
In 2018, Katie was the underdog and narrowly flipped her district blue. If she’s going to keep her seat next year, she’ll need supporters like you and organizations like us to power her campaign.
None of this work would be possible without you.
With gratitude,
Simona Grace
Founder and Executive Director
Moms in Office

body:
---

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: December 20, 2021
---
| Contact: Derek Dufresne press@erikabenfieldforcongress.com; 202-809-6013
---
| Erika Benfield Statement on Stephanie Murphy Not Seeking Re-Election
---
|
---
| Lake Mary, FL - Erika Benfield, candidate for Congress in Florida's Seventh Congressional District, made the following statement in response to the recent news that Stephanie Murphy will not be seeking another term in Congress.
---
| Erika Benfield stated:
"With Stephanie Murphy's announcement that she is not running for re-election, Florida's 7th Congressional District is now even more winnable. With the majority for Congress on the line, we need the strongest possible candidate to serve the people of this district. If we are going to stop the Biden/Pelosi-driven economic collapse, stop the overreaching government mandates, and make America great again, we need to nominate someone that can win this seat for the people of central Florida. I intend to win the nomination and be your champion in Washington. Let's flip this seat!"
---
| ###

name: Josh Riley
subject: No, Claudia Tenney, the Pope is not a communist
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress
body:
My Republican opponent, Claudia Tenney, needs to get her priorities in order.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39874649/321800688/-209395382?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20211220-1-EM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzkzNDI4MS1jYjYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VTbHOc_bqHYKtywiFsW-4A02xZxQlmRaoVcfLbPIfY4=)
---
| Peter,

My Republican opponent, Claudia Tenney, needs to get her priorities in order.

Instead of delivering for Upstate New York, she spends her time attacking public health experts, undermining confidence in vaccines, promoting conspiracy theories, and spewing partisan rhetoric. **She even attacked the Pope, calling him a _communist!_**

It’s time for a change, Peter - and I’m running to put these petty, partisan theatrics behind us.

[_**Will you join my efforts and donate $5 or more to our campaign today? body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e69f39be735f/one-week-in-5394659?e=fc83fb200d)

| |
---
| **Friend,**

**Almost 50 years later, 60+ million babies were killed, and FINALLY, [even the Washington Post is reporting what we've known from the beginning: it's not a blob of cells or a "choice", it's a BABY! ](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=9a583d9938&e=fc83fb200d)

Earlier this month the Supreme Court heard a very strong case challenging Roe's viability threshold. Now we pray and wait for the high court to rule.

But if Democrats had it their way, babies at all stages of development could be legally aborted. And let's never forget the pediatric neurologist Governor Ralph Northam's defense and explanation of abortion after birth.

It's barbaric and I need your help. **
---
| [Let's Fire Nancy Pelosi & Defeat Planned Parenthood Darling Jennifer Wexton](https://jeaninelawson.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a29f8c0771a617643b07ddf60&id=308c5ba4d3&e=fc83fb200d "Let's Fire Nancy Pelosi & Defeat Planned Parenthood Darling Jennifer Wexton")
---
| **As a Christian, mother of an adopted son, and aunt to a Down Syndrome niece, you can count on me to defend babies.

Jennifer Wexton has failed to stand up for the unborn, but I will. **
---
|

We deserve better than politicians who push for so-called ‘choice’ even when they know full well it’s a child. I will work tirelessly to promote a culture of life, oppose taxpayer-funded abortions, and work to repeal Roe.

But I need your help to stop Jennifer Wexton and the abortion agenda.**

We have some exciting news to share with you, Derek: **Chris is proud to have the endorsement of Pennsylvania lawmakers committed to fighting for working people including the following:**
* _Tony Amadio, Beaver County Commissioner_
* _State Rep. Jessica Benham_
* _Andy Bosh, Democratic State Committeemember_
* _State Rep. Dan Deasy_
* _Councilor Tom Duerr_
* _David J. Hickton, former U.S. Attorney_
* _State Rep. Emily Kinkead_
* _Joe Maurizi, Democratic State Committeemember_
* _Patrick Murphy, former Congressman_
* _Councilor Bob Palmosina_
* _Councilor Anita Prizio_
* _Councilor-elect Craig Romanovich, Green Tree_
* _Don Walko, Former State Representative & Allegheny County Common Pleas Judge_

We are proud to have the endorsements of local leaders who fight every day on behalf of Pennsylvania working families to improve our neighborhoods. As the list of people endorsing Chris continues to grow, we need to keep the momentum going strong. That means talking to more and more voters about his plans to take on corporate power, protect our democracy, and bring good-paying union jobs to Western PA. Our biggest deadline yet is coming up at the end of the year, and how much we raise by then will show the strength of this campaign to potential endorsers. Your support will help us raise the funds we need to win and lock in key endorsements. [**We’re ready to elect leadership that puts people over profits. name: Alek Skarlatos
subject: I have to ask you something
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alek For Oregon
body:
I am not expecting much from this email today as we’re only 4 days away from Christmas, however if you’re reading this... We wanted to reach out to you today once more before Christmas to check in and see if you have checked the price of gas lately. | [](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=fc206461d114478cb32c2e4a457d96df&_e=-O8-yMRrhVh7vg-0CubAT8AsV-8trO0WaqyBkBfDT0mB6yEyiysfnj7buMuz5HMXp7m0LG6IV68Q1-aUbDS4F3bZBPojXpjLdwLadIDGKriqjBIXdAUHAUTNf3_aObIc5ZdWyIZkFp3M04yM8sORfC2GurDbwyk5lqE-ZUoS2AljmCQZubi4Q6ODxmOZBlDaV8kXofBWjC-ig4cWoFXFg7Q32DV978oln7EjVnPdp7eAtBeU53UhluXCqtnotNa3uQKYqL1VgwnLpDbewp8LjKRmI1Jm2G-1T23OzOdxgAZSiw0sWgL2wWE2jQKOMcNRReXLQ3AAeusFloctPsSx7mDL5usiH8jj4R_BepovmNJTp8-8sbDejttoOPrTFYr-P8LJ0p6FqVTN_ftSURWRIRZexI37pUbdBQMt1uiu4oGbu5R5WQPscHNJ8c3zU3fN)
---
Peter,

We wanted to reach out to you today once more before Christmas to check in and see if you have checked the price of gas lately. Here in Oregon, we’re approaching $3.8/gallon while the national average is over $3.3/gallon.

Groceries are up. Gas is obviously up. The cost of furniture is now 10% higher than it was at this time last year.

**And we actually can point fingers at Democrats as they’re the ones who are trying to spend us into oblivion.**

I am not expecting much from this email today as we’re only 4 days away from Christmas, **[however if you’re reading this and are able to make a quick contribution to help me meet my end of year fundraising goal,](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=fc206461d114478cb32c2e4a457d96df&_e=-O8-yMRrhVh7vg-0CubAT8AsV-8trO0WaqyBkBfDT0mB6yEyiysfnj7buMuz5HMXp7m0LG6IV68Q1-aUbDS4F3bZBPojXpjLdwLadIDGKriqjBIXdAUHAUTNf3_aObIc5ZdWyIZkFp3M04yM8sORfC2GurDbwyk5lqE-ZUoS2AljmCQZubi4Q6ODxmOZBlDaV8kXofBWjC-ig4cWoFXFg7Q32DV978oln7EjVnPdp7fQ3SAcMBP8HE-_kwrMZDAuMq6fUgYv9in79V9v47DimqVkSgxEV7O0XOLn3YjlwssVJ2_whEuingsr3Tt_swEBX9OsZKP7RS5vzYfeCBEotFpi8349krX0Pf2SOHsSJu7-XkGGzzyvAny2QJQN-Onla_IEaLUHMaLqNoAKLg0D_3pksbMFt9CwsWoSfNSD84yiv2VVCAbapn5X_KhZMEmG)** **I’d sure be appreciative.**

**[I’m actually wondering if you could send in $3.30 or more today](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=fc206461d114478cb32c2e4a457d96df&_e=-O8-yMRrhVh7vg-0CubAT8AsV-8trO0WaqyBkBfDT0mB6yEyiysfnj7buMuz5HMXp7m0LG6IV68Q1-aUbDS4F3bZBPojXpjLdwLadIDGKriqjBIXdAUHAUTNf3_aObIc5ZdWyIZkFp3M04yM8sORfC2GurDbwyk5lqE-ZUoS2AljmCQZubi4Q6ODxmOZBlDaV8kXofBWjC-ig4cWoFXFg7Q32DV978oln7EjVnPdp7cU3nTzAfJVICEvvuTGmip-fSpepZEfnQ8VGQRYbeRc_EqhloA_zBvJDZSdqxPwXP-oejbSdRZ4hA4ZRIH1sNjFuoc2yCObz7cgpxqvNN6GF2M750NmpbJqHPXol8L6n4IFt2Gh-Zk5yIaWTDWPKJUXnaCPxYQfDszGdgySV_XgBNIREsGCzdz8mJ9wq6WDnH2bE0GJVbaHC3ltoEvmdi6y)** - **the cost of a gallon of gas across much of the country.** I promise you that when I get to Washington, I’ll support legislation that supports the fossil fuel and oil industries rather than trying to bankrupt them out of existence and hurting every American taxpayer in the process.

[** CHIP IN $3.30 TODAY ➞ **](http://links.alekskarlatosforcongress.com/u/click?_t=7e7d86e0b42141418fdbf0bb715c41e9&_m=fc206461d114478cb32c2e4a457d96df&_e=-O8-yMRrhVh7vg-0CubAT8AsV-8trO0WaqyBkBfDT0mB6yEyiysfnj7buMuz5HMXp7m0LG6IV68Q1-aUbDS4F3bZBPojXpjLdwLadIDGKriqjBIXdAUHAUTNf3_aObIc5ZdWyIZkFp3M04yM8sORfC2GurDbwyk5lqE-ZUoS2AljmCQZubi4Q6ODxmOZBlDaV8kXofBWjC-ig4cWoFXFg_Nk1kmt9RUOgvvjZmvxHPc_7rQJgjo5wzBIwFRQDuiJfm4MZx9XORnNlg7uMLiCTShimgJkAOvhU41F_U-z2UZBN1EqMgQ3sIDIKxlDRJe0KRpsEJMlpvzC503i3ArwU3wENY7tGtdBLUilmWXtftjGyz1YaNjU7UX6pGc0cllDhxQ0yXobDC3SSoHqNRBSjqwNrXoOEkOcaZHOoSvHwsEWQUvO8HyfoLwQwsLX-DFBtjLgkSwnH4KiB6YN4rG3yQ%3D%3D)
I hope you have a wonderful week.

- Alek

| Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world.
