clean_body: I am not expecting much from this email today as we’re only 4 days away from Christmas, however if you’re reading this... We wanted to reach out to you today once more before Christmas to check in and see if you have checked the price of gas lately. | Peter, We wanted to reach out to you today once more before Christmas to check in and see if you have checked the price of gas lately. Here in Oregon, we’re approaching $3.8/gallon while the national average is over $3.3/gallon. Groceries are up. Gas is obviously up. The cost of furniture is now 10% higher than it was at this time last year. And we actually can point fingers at Democrats as they’re the ones who are trying to spend us into oblivion. I am not expecting much from this email today as we’re only 4 days away from Christmas, I’d sure be appreciative. - the cost of a gallon of gas across much of the country. I promise you that when I get to Washington, I’ll support legislation that supports the fossil fuel and oil industries rather than trying to bankrupt them out of existence and hurting every American taxpayer in the process. I hope you have a wonderful week. - Alek | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Homeland Security or the Department of Defense. | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

I’m behind on tonight's important goal. My team says we need 450 patriots to donate today or we will LOSE to the Democrats.

If Pro-Trump Republicans can’t hit this goal and beat the Democrats in fundraising now, there is NO hope for us in the next election!

Marsha Blackburn

clean_body: Are you in or out? | Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, With the year nearly over, it’s time for you to accept my offer and join my exclusive Chairman’s Club. Within days, I’m going to close the Chairman’s Club to new members, and you will have missed your opportunity to one of the few True Patriots I consider as core allies of this movement. So if you have been thinking of joining, now is the time. | Official Chairman’s Club Membership Offer EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #05966106 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT SUGGESTED GIFT: $10 or more | | | | | | | I’m looking forward to seeing you on the list, Peter. Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

“Mitch McConnell & Liberal Lisa Murkowski have enabled Biden & the Democrats to push through their Anti-American, Radical Socialist agenda.” -Kelly Tshibaka
Kelly is spot on, friend.
Mitch McConnell and Liberal Lisa Murkowski have enabled Biden and the Democrats for far too long. They even all served in the Senate together for over a decade!
No wonder they continue to only do what is best for them, instead of helping the American People.
That is why they will build a wall around the Capitol and themselves, but not finish building a wall on our Southern border. They will increase funding for the Capitol Police to protect themselves, but allow the Radical Left to defund our police.

When Kelly defeats Murkowski and becomes Alaska’s next U.S. Senator, she will not support Mitch McConnell as leader. It’s time for new, America First leadership in the Senate.

clean_body: | | | | We will not support Mitch McConnell as leader. | “Mitch McConnell & Liberal Lisa Murkowski have enabled Biden & the Democrats to push through their Anti-American, Radical Socialist agenda.” -Kelly Tshibaka Kelly is spot on, friend. Mitch McConnell and Liberal Lisa Murkowski have enabled Biden and the Democrats for far too long. They even all served in the Senate together for over a decade! No wonder they continue to only do what is best for them, instead of helping the American People. That is why they will build a wall around the Capitol and themselves, but not finish building a wall on our Southern border. They will increase funding for the Capitol Police to protect themselves, but allow the Radical Left to defund our police. When Kelly defeats Murkowski and becomes Alaska’s next U.S. Senator, she will not support Mitch McConnell as leader. It’s time for new, America First leadership in the Senate. Mitch McConnell has repeatedly bailed out Joe Biden, giving him gifts of Senate votes, which are the only things keeping the Biden administration on life support. It’s time to pull the plug. We need more America First leaders in the Senate. Thank you, Team Tshibaka | | | | =

Did you see our email yesterday, team? We're getting a jumpstart on end-of-year fundraising because here's the deal: the last few weeks of the year are some of the slowest fundraising weeks of the year. But we're going to pull out all the stops to ensure we hit our end-of-year fundraising goal -- starting by hitting our $7,000 flash goal before midnight tonight.

[**Make a donation of $5 or more now >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39875745/321808994/1492199982?refcode=em21_211220_preeoy2_fndd_gq_act___opd_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211220_preeoy2_fndd_gq_act___opd_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTFmMGE4ZS1kMTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=toy6ypHiQG12E41mLpzqZcDPVWh_Bvi0xLC5Nox7eF0=)

Tom has committed his life to public service. He believes that workers rights are non-negotiable, that access to reproductive healthcare -- including abortion -- is imperative, and that your zip code shouldn't determine the quality of education you receive.

**He wants to ensure that every Marylander has the opportunity to succeed. **That's why over a dozen elected leaders in Baltimore added their names to the growing list of Tom's supporters today, and it's why I'm asking for $7 to support Tom's campaign.

Every $7 donation helps our campaign get organizers talking to voters in every corner of the state, run polls to refine our strategy, and keep our ads on the air. When we come up even $7 short, it means tough decisions about where to make detrimental budget cuts.

**_[Tom will _always_ prioritize hardworking families, not corporate special interests. So, while he may not rely on a massive war chest, he does rely on you. Will you please donate $7 or whatever you can to win in Maryland and elect a fighter for hardworking families like yours?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39876091/321810534/1729229235?refcode=bpi-em-20211220_standalone_ND&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwM2QyZmZhNy1kMzYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qw4Io9LFY9PdXnA-GDyctPuA_mlQVotDeXvk7sCBKKs=)_**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: The wrong people are in office
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
One vote could make all the difference when it comes to winning back the Senate majority. |
---
Peter,

It's hard to believe what's on television each day.

Government officials are _mandating this._ They're _controlling that._ It's unlike anything we've ever seen before in America.

But if we're being honest right now, _**we know the wrong people are in office.**_

And it's time for that to change.

**One victory. One seat.** One vote could make all the difference when all is said and done. If we don't give it our absolute 100% effort now, well then, **we risk falling short of flipping Georgia's Senate seat red.**

[**HELP US HIT OUR YEAR-END GOAL ->**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2809bec3675b477db200d77a8e73a02e&_e=l-5wqpHeoai4OxPpgjs5ejhUg5oQFMvIIg3f_56iK0cynbGKwPsjuoZWa_c4z-W-nFwsaBJx-1FxiZFFvTaOpKY3EPKs91zKJ4SYHPrvnsK5lOlj_WijJmJbWypi-AKIbr_ysFE8DYzxX5N5ZwiZAHyiW8AdrrOROkPFA6Sf5fICv7d_be08hVgUPVpejtO4fphGP6Zb5MFXTx14SYZ8xGe0U3iLwNy-I3zao44ZPYzEHyMktrjE7b-hjoda6uicHa77Bm8vw0ScFmMXQeeD92f9hNQtsfiOFO14vVHqsiY47eLRIt_Tvg0td9aZKT5miztJuAL_mjtluxNEM2vwGKR6413JKJgs2APAFiSrWg-gZs05F5EzsVLuv8IIIk89pQB3TLEEqkAANGEKQXzrMsXPzQqudSvfVsYIBzBrvK0L-kJrouzNMySACnIuTfgFi8bW05hfeGWUPLf7xPmHAKLutncpHA-30ps1QIYjz1E%3D)

clean_body: One vote could make all the difference when it comes to winning back the Senate majority. | Peter, It's hard to believe what's on television each day. Government officials are mandating this. They're controlling that. It's unlike anything we've ever seen before in America. But if we're being honest right now, we know the wrong people are in office. And it's time for that to change. One victory. One seat. One vote could make all the difference when all is said and done. If we don't give it our absolute 100% effort now, well then, we risk falling short of flipping Georgia's Senate seat red. There are now just a few days until our year-end fundraising deadline (the last of 2021), and we are asking you to do what you can to help preserve the freedoms our ancestors fought for. With sincere thanks, Herschel Walker P.S. With everyone rightfully focused this week on Christmas, travel plans, and time with family, fundraising always slows considerably. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Heidi St. John
subject: Update
body:
Dear Peter,

Quite simply, I'm overwhelmed by the
incredible generosity of my supporters across this country!

11 days ago, my campaign team set a goal of
raising $50,000 by the crucial December 31 fundraising deadline.
As of right now, we've raised $38,031.80 toward that goal.

In less than two weeks, mostly homeschool
moms (and their families) from 49 states, have chipped in at
least $17.76 to support my run for Congress.

I believe that we can reach our goal by
December 31, but we still need 674 individuals to chip in at
least $17.76 to get there.

Will you please chip in with a contribution
today to help reach our goal?

When I set out to run for Congress a number
of months back, I knew it wasn't going to be easy. I'd always
heard the mudslinging and heated talk would be intense.

I can tell you that it has.

But during that time, I've also seen and
experienced the selflessness that comes from those who volunteer
their time and give of their generous resources for values and
principles they believe in.

I will forever be grateful for those
individuals. And also those who pray for me and my team, or just
give a thumbs up on Facebook.

The beauty of our campaign is that it truly
is funded by the grassroots, not big corporate interests and
lobbyists in Washington, DC. Sure, some people give the maximum
they're allowed to give, but most of our support is coming in
from contributions under $100.

I actually prefer it that way. I'm comforted
in knowing that our grassroots team is in the thousands!

With the end of this quarter rapidly
approaching on December 31, I hope you will consider chipping in
at least $17.76 to reach our goal . . . the resources raised will
go to things like printing mailers, ordering campaign signs, and
running ads on radio, tv, and social media.

Thanks again for your prayers, volunteer
time, and generous support!

I'll keep you updated as we head toward our
$50,000 goal!

Chip in $17.76 by click HERE!

For liberty,

Heidi St. John
Republican for Congress
www.HeidiStJohnForCongress.com

with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

From Georgia to Pennsylvania to Arizona, working class voters fought to take back the presidency, the House, and the Senate. **We donated in the middle of a pandemic, we made phone calls, we knocked doors, and now we watch as corporate Democrats, like Joe Manchin, block Build Back Better, and the party just accepts policy defeat until at least 2022.** This cannot be the way Democrats govern if we want any hope of keeping the house, of stopping climate change, of being the party that fights for working people. **We don’t just need more Democrats. Affordable housing assistance, allowing Medicare to negotiate prescription drugs, and a clean energy standard to combat climate change, would mean so much here. So why isn’t our Member of Congress in the street? Where is our leader in our time of desperate need? Missing in action. clean_body: Joe Manchin blocks BBB and the Senate goes on vacation. | | | Team, If your email inbox looks anything like ours, it is filled with emails from the DNC, the DCCC, the DSCC asking for money to protect the Democratic majority. From Georgia to Pennsylvania to Arizona, working class voters fought to take back the presidency, the House, and the Senate. We donated in the middle of a pandemic, we made phone calls, we knocked doors, and now we watch as corporate Democrats, like Joe Manchin, block Build Back Better, and the party just accepts policy defeat until at least 2022. This cannot be the way Democrats govern if we want any hope of keeping the house, of stopping climate change, of being the party that fights for working people. We don’t just need more Democrats. We need better Democrats. We’ve been talking about it for months: Build Back Better could change so many lives on the West Side and South Side of Chicago. Affordable housing assistance, allowing Medicare to negotiate prescription drugs, and a clean energy standard to combat climate change, would mean so much here. So why isn’t our Member of Congress in the street? Where is our leader in our time of desperate need? Missing in action. Thank you, Team Kina | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

name: Drew Thompson
subject: Every Child Left Behind
body:
This is Unacceptable [](https://) Peter As our country slides further behind other nations in our education standards, we have to ask, when will it end? Thousands of our students graduate without the ability to read, and write. They are not ready for the challenges of the future. What do the teachers unions, school boards and educators do to fix it? Nothing. Instead, they prioritize left wing doctrine like critical race theory, over the basic skills that our kids need to compete. Jane Timken will not stand by and until every child gets left behind. With the help of parents around Ohio, we are fighting to put stop to this. Click the button below to join her in January at our inaugural "Parents for Jane" kick off, and find out how you can help. **Parents for Jane** Date: Thursday, 1/13/2021
Time: 5:45 p.m.
Location: Dublin Community Recreation Center. Dublin Community Hall

name: =?utf-8?Q?Joe=20Kent?=
subject: FW: I need a favor Re: Joe Kent
body:
Friend,

Did you see the message below from Don, Jr.?

I can't tell you how honored I am to be endorsed by both Don and his father, President Trump.

Please help our campaign meet our fundraising goals by making a contribution today at https://www.koekentforcongress.com/donate.

Thank you!

Joe

-----Original Message-----
From: Donald Trump, Jr. <donaldtrumpjr@joekentforcongress.com>
Sent: Tuesday, December 7, 2021 1:05 PM
Subject: I need a favor Re: Joe Kent

Dear Patriot,

If you’ve opened this email from me instead of tweeting about how much it triggered you, you’re probably one of the millions of Americans who Made America Great Again by helping my father win TWO presidential elections.

For that, I thank you. I love this country and I love what we were able to do during that first term: record low unemployment, record income growth, low inflation, and a foreign policy that put America first.

Despite this, the Democrats did everything they could to block his agenda.

And this came as no surprise to us, of course. Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, AOC, and the other lunatics on the left hated my father so much and what he was trying to do for this country they did everything they could to burn it down – figuratively and literally – regardless of how much it hurt regular Americans.

But here’s the kicker: many so-called “Republicans” joined with the Democrats to slow down the MAGA agenda.

One of the ringleaders of these RINOs is Jaime Herrera Beutler from Washington’s 3rd Congressional District. She voted to block construction of the southern border wall. She voted against repealing Obamacare. She voted against withdrawing our troops from Syria, but also voted against allowing my father to deploy national guard troops to end the ANTIFA and BLM rioting in her own district.

And if that wasn’t bad enough, Jaime Herrera Beutler was one of the ten Republicans to vote to impeach my father.

But there’s good news: a real America First Republican named Joe Kent has stepped forward to run against her, and I’m so proud to join my father in giving him my full endorsement.

Will you help him today with a contribution of $50, $100, $500, $1000, $2900 or $5800? Please donate now at https://www.joekentforcongress.com/give.

Joe Kent represents everything that makes this country great. He signed up to serve in our military at a young age and earned a place in the Green Berets. He did eleven combat missions over twenty years in the Middle East before serving as a foreign policy advisor to my father.

Joe’s wife, Shannon Kent, a Navy Chief Petty officer, also served in our nation’s military until she was killed in Syria just two months after fake Republicans like Jaime Herrera Beutler blocked President Trump’s attempt to withdraw our troops from that pointless war.

I will always be grateful to Joe for the sacrifice he and his family have made for our nation. He understands that the America First foreign policy my father fought for is necessary to prevent the stupid, needless loss of lives in conflicts our country has no reason to be involved in, and that’s the wisdom he will bring to Congress.

Another serious priority for Joe is election integrity. He has pledged to lead an effort in Congress to adjudicate the 2020 General Election and fight for reforms that will prevent the abuse of our elections by corrupt government officials so we can again trust that only legitimate votes are county.

And on issue after issue, from securing the border to opposing vaccine mandates to holding hearings on the botched withdrawal in Afghanistan, Joe will be an America First leader.

Please help send this patriot to Congress with an immediate donation at https://www.joekentforcongress.com/give.

Let’s say, just hypothetically, that my father decides to run again and wins for a THIRD time and takes office. Would you rather he have to fight not just the Democrats but also RINOs like Jaime Herrera Beutler...

Or do you want him to have patriots like Joe by his side who will stand shoulder to shoulder as we push forward our renewed MAGA agenda?

Joe Kent MUST win this election. Please make the biggest donation you can afford at https://joekentforcongress.com/give.

Thank you and God Bless,

Donald Trump, Jr.

PS – Joe Kent needs your help. Please, do me a favor and give whatever you can: $50, $100, $500, $1000, $2900 or $5800 today at https://joekentforcongress.com/give.

==============================================

Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com from this list:
https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=4a7c82fdc2&e=00856e661d&c=c36fd7a823

name: Sen. Debbie Stabenow
subject: Democrats can't afford to let Val Demings fall behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I'm reaching out today with some urgent news about my friend and colleague Val Demings
| | |
---
Hi, friend – I'm Debbie Stabenow, the first woman to serve as a U.S. senator from Michigan.
I'm reaching out today with some urgent news about my friend and colleague Val Demings – another Democrat from a battleground state who's also breaking barriers and fighting for working families.
Val Demings is just _2 points _behind Marco Rubio in a race that experts are saying will determine Senate control. I've won in a swing state before, so believe me when I tell you that Val Demings has what it takes to flip Florida – **but her most significant obstacle is resources, and she's falling short of her $200,000 end of month goal at the worst possible moment.**
**Democrats can't afford to let Val Demings fall behind in such an important race. That's why I'm coming to you personally to ask you to help Val Demings close her fundraising gap before midnight:**
**[Friend, will you donate $5 right now to help Val Demings surge ahead in this race, flip Florida blue and protect our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39877085/321815035/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1740-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTZkZTk4OS1kODYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w6Desc7kuQURJC5cJ6efR4GEcdnuWkXLhDRdYTUvbpw=)**
Here's where we're at, friend: CNN is calling Florida's Senate seat one of the most likely to flip in 2022 – **and Val Demings is the perfect candidate to win.** She's a lifelong Floridian who knows the value of hard work. She's proven that she can take on tough fights; she even managed Trump's impeachment trial!
The problem is, Marco Rubio is breaking GOP fundraising records, and Mitch McConnell is doing everything he can to take back the Senate. National Republicans have already poured $10 million into Florida to stop Val Demings' powerful grassroots movement. **If Val Demings falls short of her goal, she won't have the resources to fight back against Republican attacks.**
With Senate control on the line, this race could determine whether we have the power to protect reproductive choice, strengthen our democracy and more.**The stakes couldn't be higher, so I'm doing whatever I can to protect our Senate majority. With this End of Month fundraising deadline in just a few hours, I have to ask: Can I count on you to donate?**
**[If you're as dedicated as I am to protecting our Democratic Senate majority, donate $5 right now to help Val Demings close this fundraising gap, surge ahead in this race and defeat Marco Rubio. Trust me: Every dollar makes a difference in battleground races like these.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39877086/321815036/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1740-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTZkZTk4OS1kODYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=w6Desc7kuQURJC5cJ6efR4GEcdnuWkXLhDRdYTUvbpw=)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Joe=20Kent?=
subject: [FIXED LINK] FW: I need a favor Re: Joe Kent
body:
Friend,

Did you see the message below from Don, Jr.?

I can't tell you how honored I am to be endorsed by both Don and his father, President Trump.

Please help our campaign meet our fundraising goals by making a contribution today at https://www.joekentforcongress.com/donate.

Thank you!

Joe

-----Original Message-----
From: Donald Trump, Jr. <donaldtrumpjr@joekentforcongress.com>
Sent: Tuesday, December 7, 2021 1:05 PM
Subject: I need a favor Re: Joe Kent

Dear Patriot,

If you’ve opened this email from me instead of tweeting about how much it triggered you, you’re probably one of the millions of Americans who Made America Great Again by helping my father win TWO presidential elections.

For that, I thank you. I love this country and I love what we were able to do during that first term: record low unemployment, record income growth, low inflation, and a foreign policy that put America first.

Despite this, the Democrats did everything they could to block his agenda.

And this came as no surprise to us, of course. Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer, AOC, and the other lunatics on the left hated my father so much and what he was trying to do for this country they did everything they could to burn it down – figuratively and literally – regardless of how much it hurt regular Americans.

But here’s the kicker: many so-called “Republicans” joined with the Democrats to slow down the MAGA agenda.

One of the ringleaders of these RINOs is Jaime Herrera Beutler from Washington’s 3rd Congressional District. She voted to block construction of the southern border wall. She voted against repealing Obamacare. She voted against withdrawing our troops from Syria, but also voted against allowing my father to deploy national guard troops to end the ANTIFA and BLM rioting in her own district.

And if that wasn’t bad enough, Jaime Herrera Beutler was one of the ten Republicans to vote to impeach my father.

But there’s good news: a real America First Republican named Joe Kent has stepped forward to run against her, and I’m so proud to join my father in giving him my full endorsement.

Will you help him today with a contribution of $50, $100, $500, $1000, $2900 or $5800? Please donate now at https://www.joekentforcongress.com/give.

Joe Kent represents everything that makes this country great. He signed up to serve in our military at a young age and earned a place in the Green Berets. He did eleven combat missions over twenty years in the Middle East before serving as a foreign policy advisor to my father.

Joe’s wife, Shannon Kent, a Navy Chief Petty officer, also served in our nation’s military until she was killed in Syria just two months after fake Republicans like Jaime Herrera Beutler blocked President Trump’s attempt to withdraw our troops from that pointless war.

I will always be grateful to Joe for the sacrifice he and his family have made for our nation. He understands that the America First foreign policy my father fought for is necessary to prevent the stupid, needless loss of lives in conflicts our country has no reason to be involved in, and that’s the wisdom he will bring to Congress.

Another serious priority for Joe is election integrity. He has pledged to lead an effort in Congress to adjudicate the 2020 General Election and fight for reforms that will prevent the abuse of our elections by corrupt government officials so we can again trust that only legitimate votes are county.

And on issue after issue, from securing the border to opposing vaccine mandates to holding hearings on the botched withdrawal in Afghanistan, Joe will be an America First leader.

Please help send this patriot to Congress with an immediate donation at https://www.joekentforcongress.com/give.

Let’s say, just hypothetically, that my father decides to run again and wins for a THIRD time and takes office. Would you rather he have to fight not just the Democrats but also RINOs like Jaime Herrera Beutler...

Or do you want him to have patriots like Joe by his side who will stand shoulder to shoulder as we push forward our renewed MAGA agenda?

Joe Kent MUST win this election. Please make the biggest donation you can afford at https://joekentforcongress.com/give.

Thank you and God Bless,

Donald Trump, Jr.

PS – Joe Kent needs your help. Please, do me a favor and give whatever you can: $50, $100, $500, $1000, $2900 or $5800 today at https://joekentforcongress.com/give.

==============================================

Unsubscribe dpwillis67@gmail.com from this list:
https://joekentforcongress.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=520f0c556a8895811473126aa&id=4a7c82fdc2&e=00856e661d&c=e49ee996d8

name: John Fetterman
subject: re: Joe Manchin →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Let me set the record straight here...
#
Derek,
This is outrageous.
Yesterday on _Fox News_ , Senator Joe Manchin announced that he’s voting NO on Build Back Better, the transformative social investment + climate bill that Democrats have been working on all year. 🤔🤔🤔
So let me set the record straight here, Derek.
**Send me to D.C. and — unlike Senator Manchin — I would vote YES on Build Back Better...**
... plus, I’d also vote YES on codifying _Roe v. Wade_ , abolishing the filibuster, raising the minimum wage + a lot more.
I’m running for U.S. Senate to be that 51st Democratic vote when it counts, you know? **Because now is the time for Democrats to *actually* vote like Democrats and get sh*t done.**
**[If that’s the attitude you believe is urgently needed in the U.S. Senate, will you stand with me + our campaign by rushing a contribution of $5 today? Trust me with your support, you’ll *always* have mine in Washington, D.C.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38828?refcode=em20211220-3896&t=1&akid=3896%2E434096%2E-xiDii)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38828?refcode=em20211220-3896&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=3896%2E434096%2E-xiDii)**
Thanks,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
P.S.
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38828?refcode=em20211220-3896&t=21&akid=3896%2E434096%2E-xiDii)
Speaking of the filibuster, here’s how Gisele feels about it 😂 (and I agree). **[Not only would I vote YES on Build Back Better in the U.S. Senate — I’d vote YES to abolish the filibuster, too. Donate $5 or more to help our campaign get there.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38828?refcode=em20211220-3896&t=22&akid=3896%2E434096%2E-xiDii)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211220-3896-footer&t=23&refcode2=3896_434096_-xiDii&akid=3896%2E434096%2E-xiDii)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=3896%2E434096%2E-xiDii)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=3896%2E434096%2E-xiDii)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jahmal=20Cole?=
subject: Be Yourself. Be Strong. Be Genuine.
body:
This journey began 11 months ago, and we're just getting started. | | |
#### DECEMBER NEWSLETTER
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/eb6d723e621f/be-yourself-be-strong-be-genuine?e=339f142c50)
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
## GET INVOLVED
---
| | [ ](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=460876faf2&e=339f142c50)
---
In January, we will be hosting a **volunteer kickoff** and getting our first petitions signed! **[Sign up here](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=7b85908774&e=339f142c50) **to join us on Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. day, **Monday, January 17th, 2022**.

Please note: as we are living through a global pandemic, we **highly recommend that volunteers are vaccinated and boosted** prior to this event. You will be in direct contact with people in the community, and we must do our part to fight the spread of this deadly virus.
|
---
|
### A Note from Jahmal:
This journey started back in February when I first filed with the FEC. It's been a long journey, full of learning and connecting, and I want to share with you all that recently, we achieved a fundraising goal that made me proud of this campaign, my team and the movement we are building. **I am so proud when someone from the block contributes to the campaign because they are choosing to put their faith in me, and my vision for the First District, and that is the highest form of praise.**

The next step in this journey is collecting signatures to get on the ballot. **We are launching out volunteer program on Monday, January 17th, 2022 in celebration of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.** He fought for justice through service, and was a voice for political action. This King day, we are going to mobilize people for political change and fight for the future the First District needs and deserves. Sign up to volunteer using [this google form](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=de7c410c90&e=339f142c50).

You all know how important it is to me that we **create solutions to gun violence in our community, including mental health clinics and counselors in our schools.** Last month, that issue grew even closer to my heart because [I was shot at](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=81dd514981&e=339f142c50) for the second time since I've been on the campaign trail. I have taken time to heal personally, and [created space](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=6698479913&e=339f142c50) for the community to talk about it, but I am not going to let it go; we need to heal just as much as we need to prevent these instances from happening in the first place. **One of the things that I plan to fight for in Congress is a federal jobs guarantee.** If we invest in the careers and futures of our neighbors, answering the most pressing needs of our community while building economic freedom, we can spend our summers outside, enjoying the sun instead of looking over our shoulders.

**As we fight for justice in the First District, I need your continued support.** If you're able to make a financial contribution, please do so on our [ActBlue page](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=e52d84ce03&e=339f142c50). If you can donate your time, [sign up here](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=5ff45f89af&e=339f142c50) to join our email listserv. We are hiring a local field organizer to mobilize our volunteers, collect signatures and get on the ballot. This campaign is about inspiring people, and getting them involved in the policies that shape their lives--I hope you'll join me in creating a better future for the First District.

Yours in service,

Jahmal Cole
---
|

|

|
---
|

clean_body: This journey began 11 months ago, and we're just getting started. | | | DECEMBER NEWSLETTER | | | | | GET INVOLVED | | In January, we will be hosting a volunteer kickoff and getting our first petitions signed! to join us on Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. day, Monday, January 17th, 2022. Please note: as we are living through a global pandemic, we highly recommend that volunteers are vaccinated and boosted prior to this event. You will be in direct contact with people in the community, and we must do our part to fight the spread of this deadly virus. | | A Note from Jahmal: This journey started back in February when I first filed with the FEC. It's been a long journey, full of learning and connecting, and I want to share with you all that recently, we achieved a fundraising goal that made me proud of this campaign, my team and the movement we are building. I am so proud when someone from the block contributes to the campaign because they are choosing to put their faith in me, and my vision for the First District, and that is the highest form of praise. The next step in this journey is collecting signatures to get on the ballot. We are launching out volunteer program on Monday, January 17th, 2022 in celebration of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. He fought for justice through service, and was a voice for political action. This King day, we are going to mobilize people for political change and fight for the future the First District needs and deserves. Sign up to volunteer using . You all know how important it is to me that we create solutions to gun violence in our community, including mental health clinics and counselors in our schools. Last month, that issue grew even closer to my heart because for the second time since I've been on the campaign trail. I have taken time to heal personally, and for the community to talk about it, but I am not going to let it go; we need to heal just as much as we need to prevent these instances from happening in the first place. One of the things that I plan to fight for in Congress is a federal jobs guarantee. If we invest in the careers and futures of our neighbors, answering the most pressing needs of our community while building economic freedom, we can spend our summers outside, enjoying the sun instead of looking over our shoulders. As we fight for justice in the First District, I need your continued support. If you're able to make a financial contribution, please do so on our . If you can donate your time, to join our email listserv. We are hiring a local field organizer to mobilize our volunteers, collect signatures and get on the ballot. This campaign is about inspiring people, and getting them involved in the policies that shape their lives--I hope you'll join me in creating a better future for the First District. Yours in service, Jahmal Cole | | | | | | | | | We're always looking for volunteers! Sign up . Want to host a fundraiser for the campaign? Let's make it happen! Contact us . | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Friends of Jahmal Cole, All rights reserved.

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: This is an issue of human rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=iLmlYITNoEfKDe9lxfv0EXKvXfI%2BHhuA&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
Once again, the U.S. Supreme Court has let Texas' abortion ban stay in place as it awaits further legal challenges. The conservative majority of the court greenlighted, for now, the most extreme abortion ban in the country - jeopardizing the human rights and safety of women in the second most populous state in America.
We can protect the constitutional right to healthcare - right now, no matter what the courts do - by passing the Women's Health Protection Act in the Senate. That's why I must ask you to again urge the passage of this vital piece of legislation, but before you do, please allow me a moment to explain why your continued activism is so important.
As I've been saying all along, the abortion bans that have sprouted up in states like Texas, Mississippi, and Louisiana aren't just about access to safe and legal abortion care. This extremist lawmaking, mainly from right-wing Republican men, represents successful attempts to violate the fundamental human and civil rights of women.
The Framers of our Constitution - fearful of a too-powerful central government after the tyranny of monarchy - used 10 amendments, the Bill of Rights, to limit the powers of federal government and guarantee freedoms to the states. The horrors of state-based, tyrannical laws, such as the enslavement of Black Americans, led to the 14th Amendment being ratified to override state laws to protect equality and civil liberties.
A century later, under the leadership of Republican-appointed chief justices, it was the 14th Amendment that paved the way for landmark civil rights decisions to end segregation, legalize interracial marriage, protect the right to contraception, and in the case of _Roe v. Wade_ , give women control over their own reproductive health choices.
**But thanks to Donald Trump 's appointment of three Supreme Court justices, the Court is abandoning this doctrine aligned with the 14th Amendment, signaling instead that they will once again allow states to pass laws that trample all over civil rights. **
**It is a disgrace that this is where we find our nation 's highest court, but if Trump justices are likely to dismantle reproductive freedoms, then it is up to Congress to act. [Not after _Roe v. Wade_ has been completely undermined, not weeks or months or years down the road. Congress must act NOW. So please, even if you've done so already, sign on to my new petition demanding the Senate pass the Women's Health Protection Act and enshrine abortion rights into law.](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-whpa?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1112-su-nd&redirect=https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-WHPA-SCOTUS?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1112-su-nd)**
[ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-whpa?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1112-su-nd&redirect=https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-WHPA-SCOTUS?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1112-su-nd)
For the rights of women in Texas and of everywhere in America, we must take action before it's too late. Thank you for doing your part.
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=t47MrK39antSahaUTyBWEHKvXfI%2BHhuA&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

Peter,

Lauren Boebert is back in the news again. This time, for calling her colleague a terrorist, just because she’s a Muslim.

Boebert reminds me of — 20 years ago — when Colorado had the nickname “the hate state.”

The Colorado I know and love is a place of community values, where we raise one another up, not tear each other down.

Unfortunately, Lauren Boebert seems to be stuck in a different Colorado. She lives in her own private hate state.

It wasn’t bad enough that she encouraged insurrectionists to storm the Capitol on January 6th and spread anti-mask and anti-vaccine conspiracy theories for months. Now she’s spreading blatant Islamophobia and hate speech from Colorado to Washington.

Lauren Boebert is dangerous for our country and for Colorado. She does not represent our values and she should not be a decision-maker in Congress.

Until we can vote her out, Congress needs to take action to hold her accountable. **[Add your name and tell Congress: censure Boebert and strip her of her committee assignments >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39859453/321767112/2088524460?refcode=ea.c8340204-b061-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.c8340204-b061-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjODM0MDIwNC1iMDYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jPs9T5mGxWVwy1yeVfUpI_YTarcv9hklbyXia_BLy2U=&emci=05ed06e7-825f-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=c8340204-b061-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12666102)**

clean_body: Islamophobia has no place in Colorado. | | | “Another video shows Lauren Boebert suggesting Ilhan Omar was terrorist” - CNN Politics | ** Peter, Lauren Boebert is back in the news again. This time, for calling her colleague a terrorist, just because she’s a Muslim. Boebert reminds me of — 20 years ago — when Colorado had the nickname “the hate state.” The Colorado I know and love is a place of community values, where we raise one another up, not tear each other down. Unfortunately, Lauren Boebert seems to be stuck in a different Colorado. She lives in her own private hate state. It wasn’t bad enough that she encouraged insurrectionists to storm the Capitol on January 6th and spread anti-mask and anti-vaccine conspiracy theories for months. Now she’s spreading blatant Islamophobia and hate speech from Colorado to Washington. Lauren Boebert is dangerous for our country and for Colorado. She does not represent our values and she should not be a decision-maker in Congress. Until we can vote her out, Congress needs to take action to hold her accountable. Thank you, Dr. Yadira Caraveo | | = = ****Learn more at:** Follow along: | | ---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS PO Box 953, Eastlake, CO 80614 If you would like to receive fewer emails, please . ****If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please.******

name: ICYMI News
subject: Don’t let them “cancel” American history
body:
I have a special gift for you—a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hill
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zriia1dcqf3392fvr2dabur2aol4olsfb3fm42lo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1j62p74cph2bs) Friend of Liberty, I have a special gift for you--a set of unique notecards featuring pictures of the “Liberty Walk” statues found on the Hillsdale College campus. These beautiful cards include _George Washington_ and _Thomas Jefferson_ ... _Abraham Lincoln_ and _Frederick Douglass_ ... _Winston Churchill_ , _Margaret Thatcher_ , and _Ronald Reagan_. _All of these statues stand proudly on Hillsdale’s Michigan campus_ --one of the only institutions of higher learning that refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding, even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. You can view the cards at this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zntfdsl9at9vseoakddmah1fodi56caqqvq2833g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1j62p74cph2bs)** Let the cards serve as a reminder to you of the vigilance and commitment needed to defend liberty--especially right now, a critical time for our country. **Sadly, several recent polls and events around the country show that increasing numbers of young Americans are being drawn to socialism and other ideas destructive of liberty. ** And the unrest in communities nationwide, where statues of our Founding Fathers are being vandalized or torn down, is another symptom of this underlying disease. What explains this development? As an educator and president of Hillsdale, I’ve been thinking about this for a long time. Here’s one primary reason... For decades, the “progressive” leftist academics who became dominant in most of America’s colleges and universities after the 1960s have been teaching a **biased** and **distorted** view of American history. _The New York Times’_ recent “1619 Project” is a prime example. According to the “1619 Project,” the key to understanding America is not freedom, but slavery--and the Project’s main goal is to inject this false teaching into the curricula of America’s K-12 schools. Imagine young minds in classrooms all over American learning this. Does it make you as concerned as it does me? And given this trend in American education, is it any wonder that our young people feel less of a patriotic attachment to our nation and are increasingly attracted--out of ignorance--to failed ideas such as socialism, ideas that are destructive of liberty? Another sign of the “progressive” Left’s influence is the continuing attempt to erase our American heritage by destroying monuments, renaming schools and streets, and censoring works of literature in the name of “political correctness.” The Left knows that it cannot remake society according to its ever-evolving idea of “progress” until it has “canceled” patriotism and hallowed out the idea that we should be grateful for our blessings to the great men and women of the past--many of whom are depicted on the cards I’d like to send you. **This is why we are engaging the Left on the battlefield of education ... and why your generous support is needed right away. ** After all, those on the Left are extremely well-funded, thanks to liberal billionaires like George Soros and his ilk. **With the support of citizens like you --citizens who understand the importance of education to liberty--we are ramping up its outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, especially to our nation’s youth.** It is even more urgent that we do so in the face of efforts such as _ The New York Times_’ “1619 Project” that undermine patriotism and lead to an increased pull toward socialism. Hillsdale is the only educational institution in America that is **reaching** and **teaching** millions of citizens of all ages, from coast to coast, about America’s great heritage of liberty. **Your generous support today will... **
* **Expand** the circulation of _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans (you can also receive a free subscription of I _mprimis_ ...for life).
* **Send** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to schools across America, and to members of our armed forces, who have sworn to defend the Constitution.
* **Increase** the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in Hillsdale’s free online courses such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope.”
* **Launch** and support more and more Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 charter schools nationwide, returning excellence to American K-12 education and impacting thousands of our youngest citizens.

One other thing you should be aware of... As I mentioned, to maintain our independence, we do all of this liberty-defending work while refusing EVERY PENNY of government funding--even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants and loans. NOT. ONE. PENNY. So, your support is even more crucial to ensuring that future generations of Americans will be educated in American civics and prepared to defend freedom. **With a gift of $17.76 or more today to support educational outreach efforts that reach and teach millions, Hillsdale will send you a special notecard set featuring the statues on our “Liberty Walk.” The cards are a thank you for your support. ** Supplies are limited, so please make your best tax-deductible gift right away. **You can view the cards and give your best tax-deductible gift of $17.76, $25, $50, $100, or even $250 or more by following the secure link below:** **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/get-your-liberty-walk-notecards](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8vh1jedgsvqipso2adojfs8maqqthgkdus2v0p8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1j62p74cph2bs)** After receiving your notecards, I hope you’ll send one to a young person you know, encouraging them to learn more about the Constitution and American history. You can even recommend that they take advantage of Hillsdale’s many free educational resources. The Left is going all out, as illustrated by _The New York Times’_ “1619 Project.” It is urgent that we engage forcefully on the battlefield of education ... which is why your support is needed today. **Because as always, our only sure defense is an educated citizenry prepared to defend liberty --no matter the cost. ** Warm regards, Bill Gray Associate Vice President, National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

Hillsdale College,33 East College St, Hillsdale, MI, 49242, USA
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.icyminews.com/prefs/9z2zi19mgh2fbgcolskr5jv3ag8pvjv50fc4mcj6up8).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1pmabf8qr61ht1u5eagd9lvjn0q3mn51l6jefg8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or1c1g6cob4shj649fg)

| | Friends,

It has been an incredible **140 days since we launched our campaign**. With your support, we shattered records in our first quarter as a candidate and have spread our message of renewed hope for our country throughout the district.

And with just days until the end of 2021, we continue to see radical ideas coming from Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi. **We must fight back against these ideas and preserve the American Dream. **

I know many of you have contributed to our campaign already and _**I thank you**_ for that. But as we close out 2021, **sending a strong message through our fundraising numbers is critical.** If you are able to give a little more before the end of the quarter, I would be very grateful.

**[Donating](https://juanciscomani.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ed32a393c9fe1089f10fee94&id=f50ba0bf99&e=659fba240e) $5, $10 or even $500 will make all the difference as we close the quarter! **

Thank you for your support and investment in our campaign, and I look forward to seeing you in 2022!

Merry Christmas and happy holidays,

Juan

name: John King
subject: my commitment to Maryland
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
We’ve officially visited every county in the state. Let’s keep this Maryland momentum going!

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39877568/321817344/1830086357?refcode=BLU-KING-20211220-a-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=67c72c05-dc61-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2M3MmMwNS1kYzYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wPipMAE_Ac_MN2RrO0bfr5Fi8Dp6eeGQuuyr6htq4-o=)
---
| Peter, my campaign and I have some exciting news to share!

We’ve officially visited every county in Maryland in our ongoing journey to bring lasting change to our state! Through it all, I’ve met with folks from Cumberland to Cambridge and heard how our government can serve their communities better — **and one thing is abundantly clear: Marylanders are fed up with settling for small solutions to big challenges, and what we need now is bold, collective action to unite us.**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39877569/321817345/1830086357?refcode=BLU-KING-20211220-a-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=67c72c05-dc61-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2M3MmMwNS1kYzYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wPipMAE_Ac_MN2RrO0bfr5Fi8Dp6eeGQuuyr6htq4-o=)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39877571/321817346/1830086357?refcode=BLU-KING-20211220-a-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=67c72c05-dc61-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2M3MmMwNS1kYzYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wPipMAE_Ac_MN2RrO0bfr5Fi8Dp6eeGQuuyr6htq4-o=)
---
Across all counties and in each conversation, I’ve had the opportunity to hear directly what I could do as Maryland’s next governor to address the needs of Marylanders from all walks of life. From strengthening both our physical infrastructure – like public transportation and broadband access – and our social infrastructure – like paid family leave and access to affordable housing, **I will work tirelessly to ensure our government works for everyone and to close the opportunity gaps related to education, wealth, and health care.**

An equitable state where everyone has the chance to reach their full potential is possible, and I know change is possible because of my journey from a troubled kid with an unstable home life who got kicked out of high school to becoming President Obama’s U.S. Secretary of Education. My path was made possible by public schools and the teachers and counselors who invested in me. **I was lucky that the right people intervened in my life when they did and I know how crucial it is we make upward mobility less challenging — and I’m dedicated to making that goal a reality here in Maryland.**

**Together, I know we can create a stronger Maryland that works for all communities, from the Eastern Shore to Baltimore City to the mountains of Western Maryland. But I’m counting on supporters like you to join me in that pursuit._[_So what do you say – will you help me fight for the future we all deserve by pitching in what you can to support our campaign today?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39877572/321817347/1830086357?refcode=BLU-KING-20211220-a-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=67c72c05-dc61-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2N2M3MmMwNS1kYzYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wPipMAE_Ac_MN2RrO0bfr5Fi8Dp6eeGQuuyr6htq4-o=)_**

clean_body: We’ve officially visited every county in the state. Let’s keep this Maryland momentum going! | = | Peter, my campaign and I have some exciting news to share! We’ve officially visited every county in Maryland in our ongoing journey to bring lasting change to our state! Through it all, I’ve met with folks from Cumberland to Cambridge and heard how our government can serve their communities better — and one thing is abundantly clear: Marylanders are fed up with settling for small solutions to big challenges, and what we need now is bold, collective action to unite us. = | = Across all counties and in each conversation, I’ve had the opportunity to hear directly what I could do as Maryland’s next governor to address the needs of Marylanders from all walks of life. From strengthening both our physical infrastructure – like public transportation and broadband access – and our social infrastructure – like paid family leave and access to affordable housing, I will work tirelessly to ensure our government works for everyone and to close the opportunity gaps related to education, wealth, and health care. An equitable state where everyone has the chance to reach their full potential is possible, and I know change is possible because of my journey from a troubled kid with an unstable home life who got kicked out of high school to becoming President Obama’s U.S. Secretary of Education. My path was made possible by public schools and the teachers and counselors who invested in me. I was lucky that the right people intervened in my life when they did and I know how crucial it is we make upward mobility less challenging — and I’m dedicated to making that goal a reality here in Maryland. Together, I know we can create a stronger Maryland that works for all communities, from the Eastern Shore to Baltimore City to the mountains of Western Maryland. But I’m counting on supporters like you to join me in that pursuit.= | | | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Grateful, as always, John * | | = Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer John King for Governor PO Box 8429 Silver Spring, MD 20107 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you would like to learn more about John King's historic campaign for Maryland governor, text PROGRESS to 48178 or visit our . name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Stacey Abrams
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |

Folks – Earlier this month, my friend Stacey Abrams announced that she was running for Governor of Georgia, and I couldn't be more excited to support her campaign. **[In a moment, I'm going to ask you to split a $5 donation between my campaign and Stacey's, but first, let me explain why this is so important:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39877670/321817561/-73805137?refcode=20211220_mwh-sa&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzM4NTc3MS1kYzYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7zOJXNSPx5MslHSAVtM7cXiZH849IrjdlEK7yyMNHuc=)** In 2018, Stacey ran for Governor of Georgia against then Secretary of State, Brian Kemp, losing by just half a point. While political pundits wrote Georgia off as a solidly red state, Stacey never stopped fighting for Georgians. She dedicated herself to protecting voting rights and turning out historically underrepresented communities across Georgia. Thanks to her hard work, Georgia's voters turned out in record numbers, electing Senators Ossoff and Warnock and securing a Democratic majority in the Senate. But since Senator Ossoff and Senator Warnock's historic wins this year, Georgia's Republican-led legislature has doubled down on restricting access to the ballot box by putting forth anti-democratic legislation to cement Republican control in 2022. We can't allow this to happen. With Republicans attacking the fundamental right to vote, it's never been more important to elect Stacey Abrams as Georgia's governor. But winning in Georgia isn't going to be easy, and it isn't going to be cheap. Republicans are prepared to spend millions to keep the governor's seat red. **If we're going to elect Stacey, we're going to need an army of grassroots supporters.** **[That's why I'm asking you to split a donation between my campaign and Stacey's right now to help us win in 2022.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39877671/321817562/-73805137?refcode=20211220_mwh-sa&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzM4NTc3MS1kYzYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7zOJXNSPx5MslHSAVtM7cXiZH849IrjdlEK7yyMNHuc=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39877672/321817563/-73805137?refcode=20211220_mwh-sa&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzM4NTc3MS1kYzYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7zOJXNSPx5MslHSAVtM7cXiZH849IrjdlEK7yyMNHuc=)

I know a thing or two about tough races. In 2016, I won by only 1,107 votes, and the political environment in 2022 is shaping up to be even tougher for Democrats. That's why it's critical to build a strong campaign foundation early.
**[So please, team, will you split a donation between my campaign and Stacey Abrams'? The future of our democracy is at stake, and Stacey is counting on you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39877676/321817567/-73805137?refcode=20211220_mwh-sa&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzM4NTc3MS1kYzYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7zOJXNSPx5MslHSAVtM7cXiZH849IrjdlEK7yyMNHuc=)**
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Sarah Huckabee Sanders
subject: I have a personal favor to ask
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I didn't want to be the one to tell you this but we're out of option and Conservatives are dangerously behind our LAST AND MOST CRUCIAL deadline of the year. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8230%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=i9A%2fANqKjxUufTRzMSxu6w&sysid=1)
I didn’t want to be the one to tell you this but we’re out of option and Conservatives are dangerously behind our LAST AND MOST CRUCIAL deadline of the year.
This is Sarah Huckabee Sanders. I have a personal favor to ask of you:
[**I’m hoping you’ll pitch in $17 right now. Why? Because Democrats just CRUSHED their “must-hit” fundraising goal AND outraised us by $115,000,000+ from texts and emails like this one.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10116%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ND38UXNFXWvWCLNfeN4oXw&sysid=1)
Conservatives are so close to winning back the House but if we give up now, all our hard work will be for NOTHING.
**This is urgent.** I’m partnering with my friend Steve Scalise to build an unstoppable surge of support to help our Conservative allies and defeat the Democrats NATIONWIDE.
[**We are both counting on you to be a part of it.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10117%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5X93%2by1HYgmbXJSkr9hctg&sysid=1)
Look, we don’t have scores of Trump-hating billionaires forking over tons of cash to our campaigns, and we don’t have the Liberal Media on our side _**(trust me, I know that better than anyone)**... _
**But what we DO have is something to be much more proud of:**
We have a movement of strong Conservative Patriots who love our Country and believe we should ALWAYS PUT AMERICA FIRST.
[**We cannot win back the House alone. Please do your part and join us by chipping in $17 or more straight away.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10118%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JUzc8HY%2fnmSl4QFB3Tv%2bwg&sysid=1)
Thanks for all you do.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10119%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SE%2f5MZehIB9hkrozbblCqA&sysid=1)

name: Flowers for Congress
subject: FWD: We’re working hard to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene -- and it’s all thanks to you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
When I launched my campaign against Marjorie Taylor Greene in March of this year, I had no idea what to expect – all I knew is I couldn’t sit on the sidelines while Marjorie Taylor Greene worked to undermine our democracy from within.

**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39877753/321818003/-825069922?refcode=20211220_ffc_eoy1FWD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGE1MjkyOC1kZDYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vGD6IV0kErFQP_5O4LMZ1V2KUbZU85WqxK1p4QIp2yM=)** Friends, did you get a chance to see the note from Marcus this weekend? **We’re launching our End of Year fundraising push to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene, and we need your help to get us over the finish line.** [**If you can, click here to chip in to the Flowers for Congress campaign today, and be sure to check out his note below!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39877754/321818004/-825069922?refcode=20211220_ffc_eoy1FWD&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNGE1MjkyOC1kZDYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vGD6IV0kErFQP_5O4LMZ1V2KUbZU85WqxK1p4QIp2yM=) \----**Begin forwarded message** \----
Sent by Marcus Flowers <info@marcusforgeorgia.com>
Subject: We’re working hard to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene -- and it’s all thanks to you! When I launched my campaign against Marjorie Taylor Greene in March of this year, I had no idea what to expect – **all I knew is that I couldn’t sit on the sidelines while Marjorie Taylor Greene worked to undermine our democracy from within.** But since that moment, I’ve been overwhelmed with gratitude at the support you’ve given my campaign. **We’ve got grassroots donors and activists in all 50 states** who are committed to defeating Marjorie Taylor Greene - and we’re building an unstoppable organizing force here on the ground to help us WIN! name: Anna Kelly - Communications Director
subject: Wisconsin's crime problem
body:
Democrat policies are endangering public safety.

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=crime_problem_esolicit_v3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Friend \-- Wisconsin is facing a historic crime problem. Last week, Milwaukee reported its [192nd homicide](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=ez1BnRg01gPGR4qyG5PO2LV_3pMbUHIlFBrsZcCPouOKusPBTHLuiuFv5wkEyk2-3NNl8NZ-qkhPWMPmndCCz9kafxPLwWZ65qayDezXcSU8MQxk_xCErCxLEMQLSIoTeQbC8ujvnrqp5yXOvxaMvJIjXlvy0Gef_DG9EXaKYvM&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=crime_problem_esolicit_v3&n=2) of 2021 – breaking the city's homicide record for the second year in a row. [**We need elected officials who will protect our communities -- not embolden criminals.**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVmvNJzy4evmPyyITMqC9vMTivkp1GXzTGLcR7P09lG6L9Kq-bgyGqEtqpPWoGtnU0&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=crime_problem_esolicit_v3&n=3) Wisconsin Democrats continue to embrace policies that are weak on crime and endanger public safety:
* Tony Evers [vetoed](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=2-3jd5nLMwji5ivpZLIClZJ_HmZDkMXMkN7Vy2WRV0Yf7ANZYqd0LBk3R_OYdvU7sAXhu45QEWCndz6Uqm4bIZb6OHtryXzXltb9_dCemrWzaayGYJXPF5M1ozFIQ18hFtBC0ibKPreb_EaqEFWia64N_wKuA1zRsZKYrCNu9M8pR_K0F3Q3bhgDLAVMH1rjIm-jt0cQ2GliByUOZ3NfCjvftslMzGRHkhLWgRtVm9BRQ5y1ReXi8lB4hH4wHURhfQdDzySyCRRGIPzbKLdZ2g&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=crime_problem_esolicit_v3&n=4) a bill that would have prevented cities from defunding the police.
* Mandela Barnes [refuses](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRZDanLrJHkhGlgbzJRLhalI&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=crime_problem_esolicit_v3&n=5) to condemn the ‘defund the police’ movement and tried to end cash bail in Wisconsin, which would have allowed more dangerous criminals back on the streets.
* Josh Kaul is [using](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0RdPZiwNSw8fFMqSAeQMqOKNkQlNR_O-6IsDJBX7AwyrHRri9TDUw9O0h854Ywmg_2B53QWVOFRMi0_eq6xk7opZHu6BGf78vWGyQp45bFuv&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=crime_problem_esolicit_v3&n=6) his power as Attorney General to try and force a private business to hire a convicted rapist while his crime lab continues to [fail](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=5wg3don5l6_J12hXkf3HPcNYT6lUz2m18CPWRl8AJryOkqnNKUJKb7ATVstcLP2Soi_EmPXn0ADltJ4tRR6HU9DHCCeKLxqIM2Tm-L4UZdQ&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=crime_problem_esolicit_v3&n=7).

Republicans are fighting to elect leaders who will clean up our streets and make crime criminal again, but we need your help. [**Will you join the fight today by contributing $5, $10, $25 or more to help us elect leaders who will restore public safety in Wisconsin?**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVmvNJzy4evmPyyITMqC9vMTivkp1GXzTGLcR7P09lG6L9Kq-bgyGqEtqpPWoGtnU0&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=crime_problem_esolicit_v3&n=8) We can't do this without you, Friend. Thanks, Anna Kelly
Communications Director
Republican Party of Wisconsin
|
Republican Party of Wisconsin · WI 53703, United States
This email was sent to [Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com](mailto:Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://act.wisgop.org/unsubscribe?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=crime_problem_esolicit_v3&n=9).
You can also keep up with Republican Party of Wisconsin on [Twitter](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNIcJvVL3dAKuw8klLyGLeGg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=crime_problem_esolicit_v3&n=10) or [Facebook](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6iVbepFGB501pMHJjXBPeT95kNZEWPezdnkYYctpRqhH&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=crime_problem_esolicit_v3&n=11).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=crime_problem_esolicit_v3&n=12), software for leaders.

name: Team Lamb
subject: Voting rights are under attack. Help Stacey Abrams and Conor Lamb fight back >>
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONOR LAMB FOR SENATE Conor Lamb for Senate
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39877931/321818652/-1576960734?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTM1ZjM4OS1kZTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5lih8LCR_LR0_yYj9nIkNmRHeQBu0yMU9dr6M-FmlSE=)

Friend,

In case you haven't heard, voting rights activist **Stacey Abrams** announced that she's running for governor of Georgia, and we couldn't be more excited to support her.

While running for Georgia's gubernatorial race in 2018, **Abrams shined a new light on the extent of voter suppression in the state, particularly for Black and brown communities.**

After her GOP opponent Brian Kemp's (very narrow) victory, Abrams doubled down on her commitment to fight for voters by founding Fair Fight, an organization that advocates for voter protection across the country.

The result? **By registering more than 800,000 new voters, Abrams' efforts helped deliver a _historic_ Democratic victory in Georgia for Joe Biden in 2020** \-- _the first time a Democratic presidential candidate won the state since 1992._

**[Friend, it's clear that we _need_ to elect champions for voting rights like Stacey Abrams and Conor Lamb to office, where they'll fight for the communities they serve _and_ the fundamental values of democracy. Will you split a donation of $5 or more between Conor Lamb and Stacey Abrams today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39877932/321818653/2015888987?refcode=em21_211220_abramstandem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTM1ZjM4OS1kZTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5lih8LCR_LR0_yYj9nIkNmRHeQBu0yMU9dr6M-FmlSE=)** [SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39877933/321818654/2015888987?refcode=em21_211220_abramstandem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTM1ZjM4OS1kZTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5lih8LCR_LR0_yYj9nIkNmRHeQBu0yMU9dr6M-FmlSE=) Like Stacey Abrams, Conor Lamb is committed to defending our democracy from the GOP's _relentless_ attempts to undermine voting rights on a national scale.

Just this year, Republicans around the country have used their bogus 2020 election fraud claims to **enact 33 new laws that will make it harder for Americans to vote.** We can't overstate this: The GOP launched an all-out assault on our democracy, and we need to act _fast._

That's why Conor is making the preservation of our fundamental right to vote a priority for this campaign.

Earlier this year, he proudly cast his vote for The John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, a bill that would restore and expand voter protections significantly. And, to get this vital legislation passed, **Conor is ready to abolish the filibuster** \-- an antiquated rule that is hindering our progress on countless issues, _especially_ voting rights.

**Our democracy is facing an _existential_ threat from the GOP, friend. Now more than ever, we need leaders who will take these threats seriously.**

**[So, will you help Conor Lamb and Stacey Abrams win these competitive races and work to protect our democracy by pitching in $5 or more to their campaigns right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39877934/321818655/2015888987?refcode=em21_211220_abramstandem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTM1ZjM4OS1kZTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5lih8LCR_LR0_yYj9nIkNmRHeQBu0yMU9dr6M-FmlSE=)** [SPLIT A DONATION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39877935/321818656/2015888987?refcode=em21_211220_abramstandem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzE3OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTM1ZjM4OS1kZTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5lih8LCR_LR0_yYj9nIkNmRHeQBu0yMU9dr6M-FmlSE=) Thanks for being part of this.

\-- Team Lamb

clean_body: | = Friend, In case you haven't heard, voting rights activist Stacey Abrams announced that she's running for governor of Georgia, and we couldn't be more excited to support her. While running for Georgia's gubernatorial race in 2018, Abrams shined a new light on the extent of voter suppression in the state, particularly for Black and brown communities. After her GOP opponent Brian Kemp's (very narrow) victory, Abrams doubled down on her commitment to fight for voters by founding Fair Fight, an organization that advocates for voter protection across the country. The result? By registering more than 800,000 new voters, Abrams' efforts helped deliver a historic Democratic victory in Georgia for Joe Biden in 2020 \-- the first time a Democratic presidential candidate won the state since 1992. = = Like Stacey Abrams, Conor Lamb is committed to defending our democracy from the GOP's relentless attempts to undermine voting rights on a national scale. Just this year, Republicans around the country have used their bogus 2020 election fraud claims to enact 33 new laws that will make it harder for Americans to vote. We can't overstate this: The GOP launched an all-out assault on our democracy, and we need to act fast. That's why Conor is making the preservation of our fundamental right to vote a priority for this campaign. Earlier this year, he proudly cast his vote for The John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, a bill that would restore and expand voter protections significantly. And, to get this vital legislation passed, Conor is ready to abolish the filibuster \-- an antiquated rule that is hindering our progress on countless issues, especially voting rights. Our democracy is facing an existential threat from the GOP, friend. Now more than ever, we need leaders who will take these threats seriously. = = Thanks for being part of this. \-- Team Lamb *

Adam Schiff doctored a text message from me and presented it as evidence against Meadows in front of The Select Committee!

| [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=263ae64ae7fb48a9adc3665826fa7297&_e=tajBJjPirh-6iwTTRwfe6F7vqepO7xpN8YaX7uL2xU0YHSgR9ttxt3Go7tq9bNszLdrpi26YloSj4PxnDBr4d0jtwIhde8brcXOnEHeWp0s-Wm48RcEV-tHSs971aggKFq_TiRUbhfIqCKg7-NUAeGLDUyIb8TOV8SVzHSRnedPRGaGdT9n_qO3-OPOQrSNe0N7yKrJSKGlYA9cQAyuwrStD7vIx_4iIwp_DwMFz5zc8W37buDIeIRfsHeIgcuyAzr7PkIvdmRuc0wX6UgWXdfhwrH16DBZS8vNS62aoAetXhbrw5pQYisz_tIZWOEGxufCjW_5JRkI9fu8wymMvW-KM8Atij26QS4g-sN3vPjo%3D)
