Fellow American,

Do you know Democrats’ favorite thing to do? **Deflect**.

They don’t want to talk about the border crisis.

They don’t want to talk about record inflation.

**They don’t want to talk about the Justice Department intimidating parents at school board meetings**.

The Democrat led house voted to hold my good friend Mark Meadows in contempt of Congress. **Not only was this a sham vote** , but it came out right before we all find out a big piece of “evidence” Democrats used to support their case was **doctored by Adam Schiff**.

You heard that right. **Adam Schiff doctored a text message presented it as evidence against Meadows in front of The Select Committee!** Then, when good honest journalists asked The Select Committee, they were forced to admit that the messages were doctored “inadvertently.”

UNBELIEVABLE.

[**STAND WITH ME AGAINST ABUSE OF POWER
DONATE TODAY ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=263ae64ae7fb48a9adc3665826fa7297&_e=tajBJjPirh-6iwTTRwfe6F7vqepO7xpN8YaX7uL2xU0YHSgR9ttxt3Go7tq9bNszLdrpi26YloSj4PxnDBr4d0jtwIhde8brcXOnEHeWp0s-Wm48RcEV-tHSs971aggKFq_TiRUbhfIqCKg7-NUAeDIyoc0dYEUfUtMI976BIadpQDXXtRIWuST9JgZU93gh7JaCkV8kvKV9fDiv4f3DWHMKcKviulQaL8VixKLw681ew8zayNeZylubbqjZhvb1OHY1ufI1XG608hBiSu_fzfrIyPaVQhw09nMfJuruzmYu1kQGznRIXBXXcogCjAGYYfUQB1CYCseu2PUbdzlHmPg-c2zorRZyKVKaTc4qW5I%3D)
Mark Meadows made a good faith effort to work with the select committee; he provided thousands of pages of texts and emails, but they kept moving the goal posts.

**NOW** , the select committee, which if you recall is only composed of members hand-picked by Nancy Pelosi, and the radical left in congress threw the book at him. They want to send a good man, who did nothing wrong, to jail!

This is just another example of Democrats’ abusing their authority. This is another example why it’s paramount we take back the House next year.

I guarantee you that this statement which I've just made is going to put a target on my back. I really don’t care. What I do care about is being able to continue fighting on your behalf. I'm willing to take on the most powerful interests to do what's right, **[will you let me know that you want me to continue speaking up by sending a gift of $5 or more today to my reelection campaign?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=263ae64ae7fb48a9adc3665826fa7297&_e=tajBJjPirh-6iwTTRwfe6F7vqepO7xpN8YaX7uL2xU0YHSgR9ttxt3Go7tq9bNszLdrpi26YloSj4PxnDBr4d0jtwIhde8brcXOnEHeWp0s-Wm48RcEV-tHSs971aggKFq_TiRUbhfIqCKg7-NUAeB_kihE9kP6QBSNgEj0-92jn603f73RDu404Gv0q23_s7AXifJDeyGbzhELPkCvpxe0B6gSaP138LJlgsq40pQTk5IvV9-LYPjUeQBYJtH8xTtJP2S9ofp6wipZLlrOCqvMPhYxWkNElv9xaIPVeLghqmYpbbfJ6N-6xz1YBlyX-vAN_vVue1Jvnd78J7spVMgPONpaGtIq6-DqWQOmAX5g%3D) **

clean_body: Adam Schiff doctored a text message from me and presented it as evidence against Meadows in front of The Select Committee! | Fellow American, Do you know Democrats’ favorite thing to do? Deflect. They don’t want to talk about the border crisis. They don’t want to talk about record inflation. They don’t want to talk about the Justice Department intimidating parents at school board meetings. The Democrat led house voted to hold my good friend Mark Meadows in contempt of Congress. Not only was this a sham vote , but it came out right before we all find out a big piece of “evidence” Democrats used to support their case was doctored by Adam Schiff. You heard that right. Adam Schiff doctored a text message presented it as evidence against Meadows in front of The Select Committee! Then, when good honest journalists asked The Select Committee, they were forced to admit that the messages were doctored “inadvertently.” UNBELIEVABLE. Mark Meadows made a good faith effort to work with the select committee; he provided thousands of pages of texts and emails, but they kept moving the goal posts. NOW , the select committee, which if you recall is only composed of members hand-picked by Nancy Pelosi, and the radical left in congress threw the book at him. They want to send a good man, who did nothing wrong, to jail! This is just another example of Democrats’ abusing their authority. This is another example why it’s paramount we take back the House next year. I guarantee you that this statement which I've just made is going to put a target on my back. I really don’t care. What I do care about is being able to continue fighting on your behalf. I'm willing to take on the most powerful interests to do what's right, Thanks for your support, Jim Jordan | | As the ranking Republican member on the House of Representatives Judiciary Committee, Jordan is leading the fight to hold Washington accountable. ---|--- | ---|--- | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

| | Hi folks, Looking back on the last three years, I can’t help but be so proud of everything Steve has accomplished. From navigating through a global pandemic to passing public health insurance, Nevada has made huge progress. When we fought in 2018 to elect Steve as Nevada's first Democratic governor in two decades, some said it was a “blue wave” fluke. Some said it was an accident and that Nevada was sure to flip red in 2022. It wasn’t a fluke. For the past three years, we’ve continued to build our grassroots coalition, passed historic legislation, and kept our swing state blue in 2020. And after the strides we’ve made in the last 3 years, we refuse to be written off as an accidental success. **Nevada needs a Governor fighting for working families,_and Steve is that Governor._** As we enter one of the most competitive election years to date, I know that we still have so much to do. We have to stand together to hold on to the progress we’ve made. **[Steve’s big end-of-year public fundraising deadline is fast approaching. clean_body: | | | | | Hi folks, Looking back on the last three years, I can’t help but be so proud of everything Steve has accomplished. From navigating through a global pandemic to passing public health insurance, Nevada has made huge progress. When we fought in 2018 to elect Steve as Nevada's first Democratic governor in two decades, some said it was a “blue wave” fluke. Some said it was an accident and that Nevada was sure to flip red in 2022. It wasn’t a fluke. For the past three years, we’ve continued to build our grassroots coalition, passed historic legislation, and kept our swing state blue in 2020. And after the strides we’ve made in the last 3 years, we refuse to be written off as an accidental success. Nevada needs a Governor fighting for working families,and Steve is that Governor. As we enter one of the most competitive election years to date, I know that we still have so much to do. We have to stand together to hold on to the progress we’ve made. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you, Kathy Sisolak First Lady of Nevada | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. Friend, If you’re in the Denver area, you may have seen the latest wave of dark money attack ads against Michael currently flooding the airwaves. A dark money group associated with big drug companies just spent six-figures on TV ads attacking Michael for fighting to make prescription drug prices more affordable. For years, Michael has been working to allow Medicare to negotiate lower drug prices, and now that he’s continuing to fight to lower prescription drug costs, powerful corporate special interests are attacking Michael. The truth is, this is possible because of the broken campaign finance system, created by _Citizens United,_ that allows big corporations to spend unlimited amounts of money to influence our elections. Michael has had enough. That’s why he’s fighting to overturn _Citizens United_ and crack down on dark money in politics, and it’s why he doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. In the meantime, this attack ad is just one of many that dark money groups will level against Michael as the midterms get closer, and we need to be prepared with the resources necessary to fight back. So, we’re stepping up our fundraising goal for the rest of the year and need your help. **Michael doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists because he works for you. But that also means he relies on his grassroots donors (folks like you!) to power this campaign. Michael has had enough. That’s why he’s fighting to overturn Citizens United and crack down on dark money in politics, and it’s why he doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists. In the meantime, this attack ad is just one of many that dark money groups will level against Michael as the midterms get closer, and we need to be prepared with the resources necessary to fight back. So, we’re stepping up our fundraising goal for the rest of the year and need your help. Michael doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists because he works for you. But that also means he relies on his grassroots donors (folks like you!) to power this campaign. That’s why we’re asking: Can you chip in $10 so we can fight back against big attack ads like this one? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= Thanks in advance for whatever you are able to give. — Team Bennet Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

clean_body: If you like what you hear, be sure to leave a 5-star rating and a positive review! | | In this podcast we bring the best of the most recent episodes from This is Living. We reflect on the challenges and rewards of raising boys, Erin's deeply personal story of loss, sorrow, and hope, and receive a timely reminder of how the Christ-child changes everything! If you've missed any of the previous episodes of This Is Living, check the bottom of the email — there are links to all eight episodes! To listen to this week's episode, click the link and listen! If you like what you hear, be sure to leave a 5-star rating and a positive review! Ratings and reviews help more people see the podcast! Listen To Previous Episodes 🔊 🔊 🔊 🔊 🔊 🔊 🔊 🔊 God Bless, Josh Hawley | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

**[BREAKING: NEW YORK IS ALLOWING ILLEGAL ALIENS TO VOTE](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68036%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WPt64QymqBtrSaTXKvtSyw&sysid=1)**

Friend,

_**The future of our democracy is AT RISK.**_

Democrats saw all the shady acts they were able to get away with in the 2020 Election (FRAUD???), and now they are ramping up the corruption to levels UNSEEN before.

They've seen the writing on the wall: they will LOSE their majority next year, and now they are getting SO desperate to win, that they are allowing ILLEGAL ALIENS to vote.

**If it wasn't already clear: WE NEED TO PROTECT OUR ELECTIONS, Friend.**

_If we don't fight this corruption now, we won't have a country for much longer. I need you to FIGHT BACK and protect our elections before it's too late._

**[Please contribute at least $25 or more IMMEDIATELY to the Protect our Elections Fund and save our Democracy. >>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68037%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bSnr4%2bf9PIKVH5JrRdXAWA&sysid=1)**

In 2020, Democrats attempted to hide their corruption behind closed doors. Now, they are doing it out in the open, **_for all the world to see._**

This is the _**greatest threat**_ our country has ever seen. I am fighting to protect our elections every day but I cannot Save American democracy alone. I need you to join me in the fight for the _future of America._

Friend, I will be reviewing the list of Patriots who stepped up to defend America. I need to know your name will be there.

More than 25 years ago, I met a young Brad Pfaff -- salt of the earth, honest, earnest, smart and hard working. Growing up on a farm, Brad wore the values of grit, respect for nature and hard work, and sense of community on his sleeve and he lived those values too.

His relatability and authenticity were real assets to my office, and his knowledge set a gold standard for the kind of assistance we were able to provide to rural communities all over Wisconsin.

Today, that is still exactly who Brad is -- which explains how that first job with my office turned into a career in public service -- and exactly why we need him in Congress.

But Brad faces a tough campaign. If we’re going to elect him, he needs all of us standing with him now before his public end-of-year deadline. And he just told me that right now he’s still $10,000 short of his goal.

The past four years almost broke our country but thankfully, the last presidential election helped us avoid total disaster. The country still has much work and healing to do. We need people in Congress who can help restore those same values Brad showed me the day I first met him and has continued to put back into public service throughout his career.

Most of you probably know that I don’t like asking for money. But I know how important this election is going to be for our state -- and country. We have to hold onto this seat and we need good people like Brad Pfaff in it. That’s why I am proud to give him my full support, but he needs all of our help to get the job done.

Let’s send Brad to Washington for a better 3rd district, a better Wisconsin and hopefully, to maintain the House majority too.

**[Chip in $5 to his campaign today before his public end-of-year deadline>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39878676/321822418/1409037937?refcode=ABD_EM_FR_2021.12.20_b1_herb-kohl_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_fr_2021.12.20_b1_herb-kohl_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDc3ODE2Yi1lNDYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8DsZ0AXtVES1gyusPQX6E0XFOckupaLfeCm0Y8um8VM=)**

clean_body: I know how important this election is going to be for our state -- and country. | = = Friends -- More than 25 years ago, I met a young Brad Pfaff -- salt of the earth, honest, earnest, smart and hard working. Growing up on a farm, Brad wore the values of grit, respect for nature and hard work, and sense of community on his sleeve and he lived those values too. His relatability and authenticity were real assets to my office, and his knowledge set a gold standard for the kind of assistance we were able to provide to rural communities all over Wisconsin. Today, that is still exactly who Brad is -- which explains how that first job with my office turned into a career in public service -- and exactly why we need him in Congress. But Brad faces a tough campaign. If we’re going to elect him, he needs all of us standing with him now before his public end-of-year deadline. And he just told me that right now he’s still $10,000 short of his goal. = | = = = = = = The past four years almost broke our country but thankfully, the last presidential election helped us avoid total disaster. The country still has much work and healing to do. We need people in Congress who can help restore those same values Brad showed me the day I first met him and has continued to put back into public service throughout his career. Most of you probably know that I don’t like asking for money. But I know how important this election is going to be for our state -- and country. We have to hold onto this seat and we need good people like Brad Pfaff in it. That’s why I am proud to give him my full support, but he needs all of our help to get the job done. Let’s send Brad to Washington for a better 3rd district, a better Wisconsin and hopefully, to maintain the House majority too. = Thanks for reading, Senator Herb Kohl Former US Senator, WI | | Paid for by Pfaff for Congress This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Pfaff for Congress PO Box 3606 La Crosse, WI 54602 United States If you would like to receive only our most important emails, If you no longer wish to receive emails please .

subject: Urge President Biden and Congress to expand the Supreme Court
body:

| | | Our current Supreme Court is an existential threat to our rights and every progressive priority on the Biden agenda. With Trump’s 3 conservative justices on the Supreme Court, voting rights, abortion rights, and more are on the chopping block. The only way to protect our fundamental rights and save our democracy is to expand the Supreme Court and restore balance with additional seats. It’s been done before, and we can do it again! This is so important – we need everyone on board to dial up the public pressure. Add your name now: [Urge President Biden and Congress to pass the Judiciary Act of 2021 to Expand the Supreme Court >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1800a320-43c0-43ae-af05-95138fd7d59e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z0b3u15pn1f6omd4cuqce0otmu2brvkfouussc98_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1j69ob2c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zojuljlc3in0qi2c1f9t2tfeo0utlrtighloo288_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1j69ob2c1h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zbhuk77mvbgkn3r0p318alqug82015tn9up7ks9g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1j69ob2c1h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

name: Robin Logsdon
subject: tough decisions
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Matt West for Congress
body:
I need to raise $3,000 before the end of the day to get us back on track. | Team: I’ll be candid with you – part of my job as campaign manager is making tough decisions. And after talking to my digital team, it was clear: **Matt MUST go online early with a series of ad campaigns to get our message out and build a coalition of progressive supporters – even if we don’t have it in the budget right now.** I know Matt well. He’s exactly the leader our district needs, a progressive with bold solutions and the work ethic to get sh*t done. Our ads help supporters get to know the Matt that I know. They are _critical_ to our path to victory. That’s why I just authorized a $3,000 digital buy, and now, I have to do the other tough part of my job: balance our budget. I’m reaching out to you right now with an urgent request. I need your help to close our $3,000 budget gap and keep our new ads online. **_[Please, I wouldn’t be asking if this wasn’t critical to the future of our campaign – and Congress. name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Tell us about your Christmas memories!
body:
| |
---
Christmas Eve has always been as memorable as Christmas Day in my family. Since my father is a United Methodist minister, we spent Christmas Eve at church most, if not all day. As the congregation size of his churches increased, the amount of time at church on Christmas Eve also increased.

Some years, he had services morning, afternoon, early evening, and midnight with as many as five services in the sanctuary and two consecutive services in the chapel. You might think that kind of work on Christmas Eve is tough on a minister and his family. Instead, it was a labor of love, and my family would not have had it any other way.

As a child, singing Silent Night as the candles are were lit was my favorite part of any church service for the entire year. The candlelight service on Christmas Eve remains my favorite church service to this day.

Christmas Day and opening gifts are fun, but the gifts are fleeting all too often. However, a congregation singing Silent Night, Holy Night acapella as everyone lifts their candle high reminds me of the precious gift of Christ that God gave us and of His everlasting love.

After church, we would go home to get ready for Santa. My family's "traditional" meal at Christmas might not be traditional to some families but was born out of necessity since we spent so many hours at the church. My mom cooked steak and shrimp for us on Christmas Eve, which eventually shifted to Christmas Day when the church services became so numerous. That remains the Christmas Day meal to this day when my parents, siblings, and our respective families gather together.

My children and I created our own traditions too. First, we attend the Candlelight Service on Christmas Eve. Then we come home to get ready for Santa and Christmas Day.

After church, my kids and I make "Baked North Pole.” Any day other than Christmas Eve, we call this dessert Baked Alaska, but on Christmas Eve, we call it Baked North Pole.

Once my twins were old enough to eat ice cream and cake, we prepared this magical dessert. When my children were young, they enjoyed watching the preparation. Then, once they were in high school, they began helping me cook it. I’m including my recipe below, in case you’d like to try it with your family this year.

We always serve it with hot chocolate, even when it is a warm Christmas, which sometimes happens when you live in Atlanta.

**_What are the special traditions in your family? How do you celebrate the birth of Christ? Or, if you are Jewish, how do you celebrate Hanukkah? What is your favorite tradition at this time of year? Reply to this email and share your memories, traditions, and recipes with us. _**

Merry Christmas and Happy Hanukkah!

Jenny Beth Martin
|
---
**Baked North Pole Recipe**

**I ngredients:**
4 egg whites
dash of salt
dash of cream of tartar (found in the baking aisle with spices, not necessary but does help stabilize the meringue)
1 cup sugar
Angel food cake (works best if the cake is several days old)
Ice cream (any flavor, we use vanilla)
Peppermint Stick

**Directions:**

**_To Make Meringue:_**
Beat 4 egg whites with a dash of salt and cream of tartar until they hold a soft shape.
Add 1 cup sugar, a little at a time, and continue beating until meringue stands in peaks.

**_Preparation Method Option 1:_**
Cover a wooden chopping board with heavy brown paper. (If no board, use a cookie sheet and several layers of brown paper.)
Place a layer of angel food cake, cut at least 1 inch thick, on the paper.
Then place a solid brick of ice cream in the center of the cake, ensuring the cake extends at least 1/2 inch beyond the ice cream all around.
Cover ice cream and cake completely with a thick coating of meringue.
Place in a preheated 500-degree oven for 3-5 minutes or until the meringue is golden colored.
Top each serving with a peppermint stick.
The meringue serves as insulation and must cover the even corners of ice cream. The oven **MUST be preheated,** so the time of browning the meringue is as short as possible.

**_Preparation Method Option 2 (preferred method):_**
Place a layer of angel food cake cut at least 1 inch thick on the serving plate.
Then place a solid brick of ice cream (any flavor) in the center of the cake, ensuring the cake extends at least 1/2 inch beyond the ice cream all around.
Cover ice cream and cake completely with a thick coating of meringue.
Use a butane torch to cook and toast the outside of the meringue until the meringue is golden colored.
Top each serving with a peppermint stick.

_Serves 6 – 8_

Everywhere he travels, thousands of America First Patriots line up to see him speak the truth about the Democrats and the Fake News Media. Well, Peter... we have good news! \-- and President Trump needs your help to make them a success. We’re need YOU to do your part to make sure he has the necessary funds to keep meeting with the American People. Will you help, Peter? Or have you given up? | | | | | | When President Trump holds his SAVE AMERICA RALLIES , people take notice. The press, the Democrats... EVERYONE stops to listen to what he has to say, and they know he means it. But without Grassroots Republican support, he can’t continue to hold rallies indefinitely. body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39872616/321791571/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Nzg1ZjE5NS1jMjYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KsarIbE8ZrJ3zu5qcrLhfB5eOTyMHdG-5js-qwK_IFA=) Hello friend! Or as we say in our Blackfeet language, _Oki!_

If we haven’t met yet, I'm Marci McLean. I’m Amskapi Piikani / Blackfeet, I work in Native advocacy and education here in Montana, and I’m proud to call myself a day one endorser of Cora’s campaign.

Native Americans have suffered some of the highest COVID death rates in the country, and Montana’s own Blackfeet Nation was hit particularly hard.

From the beginning, Cora was on the frontlines working side-by-side with our communities to make sure we had a voice at the table and were prioritized in the state’s COVID-19 response. She did more than any one individual in our state to deliver critical relief, guidance and care to our Tribal communities throughout this crisis. She helped fill a void that no one else could.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39872617/321791572/102973118?refcode=em-122021-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5Nzg1ZjE5NS1jMjYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KsarIbE8ZrJ3zu5qcrLhfB5eOTyMHdG-5js-qwK_IFA=)
Cora’s been partnering with Indigenous communities for decades. She understands and respects the importance of Tribal consultation and government-to-government relations.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: The wrong people are in office
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
One vote could make all the difference when it comes to winning back the Senate majority. |
---
Fellow Conservative,

It's hard to believe what's on television each day.

Government officials are _mandating this._ They're _controlling that._ It's unlike anything we've ever seen before in America.

But if we're being honest right now, _**we know the wrong people are in office.**_

And it's time for that to change.

**One victory. One seat.** One vote could make all the difference when all is said and done. If we don't give it our absolute 100% effort now, well then, **we risk falling short of flipping Georgia's Senate seat red.**

clean_body: One vote could make all the difference when it comes to winning back the Senate majority. | Fellow Conservative, It's hard to believe what's on television each day. Government officials are mandating this. They're controlling that. It's unlike anything we've ever seen before in America. But if we're being honest right now, we know the wrong people are in office. And it's time for that to change. One victory. One seat. One vote could make all the difference when all is said and done. If we don't give it our absolute 100% effort now, well then, we risk falling short of flipping Georgia's Senate seat red. There are now just a few days until our year-end fundraising deadline (the last of 2021), and we are asking you to do what you can to help preserve the freedoms our ancestors fought for. With sincere thanks, Herschel Walker P.S. With everyone rightfully focused this week on Christmas, travel plans, and time with family, fundraising always slows considerably. | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Merry Christmas from #TeamScheller!

I have some important updates for you #TeamScheller! Earlier this month, I joined several other female candidates in DC for the announcement of the first round of EPAC endorsements and to join a panel highlighting Conservative female candidates hosted by Right Now Women! Last cycle, we saw a record amount of female candidates elected to the House and I look forward to continuing that trend!

More than ever, Republican women are stepping up across the country in record numbers I might add to be a part of the solution. This year alone over 200 Republican women have announced they are running for Congress and I was one of the top 8 included in this rollout!

Being a woman doesn't define us as candidates but more conservative female leaders in Washington will help get this nation back on track.

Join me and let's be part of the solution!

-Lisa

[ | |
---|---|--- ](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=c102a11b04a24ce994c5b15e65465fdf&_e=LO1U9t9Rgo9m1xEu59TFZpyVesynrLd_7AmZRuu3Bm-KOnSQ3B_SHSo5mst3Db6g49Uw5ygPzIKd1RFEkXhCFGjLYMLmAxLgCU3WdzTFwuABs71irZutSAVlkyxf6bJvcu3XINtlgLkf4xRAWY6TdxYhqyb_ngFsPcbHALRAcNFeIfPq8rgRTtvqiVe73MSve3Bq1fSssAKF7bxcBdKlXUhI1pR4TgUYvadV1dkmP76aAB2GC48eVV38zSG_fZaPRNZyV7Hq1Sye7sj4InhU4w%3D%3D)
|
---
**Soaring Energy Prices **

As we approach Christmas, inflation and rising energy prices are on the mind of everyone. I just filled up my car with gas this past week as were most of you I am sure and was appalled at the price when I was done. The Democrat party in Washington has no plan to fix the surging prices at the pump, besides small gimmicks meant to trick the American people. _Take a look at the image shared by the Democrat Congressional Campaign Committee highlighting that because of this gimmick, the price of gas has gone down a whopping **2****cents**_ during the past week because of a short term gimmick used by Biden's administration while ignoring the fact that the price of gas has surged over the past year because of the anti-energy policies championed by woke progressives like Susan Wild.

Below the Democrat's graphic is an actual graph of how gas prices have soared under Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Susan Wild's Leadership. It is apparent that Democrats in Washington have no desire to fix the soaring prices at the pump for Americans.

|
---
**The Southern Border**

This week, the Biden Administration finally announced that they would reinstate the "Stay in Mexico" policy in regard to illegal immigration at our Southern Border. I personally don't understand why it took so long to take any action regarding the crisis currently taking place at our Southern Border. What's worse is that Susan Wild has stood idly by as the crisis at our Southern Border continues.

The crisis affects all Americans in many ways but the biggest by far is how it fuels our ongoing opioid epidemic during a time where we have seen over 100,000 deaths in the past year from opioids. During that same time, enough fentanyl has come across the Southern Border to kill every American 4x over. Enough is enough. It is time to get this crisis under control and Susan Wild has shown through inaction that she is more concerned with appeasing the radical left through open borders than solving a crisis affecting everyday Americans.
|
---
**Sit Down with Scheller!**

Welcome to my new series, Sit Down with Scheller where I’ll be exploring the issues that our right here in our district with members of our community. Stay tuned for more to come!

[ | |

Earlier this month, I joined several other female candidates in DC for the announcement of the first round of EPAC endorsements and to join a panel highlighting Conservative female candidates hosted by Right Now Women! Last cycle, we saw a record amount of female candidates elected to the House and I look forward to continuing that trend! More than ever, Republican women are stepping up across the country in record numbers I might add to be a part of the solution. This year alone over 200 Republican women have announced they are running for Congress and I was one of the top 8 included in this rollout! Being a woman doesn't define us as candidates but more conservative female leaders in Washington will help get this nation back on track. Join me and let's be part of the solution! -Lisa | Soaring Energy Prices As we approach Christmas, inflation and rising energy prices are on the mind of everyone. I just filled up my car with gas this past week as were most of you I am sure and was appalled at the price when I was done. The Democrat party in Washington has no plan to fix the surging prices at the pump, besides small gimmicks meant to trick the American people. Take a look at the image shared by the Democrat Congressional Campaign Committee highlighting that because of this gimmick, the price of gas has gone down a whopping 2cents during the past week because of a short term gimmick used by Biden's administration while ignoring the fact that the price of gas has surged over the past year because of the anti-energy policies championed by woke progressives like Susan Wild. Below the Democrat's graphic is an actual graph of how gas prices have soared under Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Susan Wild's Leadership. It is apparent that Democrats in Washington have no desire to fix the soaring prices at the pump for Americans. | The Southern Border This week, the Biden Administration finally announced that they would reinstate the "Stay in Mexico" policy in regard to illegal immigration at our Southern Border. I personally don't understand why it took so long to take any action regarding the crisis currently taking place at our Southern Border. What's worse is that Susan Wild has stood idly by as the crisis at our Southern Border continues. The crisis affects all Americans in many ways but the biggest by far is how it fuels our ongoing opioid epidemic during a time where we have seen over 100,000 deaths in the past year from opioids. During that same time, enough fentanyl has come across the Southern Border to kill every American 4x over. Enough is enough. It is time to get this crisis under control and Susan Wild has shown through inaction that she is more concerned with appeasing the radical left through open borders than solving a crisis affecting everyday Americans. | Sit Down with Scheller! Welcome to my new series, Sit Down with Scheller where I’ll be exploring the issues that our right here in our district with members of our community. Stay tuned for more to come! | Photos from the Campaign! EPAC EVENT IN DC! Right Now Women Panel! Slate Belt Republican Association Christmas Party Detzi's Meet and Greet! Southern Lehigh Grassroots Christmas Party Northampton County Republican Women Christmas Party Other Photos From Around the District! | | As always, be sure to keep an eye out for future updates from the campaign and future events! Onward to victory, Team Scheller | Check out our Social Media Pages! | | ---|--- PAID FOR BY LISA SCHELLER FOR CONGRESS

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Joe Manchin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Alexandria is leading the fight to get Democrats to be bold.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211220-2693-header&t=1&akid=2693%2E2526796%2EvtG3Gr)
Alexandria warned it could happen. Yesterday, it did.
**Joe Manchin made his opposition to Build Back Better official.** The central piece of the Democratic agenda — from addressing climate change, to economic justice, and expanding health care access — doesn’t have the votes.
But, we cannot give into despair. Not when so much is on the line for so many working families. **Democrats need to take the kid gloves off and start using our power to govern.**
The president and congressional leadership can call votes, take executive action, and use a myriad of tools to get things done. There is an enormous amount that the White House can do on climate, student debt, immigration, cannabis, health care, and more. But we don’t have much time left before the midterm elections.
**Alexandria is leading the fight to get Democrats to be bold.** And she’s able to do that, because your grassroots support keeps her in Congress fighting for all of us.
[Will you donate $3 today to show Alexandria we have her back as she pushes the Democrats to make real tangible change for working families? Every dollar we raise helps us build this movement.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211220?refcode=em20211220-2693-P_FND_EGR_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2693_2526796_vtG3Gr&akid=2693%2E2526796%2EvtG3Gr)
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211220?refcode=em20211220-2693-P_FND_EGR_LEG&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2693_2526796_vtG3Gr&akid=2693%2E2526796%2EvtG3Gr)**
When Alexandria uses her bully pulpit in Congress or in the media to push for stronger Democratic leadership, people listen. They listen because they know that it’s not just one person speaking. _It’s a movement speaking._
Thank you for being in the fight with us.
\- Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211220?refcode=em20211220-2693-P_FND_EGR_LEG&t=22&refcode2=2693_2526796_vtG3Gr&akid=2693%2E2526796%2EvtG3Gr)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211220-2693-P_FND_EGR_LEG&t=23&akid=2693%2E2526796%2EvtG3Gr)**

| | | On Sunday, corporate Democrat and millionaire coal baron Sen. Joe Manchin told Fox News that he's voting NO on Build Back Better.
Manchin's decision raises taxes on millions of families by killing the Child Tax Credit. It stops desperately needed investment in climate, and shatters Democratic campaign promises to lower prescription drug prices and pass universal paid leave.
**Melanie D'Arrigo is running for Congress as a true progressive because the further the Democratic Party moves to the right, the less it represents the interests of our families.**

subject: 29 Donors Short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DEJA FOR PA _
body:
Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. | | | | [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=6fc65e2f91&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | | Friends,

As a grassroots campaign, we rely on individual donations to meet our fundraising goal by the end-of-year filing deadline in just 10 days. We need to show strong support from a wide range of individual donors, and we are just 29 short of our goal. **[If you can make your first contribution today, it will make a big difference in our fundraising reporting at the end of this year.](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=1002679f88&e=3f8e2ea1e3) **

Winning this race will take enough money to get our message to every resident and business in the district. Your support now will help ensure we have the resources to bring a strong voice to Harrisburg, fighting for healthcare reform, improved infrastructure, fully-funded public education, the creation of more family-sustaining union jobs, and policies that address economic resurgence in the district. Thank you for joining the movement and investing in our historic run. _Deja_
---
|
### Can You Chip in $10 to Help Ensure a
House that Represents You?
---
| [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=2b48a73c8a&e=3f8e2ea1e3)
---
| | _Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives in the 182nd District. With more than a decade of experience in the nonprofit and public health field, Deja is committed to building on progressive values, economic recovery, and historic LGBTQ representation in Harrisburg. In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District. Join us as we get the work done. [www.dejaforpa.com](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=36a04ab980&e=3f8e2ea1e3)_

clean_body: Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. | | | | | | | Friends, As a grassroots campaign, we rely on individual donations to meet our fundraising goal by the end-of-year filing deadline in just 10 days. We need to show strong support from a wide range of individual donors, and we are just 29 short of our goal. Winning this race will take enough money to get our message to every resident and business in the district. Your support now will help ensure we have the resources to bring a strong voice to Harrisburg, fighting for healthcare reform, improved infrastructure, fully-funded public education, the creation of more family-sustaining union jobs, and policies that address economic resurgence in the district. Thank you for joining the movement and investing in our historic run. Deja | Can You Chip in $10 to Help Ensure a House that Represents You? | | | Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives in the 182nd District. With more than a decade of experience in the nonprofit and public health field, Deja is committed to building on progressive values, economic recovery, and historic LGBTQ representation in Harrisburg. In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District. Join us as we get the work done. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | © 2021 Paid for by DEJA FOR PA Our mailing address is: DEJA FOR PA PO BOX 63953 PHILADELPHIA, PA 19147 Want to change how you receive these emails? name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Something has happened
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
You may not know this, but the overwhelming majority of contributions to our campaign come from online donors. I’ll be the first to admit, emails like this can get annoying, but they’re a critical part of the work we’re doing to replace Ron Johnson with someone who can actually be trusted to do what's right by Wisconsin workers and families.

**Something really strange has happened though...** My campaign staff says our fundraising is significantly lower than last month. Fewer people are opening these messages and even fewer are pitching in lately.

I’m not surprised to hear this. Most campaigns expect a dip in their numbers around the holidays because folks are either traveling or spending quality time with loved ones.

The problem is, this fundraising slump has hit us at a strange time. You see, Ron Johnson is expected to make a big re-election announcement very soon, just as a new poll shows we’re the only Democratic campaign that can beat him in a head-to-head match up.

Election experts at _CNN_ and _Roll Call_ have already called him the most vulnerable Republican incumbent, and _The Cook Political Report_ upgraded our race from Lean R to a Toss-Up. The guy is in serious trouble, and we’re the ones to take him down.

It’s clear we’re making Ron Johnson nervous. One publication even said he was “scared” of me — and honestly, he should be! I have a track record of defeating powerful Republicans in statewide elections. I can beat him, too. But we’re on track to miss our most important goal of the year, which means I need to ask you to step up.

[**I would really appreciate it if you could rush a donation of any amount toward our final FEC goal ahead of the December 31 deadline. Every dollar gives us the early resources we need to build a strong campaign and fight Republican efforts to reclaim the Senate majority. clean_body: You may not know this, but the overwhelming majority of contributions to our campaign come from online donors. I’ll be the first to admit, emails like this can get annoying, but they’re a critical part of the work we’re doing to replace Ron Johnson with someone who can actually be trusted to do what's right by Wisconsin workers and families. Something really strange has happened though... My campaign staff says our fundraising is significantly lower than last month. Fewer people are opening these messages and even fewer are pitching in lately. I’m not surprised to hear this. Most campaigns expect a dip in their numbers around the holidays because folks are either traveling or spending quality time with loved ones. The problem is, this fundraising slump has hit us at a strange time. You see, Ron Johnson is expected to make a big re-election announcement very soon, just as a new poll shows we’re the only Democratic campaign that can beat him in a head-to-head match up. Election experts at CNN and Roll Call have already called him the most vulnerable Republican incumbent, and The Cook Political Report upgraded our race from Lean R to a Toss-Up. The guy is in serious trouble, and we’re the ones to take him down. It’s clear we’re making Ron Johnson nervous. One publication even said he was “scared” of me — and honestly, he should be! I have a track record of defeating powerful Republicans in statewide elections. I can beat him, too. But we’re on track to miss our most important goal of the year, which means I need to ask you to step up. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for standing with me and supporting my campaign. Hello,
Yesterday, Senator Joe Manchin went on Fox News and said that he will NOT vote for President Joe Biden’s Build Back Better plan. Please, Senator Manchin... you must do better for your impoverished state, this nation, and the Democratic Party.
And Senator, if you think you will lose reelection because you voted for this bill, then make that sacrifice. Consider it a small consequence for improved prosperity for those who need it.
Let’s be clear about what is in this bill:
* Extending the child care tax credit – cutting child poverty in half;

* The largest investment ever to combat the climate crisis;

* Universal Pre-K for every American child and family;

* Expanding Medicare to include hearing aids and finally allowing Medicare to negotiate drug prices;

* Providing paid family leave to bring the United States up to speed with every other developed country in the world;

* And a raft of other programs that would benefit countless everyday families and farmers here in Iowa and across the country.

**This bill is 100% paid for so stop with the "debt" objections.** Billionaires and corporations have been avoiding paying taxes for decades. They can afford another few pennies on the dollar to make this investment in America’s families and workers.
And by every measure, Biden’s Build Back Better program will help _slow_ inflation – not make it worse. As a three-star Admiral with experience in legislative affairs, strategy, military purchasing, and engagements overseas, I don’t remember hearing a peep about inflation or debt when you, Joe Manchin, voted for a $25 billion kicker to the defense budget just days ago. Not a peep.
**I’m running for Senate against Chuck Grassley in Iowa because I am sick of Republicans acting like Trump’s lap dogs, and I am just as fed up with Democrats who are blocking us from doing anything to confront the climate crisis, take on Big Pharma, or rein in Wall Street.**
Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are going to spend millions attacking me, so I need you in this fight if we’re going to turn Iowa blue and expand our Senate majority with Democrats who will actually vote like Democrats.
[**Please, will you join my campaign today with a donation of $5, $25, or whatever you can afford to help me defeat Chuck Grassley and expand our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39879784/321827175/-42398318?refcode=em20211220pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTdkMmFkMC1lYTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kfv0JjhQ-RmYwjJLomWWcFhHVNAMb_qAF2qzi21aDFo=)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Democrats trusted Joe Manchin
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

A few weeks ago, corporate Democrats joined with Republicans to put
climate action, universal pre-K, paid leave, and Medicare expansion at
risk. The Squad voted against the political establishment, and for good
reason.

The Squad was right not to trust corporate Democrats like Joe Manchin.
Corporate Democrats promised the people they would pass Build Back Better
(BBB) if Congress just passed a bipartisan infrastructure bill (BIF)
first. Now, Manchin says he can’t support Build Back Better.

AOC has it right:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/87657?refcode=em20211220-21075&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=21075%2E1203867%2EbvEVs8 ]Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez tweet that reads 'When a handful of us in the
House warned this would happen if Dem leaders gave Manchin everything he
wanted 1st by moving BIF before BBB instead of passing together, many
ridiculed our position. Maybe they’ll believe us next time. Or maybe
people will just keep calling us naïve.' quote tweeting a report that Joe

name: Marisa Wood
subject: My reflections.
body:
I can't help but feel angry for what some of my kiddos and their families are continuing to go through. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39880024/321828082/883924314?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNTdjNDNjZC1lYzYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GygxrtWqFUkOALHtAGiuMO0wVrnRCkktZMxXyPoiStQ=)
Friend,

As many in our community celebrate the holidays, I can't help but feel angry for what some of my kiddos and their families are going through.

**I’m sure you saw the news that the future of Build Back Better is in limbo after Joe Manchin’s stunt on _Fox News_ yesterday.** This means the expanded Child Tax Credit is set to expire, which puts hundreds of dollars in parents’ pockets to help with expenses during financially tough times.

Families in the Central Valley already struggle to put food on the table. This news only adds to their hardship. Meanwhile, my opponent Kevin McCarthy is celebrating this as a victory. Frankly, it’s sickening to watch.

It’s easy to feel disheartened by this news, but this is not the time to give up. As a teacher in this community for over 20 years, I’ve seen my students overcome immense hardships to get ahead. Their stories give me strength, and I’m reminded that I’m running for Congress because they deserve much better than Kevin McCarthy.

For too long, McCarthy has been able to avoid real accountability. We're holding him accountable right now, but we can’t do this alone:

**[If you're ready to see the last of Kevin McCarthy, please chip in $3 toward my FEC end-of-quarter fundraising goal. I’m sure you saw the news that the future of Build Back Better is in limbo after Joe Manchin’s stunt on Fox News yesterday. This means the expanded Child Tax Credit is set to expire, which puts hundreds of dollars in parents’ pockets to help with expenses during financially tough times. Families in the Central Valley already struggle to put food on the table. This news only adds to their hardship. Meanwhile, my opponent Kevin McCarthy is celebrating this as a victory. Frankly, it’s sickening to watch. It’s easy to feel disheartened by this news, but this is not the time to give up. As a teacher in this community for over 20 years, I’ve seen my students overcome immense hardships to get ahead. Their stories give me strength, and I’m reminded that I’m running for Congress because they deserve much better than Kevin McCarthy. For too long, McCarthy has been able to avoid real accountability. We're holding him accountable right now, but we can’t do this alone: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for your support, Marisa = | = Marisa Wood is a public school teacher and Democrat running a historic campaign to unseat GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy in California's 23rd District. 2022 is our best shot in decades to finally defeat McCarthy. Consider supporting Marisa's campaign by = If you'd prefer to send a check, our address is: Marisa Wood for Congress, PO Box 12103, Bakersfield, CA 93389. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Marisa Wood for Congress PO Box 12103 Bakersfield, CA 93389 United States

| We need someone like Jerry in Congress, but in order for that to happen, we need your help. Team, The end of the year can be a stressful time for a lot of people, and I won’t lie, working on a campaign is definitely not a relaxing experience. But I’m happy to be in this fight, and I love waking up and going to work every morning because I believe that we need someone like Jerry in Congress. Jerry hasn’t had an easy road in life. He wasn’t born into money or into a powerful political family. Jerry’s parents gave him up when he was born because they knew they were unable to take care of him. He was put into the foster care system and bounced around from shelter to shelter until a white couple from McKeesport, Robert and Judy Dickinson, opened up their home to him and 10 other foster children from all walks of life. Jerry’s desire for community service comes from watching the people he loves most in the world battle addiction, get trapped in the criminal justice system, or struggle to make ends meet. So when he talks about racial and economic justice or making sure everyone has access to health care, he sees the faces of his loved ones. **That’s why this is so personal for him, and it’s why I know he’ll fight tooth and nail to pass policies that support the people of the Pittsburgh region.** For too many of our members of Congress, their jobs seem to be about passing the political football back and forth or even using their position as a stepping stone to become a wealthy lobbyist. That’s not what Jerry is about. We need someone like Jerry in Congress, but in order for that to happen, we need your help. [**Our big end-of-year fundraising deadline is right around the corner, and what we raise now will determine how big we can go in the leadup to the primary. Will you chip in right now to help get us there?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39880185/321828559/1205227003?refcode=em_20211220-fr-WT-eoy2-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWVhYmQ3OC1lZDYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6xbccj3JtebLUd3imrJyqNI7BVzR17n0IFpeCCAI_hw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | **[DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39880186/321828562/1205227003?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_20211220-fr-WT-eoy2-all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWVhYmQ3OC1lZDYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6xbccj3JtebLUd3imrJyqNI7BVzR17n0IFpeCCAI_hw=)**

name: Tom Winter
subject: I got Ryan Zinke a cake (really).
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WINTER FOR MONTANA
body:
Joking aside, today I’m thinking about just how dangerous Trump ally Ryan Zinke was for our state and our nation. | | | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zcK5D2zQP0BDht9Y9DvR1ws-Qma80lQuGBvlmmJNOkSWlqdIYQ0UFgJdfpdp8d-_liTWIZdx1oQ4o3d-doteF5k4mR4FMv_QQdGnrSLVtSGXapz8TsYB_EoRrT9wulhWXAKI-gX01NXPqe5M33xiubddPb9BqsbnUcdWX0tZDg1WgPuqAXaHet9R1yAgiV_AXTZVAoJhXjmOe1gMxU-awg0az5qA-w__GKhdh50VIGc9Zn40VWconJ5lZCWzrePJ8LWLSKLGi-q9J3-UogZa_7Amb-rJwnZNAISSMyDT1ohrvrNeNEhGfgJmZdu9MeN5AUXFY4LRgiusTxQ6BgZkaRzeJWXIMBD3Dn0EpAph7L-1qc_kx5jRwiELkDzgJA54U/3i0/cBANk6NrSFSF46vanOt5QQ/h0/GRmyFp0DCC2JmOXJdof-PzVnSA59fWr4hQ-M3cmms8g) Friend,

It was three years ago this week that Ryan Zinke was forced to resign as Donald Trump’s Interior Secretary. So to help celebrate this wonderful occasion, I got Zinke a cake — and no, I’m not joking: [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zcK5D2zQP0BDht9Y9DvR1ws-Qma80lQuGBvlmmJNOkSWlqdIYQ0UFgJdfpdp8d-_liTWIZdx1oQ4o3d-doteF5p6kAe42yym1QpW84RXL8ZulAyW9UEk0WTuiLLbCnaNG5oiivMbToazvq0ZNciGMJz63LyU2m2_2lgtykYBSjYNFTgBh8hSw9LwaCAl_LwDWzv2vEeMXjHozvuo-G1PWW9zVQhkl4Qbs8JqvOtuHK6oh7RPTp1OpD_WDiK1ZJLhU5KWXdAAEWZBDG6yjMtj555wWgT0PxMhcmPduX42YwM8mswhRRXDOChbclkAEx6vJ4wdklRYiUVeBzDLfku_EfF87LJhM1rGG7SAXqiDRhcjIuASLEByRbu92bcjQPyQM/3i0/cBANk6NrSFSF46vanOt5QQ/h1/k-skgf3ix0mXNfRTkHiZAhbbwCdvH-dGv_J7aI0wz24)
Fun aside, today I’m thinking about just how dangerous Ryan Zinke was for our state and our nation when he served in the Trump Administration. Whether it be pushing for offshore drilling, green lighting coal mining on public lands, attempting to sell off our public lands, or other harmful policy. Zinke *also* embarrassed our state by committing a myriad of ethics violations — like that time he spent $139,000 of our taxpayer money on an office door. (Yes, that’s true!)

**Ryan Zinke doesn’t represent our values – and we can’t risk him going to Washington again. But we’re still about $3,611 short of our grassroots fundraising goal this week._[**Can you make a donation of $3 to send a message to Zinke that we’re ready to defeat him?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zcK5D2zQP0BDht9Y9DvR1ws-Qma80lQuGBvlmmJNOkSWlqdIYQ0UFgJdfpdp8d-_liTWIZdx1oQ4o3d-doteF5aTvPi4Z_3FLcGtsJCr_0Vhmv--DuMwOID84QdlxeHFQYzQxsg2lhK3A72vMrAcaRLukX_0ALvPb5QCVUikjf1NtjlOZywQZmbJQmp8HxoDWrJsyWmSjg7xERR_T5YSANLrNIxP7LuEAwnMs47FPayVVIp-zRET3uRB2hdGEX6rVZT2nL2RUlQLivoFz0A9zWTQG6TmwkzNWC0ZNxqbET_V_z2d39jPTFJSMwJ1mTNYg-Ja8IhWF7OCOOGv089y6addLo2-Y1zfqaoQPHZI78jrH3D96n_nR9_t2hxLP_wM4/3i0/cBANk6NrSFSF46vanOt5QQ/h2/T88gSAY467ScnK-fjufhfl_u2Z_oxR8SzgWQoGSdrZE)_**
| [DONATE NOW >>](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zcK5D2zQP0BDht9Y9DvR1ws-Qma80lQuGBvlmmJNOkSWlqdIYQ0UFgJdfpdp8d-_liTWIZdx1oQ4o3d-doteF5pepFDjyCRANWvN5FzuDYmPPluGAniX0zkWQ6wDuJ12wC0iVxL4Fr4iZ28gstki_tWcaPS4j8VwXTtvpBScoHEVkgyonlerCDTjzinhT8bpXmLf7ATJcqburMNzWlHHApsR6xt5bQtcUj-qy-t6iEkLsmbDEn3mNjcY-z22uzejM_jmCQqKx-tmtKWAizzwnFA8xgWzflGnruCtFWcY5-tKF0OJaSRDs_Q9owbBNsIYb8khF8UcZYNiCcF1rjddLbqeIT3CZxEZbKkIlwCzQchWeplUS9AsJKKrYD5RSo8bM/3i0/cBANk6NrSFSF46vanOt5QQ/h3/b7LU-Q5WAy4LeKZDbMh6vYR6U0UcUxWAuyuATryD9no)
---
We’ve been watching Zinke closely, but we aren’t the only ones. Recently, the shady National Republican Congressional Committee (NRCC) placed him on their “On the Radar'' list. This means his campaign now has FULL access to the NRCC’s resources – and a direct line to GOP Leader Kevin McCarthy.
**Republicans and the NRCC would love nothing more than to welcome Ryan Zinke back to Washington with open arms, so he can continue being a puppet for their dangerous agenda — and they’re ready to do whatever it takes to make that happen.**

Our campaign, on the other hand, doesn’t rely on dark money or outside groups to help us be successful. We live and work in Montana. We depend on folks like you, making investments in our campaign because you believe in what we’re building.

**_[So please, help us reach our next grassroots fundraising goal by making a donation of $3 to ensure we can keep our campaign going strong?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zcK5D2zQP0BDht9Y9DvR1ws-Qma80lQuGBvlmmJNOkSWlqdIYQ0UFgJdfpdp8d-_liTWIZdx1oQ4o3d-doteF5vkfRO3fXtNuHe64WqdfxjrBCRS0g5XG131I2uKTgC4Qbhe7oWpafxC-HacXACFeYhf0PgiqY9d4sVqwu0M6h9n8Hck_PhtLDPRBgsyUpLt2kmlD7qrViS2qBkACe7eFjRNkVryYur7bgyxvSlhTupzdJBFU_5VZ1a1qLMYEUbw2fHIekIJnVWg_GicqeoTAx0nCb2A5mDcmEXHAlJJuXShz2ttsjU81azfhfJreDbkHVyoTkBKI8JBSGalwz7oyYE5gGfh6oItqDzgYyLqAfIQQMejdPMMBfpjkyv0BJ0C0/3i0/cBANk6NrSFSF46vanOt5QQ/h4/oIwqGnQIpdlW0vg3RGxj-RZ7UCUOaXZLp5Sb5HT82Pg)_**

Thank you,
Tom

Polson, MT
59860

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39880228/321828656/1927938479?refcode=20211220_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTc0MTk4MC1lZDYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f5agBH_pYp6BKNi_jfXYXRjfAvkifpnwqOG_3v3fiq4=)
Friends — I have an important ask to make, and Seth Moulton said I could reach out to you as one of their top supporters. I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why this is so important. **One Nation, a National Republican Super PAC, dropped another $1 MILLION on ads attacking me. It’s the latest sign they aren’t slowing down their spending against us heading into 2022.** We need your help to keep up the momentum in the face of this attack, and it’s going to take lots of people making donations of $3, $5, or $10 to get us to our 100,000 contribution goal. That is why I need your support today. Our opponents may have deep pockets, but we have something better — a team of people who I know will always have my back. And if we can hit our 100,000 contribution goal, it’ll show that this team is more determined than ever to defend this seat. You can see how important this is, which is why I have to ask: [**If you are able, will you split a $25 donation between our people-powered campaign and Seth Moulton? Friend,

With everything going on in Washington right now -- from the Build Back Better Act to the renewed call for voting rights -- I want to cut through the noise and ask you about something that's weighing heavily on me.

**The anniversary of January 6th is fast approaching. It's still jarring to recall that there was a serious, coordinated attempt to throw out the results of a legitimate election. Here in America._Let that sink in..._**

As someone who was deployed to the Middle East to protect and defend democracy, this is something I care deeply about. But, I need to know if it's something that's on your mind, and voters’ minds as well.

That's why I'm asking:

[**How important is it that members of Congress like Doug LaMalfa are investigated and held accountable for their role in the January 6th insurrection?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39873987/321797776/-835618133?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5M2UzOTlhMy1jNzYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hdsdxDg1mbjnkvI9KIlqRSqHaHC2HYqRmijPD44AnRg=&emci=2ccd729c-c761-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=93e399a3-c761-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=11663292)

Here in America.Let that sink in... As someone who was deployed to the Middle East to protect and defend democracy, this is something I care deeply about. But, I need to know if it's something that's on your mind, and voters’ minds as well. That's why I'm asking: | We just got word of a PowerPoint presentation that was circulated in the White House detailing a plan to “declare a national emergency” to overturn the 2020 election results. The PowerPoint's author, Army Colonel Phil Waldron, reportedly visited the White House several times to meet with members of Congress and Trump’s chief of staff. It’s clear that much more was going on, but I want to hear from you: Max Steiner = | = Max Steiner is a combat veteran, foreign service officer, and Democrat running to flip California's 1st District from red to blue. Consider supporting Max's campaign by = If you'd like to receive less email, add your name We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Max Steiner is a combat veteran of the Iraq War and Sergeant First Class in the Army Reserves. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense. Max Steiner for Congress 2485 Notre Dame Blvd, Ste 370 #194 Chico, CA 95928 United States

name: Team Cranley
subject: Clean energy isn’t just about the environment. It’s also about good-paying jobs.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the John Cranley Committee
body:
The clean-energy economy is the future. | **Let me be frank with you, Ohio hasn’t had hope for a long time.** We used to be a state of innovation and manufacturing. Of presidents and astronauts. Of a large, strong middle class. But years of Republican rule have run our state into the ground. This is going to be a longer email than usual, but I hope you’ll take a few minutes to read all of it because it’s clear that we need a comeback — and Ohioans deserve a governor who has already led one. **_[Our end-of-year filing deadline is approaching fast, and with it, the publication of our fundraising numbers. We need your support more than ever to prove that we have the momentum to win. If you’re ready to turn our state around, join our campaign with a donation of any size today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39880605/321831010/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.5e55eafa-f061-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.5e55eafa-f061-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTU1ZWFmYS1mMDYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cv_FRtrXyCkL9PKIAbjFfb1BtbKD43CFGZy92Sb49S0=)_** Friend, there are a couple of questions I get asked a lot on the campaign trail. **_Can Ohio really flip blue?_** **_Can you really win this race?_** Now, I’m not one to sugarcoat things and I don’t much care for BS. I know this won’t be an easy election for Democrats. I know that our campaign has a lot of work ahead. **But the fact is, the most important fights are never easy — and I’ve already done harder things.** **[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39880607/321831012/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.5e55eafa-f061-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.5e55eafa-f061-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTU1ZWFmYS1mMDYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cv_FRtrXyCkL9PKIAbjFfb1BtbKD43CFGZy92Sb49S0=)** I was raised with the understanding that to whom much is given, much is expected. That the true meaning of the Bible is to stand on the side of those in need. And that service is the highest calling. That’s why, earlier in my career, I helped found the Ohio Innocence Project, which has helped to free 33 wrongfully imprisoned Ohioans. I firmly believe that when we see something wrong, it’s our duty to do everything we can to make it right, and I’ll live up to that as governor. I will prioritize criminal justice reform — one of my highest priorities is to make Ohio a fairer state for us all. **I’ve been to most prisons in this state when I visited my Ohio Innocence Project clients. Criminal justice is personal because it affects my friends. And through my work with the Innocence Project, we’ve righted some wrongs.** Meanwhile, as mayor of Cincinnati, I turned around a city in decline. We’re growing at twice the rate of the state as a whole. We’ve cut poverty. We’ve grown Black-owned businesses and raised the minimum wage. And now I'm running for governor because the rest of the state deserves the same. **_[We _can_ win this race, friend, but only if you’re on our side. Can I count on you for a contribution before our filing deadline at the end of the year? $5, $25, or $50 — anything you can give will go a long way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39880610/321831014/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.5e55eafa-f061-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.5e55eafa-f061-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTU1ZWFmYS1mMDYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cv_FRtrXyCkL9PKIAbjFfb1BtbKD43CFGZy92Sb49S0=)_** **[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39880612/321831016/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.5e55eafa-f061-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.5e55eafa-f061-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTU1ZWFmYS1mMDYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cv_FRtrXyCkL9PKIAbjFfb1BtbKD43CFGZy92Sb49S0=)** Thank you for all your support so far. Now, let’s get this done, John [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39880614/321831018/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.5e55eafa-f061-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.5e55eafa-f061-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTU1ZWFmYS1mMDYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cv_FRtrXyCkL9PKIAbjFfb1BtbKD43CFGZy92Sb49S0=) **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39880616/321831020/-1406512299?amount=25&refcode=ea.5e55eafa-f061-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.5e55eafa-f061-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTU1ZWFmYS1mMDYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cv_FRtrXyCkL9PKIAbjFfb1BtbKD43CFGZy92Sb49S0=)**

John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**

[**Please make a donation today and join Mayor Cranley's campaign to build an Ohio that works for everyone >>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39880617/321831022/-1406512299?refcode=ea.5e55eafa-f061-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.5e55eafa-f061-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZTU1ZWFmYS1mMDYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Cv_FRtrXyCkL9PKIAbjFfb1BtbKD43CFGZy92Sb49S0=)

name: Team Mathis HQ
subject: Our opponent voted AGAINST rural hospitals
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Liz Mathis for Congress
body:
Unacceptable
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39880530/321830226/-1768393238?refcode=em_eng_2021.12.20_b1_tmhq_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUxNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTE2ZDdkYS1mMDYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1kzrp8iv67Bb6CIsJg5iqjnwQG-oZgEzkcUQwSL73uE=) Peter,

Liz’s opponent has a history of voting against legislation that benefits Iowans. From infrastructure to health care, she consistently votes AGAINST Iowans’ best interests.

Just last week, she voted against funding for hospitals in rural areas. In a state with so many rural communities, this was a direct attack on the people of Iowa.

[**In Congress, Liz will always support the rural hospitals that so many Iowans depend on for health care. name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: The Senate is broken
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
Right now, the Senate is clearly broken.
| | |
---
Peter: Right now, the Senate is clearly broken. Democrats might have the majority, but with exactly 50 votes and none left to spare, they're struggling to pass transformative legislation. I know that for you this is likely frustrating, difficult, and frankly scary. **But if you send me to the Senate, I promise that I will be the 50th vote we need to truly deliver change for the American people.**
That's why I'm emailing you tonight, Peter. You see, my opponent Sen. Grassley (R-IA) is facing his worst job approval ratings in nearly four decades, and he has never been more vulnerable. **Democrats must expand our Senate majority to make real progress for our country – and we have an opportunity to do it right here in Iowa.**
**[If we flip this seat blue, Democrats will be all but GUARANTEED to expand our Senate majority. So please, can you rush a $5 donation tonight to expand our Senate majority and ensure that Democrats can pass transformative legislation to make life better for working families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39880911/321833669/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk527-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWNjZTBhZS1mMTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zbhAK8hnGrWyaeGauV36SmzIhEzlfuibUcY9aNq46bc=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39880912/321833670/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk527-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWNjZTBhZS1mMTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zbhAK8hnGrWyaeGauV36SmzIhEzlfuibUcY9aNq46bc=)
---
We _need_ to expand our razor-thin 50-50 majority to keep delivering for the American people – to bring down the cost of prescription drugs, extend the Child Tax Credit, expand Medicare, secure paid family and medical leave, reform the filibuster and more.
We can do that by winning in Iowa. But Mitch McConnell knows exactly how vulnerable Sen. Grassley is, and he will do anything to protect his ally and take back the Senate. McConnell’s allies are already directly attacking me, and the Senate GOP campaign arm has raked in $85 million this year alone to defeat Democratic campaigns like ours.
We must be ready to compete with GOP spending and attacks. But I can't do that without a grassroots movement powered by people like you who care about moving our country forward. So tonight I need another $10,380 from grassroots supporters to meet my emergency midnight goal.
**[So that's why I have to ask: Please, can you rush a donation tonight to expand our Senate majority, so that we can pass the critical legislation that Americans are counting on?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39880913/321833671/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk527-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWNjZTBhZS1mMTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zbhAK8hnGrWyaeGauV36SmzIhEzlfuibUcY9aNq46bc=)**
I know that together, we're going to win. Thank you for standing with me.

– Abby
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39880914/321833672/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk527-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWNjZTBhZS1mMTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zbhAK8hnGrWyaeGauV36SmzIhEzlfuibUcY9aNq46bc=)
---

To receive fewer emails, please click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39880915/321833673/496662621?refcode=jtk527-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWNjZTBhZS1mMTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zbhAK8hnGrWyaeGauV36SmzIhEzlfuibUcY9aNq46bc=&emci=2bbb8fd4-3161-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=3acce0ae-f161-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=13784334#!).

body:
I didn't want to be the one to tell you this but we're out of options and Conservatives are dangerously behind our LAST AND MOST
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu9nc5764m0j48f3qfvs0atftv6difpsskulo7rg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1gm2o72cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t76emon4t1i6mrm6tb2egpm2s5iehhj5d9gs6pbec9m6oon5d346li62d1hmprrfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup30phkcsqr4ptnc9j30s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
I didn't want to be the one to tell you this but we're out of options and Conservatives are dangerously behind our LAST AND MOST CRUCIAL deadline of the year.
This is Sarah Huckabee Sanders. I have a personal favor to ask of you:
[**I’m hoping you’ll pitch in $17 right now. Why? Because Democrats just CRUSHED their “must-hit” fundraising goal AND outraised us by $115,000,000+ from texts and emails like this one.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4lk28f6fnv1bm47dbbecn3uuf66ft04d3dien4o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1gm2o72cph2bs)
Conservatives are so close to winning back the House but if we give up now, all our hard work will be for NOTHING.
**This is urgent.** I'm partnering with my friend Steve Scalise to build an unstoppable surge of support to help our Conservative allies and defeat the Democrats NATIONWIDE.
[**We are both counting on you to be a part of it.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z535lvk2ohkiooub7kilebj05nf2d47bg4no8l40_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1gm2o72cph2bs)
Look, we don't have scores of Trump-hating billionaires forking over tons of cash to our campaigns, and we don't have the Liberal Media on our side _**(trust me, I know that better than anyone)**... _
**But what we DO have is something to be much more proud of:**
We have a movement of strong Conservative Patriots who love our Country and believe we should ALWAYS PUT AMERICA FIRST.
[**We cannot win back the House alone. Please do your part and join us by chipping in $17 or more straight away.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo3gvu8m7eijlbtn7qpgo0k93bug23ui0tp3r8v8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0c1gm2o72cph2bs)
