body:
We need Democratic Senators who fight for us, not against us. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpEnMq3REs_6qpHFEbObeQSeVtQfDWNLS6IBFr9NtQcwPEX_xQunLYpKICFKmqkGjKnIMQ76QQ4GiZgU7oACYvho2eNY3ldNUnd1mWvhocj6n7-BY5_fDeO2uo6PaxQFQtwcLIZTCzLuWiO3tG9qw9Kh-vnxmUcj9bLi0aDMg652YVXOjGYDgdbHIeR5YZPnh_n9Lk07ZagymIY0XSjDQio1823qYEv26DpwX2-dvG_OIF1FXo0uuv1cqGqxbAwzxBE/3i0/qwFcS_UqT4SqY8A--KAAOA/h0/Lv26s2bBSH2yPIG4oalXRbb9Ch_fejocmvU4V_G2hwI)
Peter,
**** Yesterday Joe Manchin announced — on Fox News, no less — that he won't vote for the president's Build Back Better bill, after stringing the American people along for months. It’s enraging, but not surprising. body:
I urgently need your help.
| | | Growing up, I never could have imagined I’d become the first Latina ever elected to the Senate. It was only possible thanks to grassroots supporters like you.

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/3085?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FM-20211220-SenCortezMasto-BioTandemV1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20211220-SenCortezMasto-BioTandemV1-Pros-sl1&akid=2305%2E9716520%2EWW7sKS)
**[But Republicans spent millions of dollars during that election to try and prevent my history-making victory, and now my Trump-endorsed opponent is raking in millions to defeat me. That’s why I’m asking you: Will you split $5 between my campaign and the DSCC to help defend my seat and our Senate majority?](https://go.dscc.org/go/3085?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FM-20211220-SenCortezMasto-BioTandemV1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20211220-SenCortezMasto-BioTandemV1-Pros-sl1&akid=2305%2E9716520%2EWW7sKS)**

| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/3085?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-FM-20211220-SenCortezMasto-BioTandemV1-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20211220-SenCortezMasto-BioTandemV1-Pros-sl1&akid=2305%2E9716520%2EWW7sKS)
---

My parents taught me that I could accomplish anything with hard work, honesty and respect for others. With that lesson in mind, I decided to dedicate my life to public service. After serving two terms as Nevada’s attorney general, I became the first Latina and first woman from Nevada ever elected to the U.S. Senate.

I won that race by _just 2 points_ , despite Mitch McConnell and his allies spending $50 million to defeat me, because grassroots supporters like you were behind me every step of the way.

Now, new polling shows me 3 points **behind** my Trump-endorsed opponent, and my race has officially been downgraded from "Leans Democratic" to "Toss-Up." With Mitch McConnell only one seat away from retaking control of the Senate, we have zero room for error.

**[So I’m personally asking. body:
I’m never giving up, and I hope you aren’t either.

| Remember in 2012, when Missouri Republican Senate candidate Todd Akin said in an interview that women rarely got pregnant from “legitimate rape”?

That year, his extreme views sank his chances, and Democrat Claire McCaskill went from being the country’s most vulnerable Democrat to defeating Akin by 16 points.

We might be seeing something similar happen in 2022. Donald Trump is endorsing loyalists who deny that Joe Biden is our legitimate president, and that might be enough to help them win their primaries.

**But most Americans find those views too extreme, giving Democrats a real chance to defeat these Republicans in the general election.**

We know it will be challenging for Democrats to hold the House next year, but I have reason to believe that with your support, we can defy the odds and keep the House blue.

clean_body: I’m never giving up, and I hope you aren’t either. | Remember in 2012, when Missouri Republican Senate candidate Todd Akin said in an interview that women rarely got pregnant from “legitimate rape”? That year, his extreme views sank his chances, and Democrat Claire McCaskill went from being the country’s most vulnerable Democrat to defeating Akin by 16 points. We might be seeing something similar happen in 2022. Donald Trump is endorsing loyalists who deny that Joe Biden is our legitimate president, and that might be enough to help them win their primaries. But most Americans find those views too extreme, giving Democrats a real chance to defeat these Republicans in the general election. We know it will be challenging for Democrats to hold the House next year, but I have reason to believe that with your support, we can defy the odds and keep the House blue. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = I’m never giving up, and I hope you aren’t either. ---

[OTHERWISE, BEGIN YOUR CUSTOM SURVEY ON JOE BIDEN’S PRESIDENCY RIGHT NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/biden_admin_eval_dec/?refcode=VPP_20211220_EMSURV_E1_T0_AC&t=7&akid=1032%2E878179%2E5c-vcp) | [START IMMEDIATELY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/biden_admin_eval_dec/?refcode=VPP_20211220_EMSURV_E1_T0_AC&t=8&akid=1032%2E878179%2E5c-vcp)
---
Today is OFFICIALLY eleven months since President Biden took office — we can hardly believe it!

**_But even though Biden is doing a GREAT job, the WORST Republicans are SMEARING HIM with disgusting attacks and outright lies._**

If we want to keep up Biden’s momentum, we NEED to make sure our top Democrats see through GOP lies.

[So we need 86.1% of recipients to respond to our 60 second survey to determine our midterm strategy: ](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/biden_admin_eval_dec/?refcode=VPP_20211220_EMSURV_E1_T0_AC&t=9&akid=1032%2E878179%2E5c-vcp)
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/biden_admin_eval_dec/?refcode=VPP_20211220_EMSURV_E1_T0_AC&t=10&akid=1032%2E878179%2E5c-vcp) [CLICK HERE TO START IMMEDIATELY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/biden_admin_eval_dec/?refcode=VPP_20211220_EMSURV_E1_T0_AC&t=11&akid=1032%2E878179%2E5c-vcp)
---
Thank you,

_VPP Action Team_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

[](ckq.io/eguhtk)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To ending partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=1032%2E878179%2E5c-vcp). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=1032%2E878179%2E5c-vcp).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=1032%2E878179%2E5c-vcp) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=1032%2E878179%2E5c-vcp). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=5&akid=1032%2E878179%2E5c-vcp)
---

---

I’m sending this petition to the Senate at 8:30 A.M. sharp tomorrow!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QJ_q7hx8V6O-lfKZKHNXWAXUTcRfJTBkGdRNj6rOtL8aqprPsxCzIT2YLJepcnAAm1bTQUj_J9TdL-VtxBhcqClNJY2A40-qxoFJzyciONJypXR_Z-Gq_s57tvxttUD_vRJXvjw6nnrY7VluX2JGbD8k2YAgkH0KjsohOY7oaEtJ1fl6lBjWCO_PIqgw7AivB4_c4rcky2j8R2yyfrWaVYGGcghbRZB1KzCdTcfk6x0uDMoy5REWPoNp_7MNC35Ns_jGjjWTi1ANyn_1buY803ZHivAFrNIjDMNq-eJMiLKo/3i0/mFUY7mjDQW-I-8S8tMCwyw/h4/Dk4oH_CaVKe25dHigNZJ1fquT6PK6fhx-gumf-uRmrs)

As one of only 17 physicians in Congress, I know how necessary it is to save _Roe v. Wade_ at ALL costs.

And currently, the ONLY way to protect Roe from Trump’s conservative Supreme Court is to codify it into federal law.

I was proud to vote “YES” on the Women’s Health Protection Act, which would save abortion rights as we know it. [_But the Senate has yet to vote on this critical bill._](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QJ_q7hx8V6O-lfKZKHNXWAXUTcRfJTBkGdRNj6rOtL8aqprPsxCzIT2YLJepcnAAm1bTQUj_J9TdL-VtxBhcqClNJY2A40-qxoFJzyciONJxXh_9xrQvUhG59t0_eF0UqoxTlSp7VzncRT-D8AiHPmPmpglX1l1elWod87cUy6yKmLFVv-qJpHWtBfHJViUtp_NlbDaUkwEJ1DczYVzREG7HtkzkhHW5hfweeQdvtbUnY5xy9rRTzR_Ufz68yQrt-3JovF_-Z076QRauvQGx2yLd7Tyv60arWeTRBIXyG-zw/3i0/mFUY7mjDQW-I-8S8tMCwyw/h5/1kmQIku9uNAnFoPo4Rvi2zAlPbwMcBrHTBLHHvGIDEQ)
[ **Will you join me and add your signature to demand the Senate codifies Roe v. Wade into federal law?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QJ_q7hx8V6O-lfKZKHNXWAXUTcRfJTBkGdRNj6rOtL8aqprPsxCzIT2YLJepcnAAm1bTQUj_J9TdL-VtxBhcqClNJY2A40-qxoFJzyciONJw6U6SuIG7lvqaH-r92yeMdRw0j4Xgh2GRdC7vyl2PLTD6vdMWdGVqLzcX2FU4nagHFDIMJ2ahbSdMk58MQyZej1BxNNQQ7zhE9dZZPJKajgLo8aAygywJ1Omta88j9IczNTNUcgzSme_vFeUGsnxPZjkjwNlomUnHLoWVyfjE8pcYkThXgR3sXf_t7wriuD_0/3i0/mFUY7mjDQW-I-8S8tMCwyw/h6/12u2XcBC8sv9tu-7SRc2j6c4otdvazVrn3eVARQ-mnc)
[**SIGN MY PETITION >>**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmQip0KI8h0I2D6ae1eIF_QJ_q7hx8V6O-lfKZKHNXWAXUTcRfJTBkGdRNj6rOtL8aqprPsxCzIT2YLJepcnAAm1bTQUj_J9TdL-VtxBhcqClNJY2A40-qxoFJzyciONJx5cvpxZwj_EUyzBTPacCDRYZmflHERbBUY4ORWJSHtdqkc19zS2VOp-UavOgKowLFx-QGN7nGxvmzLaItAv_Iq7MrI8mS-9Ckzj7JzOh-e6CwrEZ-1gWa0SjBtS9yJAgkX0UU5_N5WU6spDSdueQ32SMVYYWmemb3J8u-XBqQiIwPE5UcoVFMUFdu7goOTjbE/3i0/mFUY7mjDQW-I-8S8tMCwyw/h7/wpslsYrxrq2FWw4W8V02jZmK1fJOf7tZo4iv6wvl-r4)
---
We can’t let conservatives send our country back to the dark ages.

Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. Hey – it’s Dr. Raul Ruiz here coming to you personally. The Supreme Court is currently debating a Mississippi law that would virtually overturn Roe v. Wade: | As one of only 17 physicians in Congress, I know how necessary it is to save Roe v. Wade at ALL costs. And currently, the ONLY way to protect Roe from Trump’s conservative Supreme Court is to codify it into federal law. I was proud to vote “YES” on the Women’s Health Protection Act, which would save abortion rights as we know it. We can’t let conservatives send our country back to the dark ages. It’s going to take a massive effort to pressure the Senate to save Roe. Thank you in advance for signing, Dr. Raul Ruiz Proudly representing California’s 36th Congressional District | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: Update on Build Back Better
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
My job is to fight for Washington state workers and families
#
Peter,
You may have seen my statement yesterday, but just in case you didn't, here's what I want you to know: Joe Manchin might have woken up this weekend and decided his job changed, but I know exactly what mine is: fighting for Washington state workers and families. I'm not giving up on our fight to lower families' child care and health care costs, take climate action, and more in Build Back Better.
More to come,
Patty

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let us know if you would like to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/42fe56cd-e561-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b/35b8dabe-f661-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWI4ZGFiZS1mNjYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F0i2AU58_PhkUu3rITMWZhKZxFgsHFrIxUA8EqEV0dU=&id=115197541).

| Dear Fellow Patriot, We _have less than two weeks_ to make sure our America First campaign reaches a groundswell. **[In these critical few days before our end of month deadline, it is imperative that we spread that message far and wide across this district, and I can’t do it without your help](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=02338dea63&e=af4b86f5c6).** **[That’s why I’m asking for your donations today to help me run radio and TV ads on the air](https://JaromeBellForCongress.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=998fb70d47f315dfa6664b71d&id=dbe57bb595&e=af4b86f5c6).** So far, my ads have made a HUGE difference. name: Tim Ryan
subject: re: Joe Manchin!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1803%2E3611125%2ElaIES7 ][IMG]

Hello—

This is not the news I was hoping for. Senator Joe Manchin announced
yesterday he will not vote for the Build Back Better Act, killing any hope
for passage of this historic bill.

The Build Back Better Act is a lifeline for working families across the
country. It will lower prescription drug costs and cap insulin at $35. It
will extend the child tax credit, cutting taxes for those who need it and
putting money directly in the pockets of parents. And it will ensure
corporations and the wealthiest 1% start paying their fair share.

It’s clear a 50-50 tie in the Senate is not good enough. If we want to
make progress on the issues that matter, we can’t let a single Senator
stand in our way. And Ohio is the best chance we’ve got to expand our
majority.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6348?amount=25&t=1007&akid=1803%2E3611125%2ElaIES7 ]Please, donate
$25 or more
to help us flip Ohio blue. Political analysts have rated us as one of the
most winnable races for Democrats, but only if we have your grassroots
support. Let’s turn this anger into energy and energy into action.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6348?t=1009&amount=25&akid=1803%2E3611125%2ElaIES7 ]Donate $25
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6348?t=1010&amount=50&akid=1803%2E3611125%2ElaIES7 ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6348?t=1011&amount=100&akid=1803%2E3611125%2ElaIES7 ]Donate $100
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6348?t=1012&amount=200&akid=1803%2E3611125%2ElaIES7 ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6348?t=1013&amount=250&akid=1803%2E3611125%2ElaIES7 ]Donate $250
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6348?t=1014&amount=25&akid=1803%2E3611125%2ElaIES7 ]Other Amount

Look, I’m not afraid to stand up to my own party and tell them no when I
have to. But I’m pissed off that Senator Joe Manchin is refusing to help
us get this bill across the finish line.

We should be fighting to make working people’s lives easier—not harder.
That’s why Americans elected us and it’s time we deliver on our promises.

When we win this Senate race, I can assure you I’ll do just that.

— Tim

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/47?t=1002&akid=1803%2E3611125%2ElaIES7 ][IMG]

touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,

subject: Pelosi’s latest lie
body:
She thinks THIS is leading to the rise in crime

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/fc404e5a15a6/lori-chavez-deremer-announces-candidacy-for-congress-6609330?e=c87c5d8d97)
https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-12-20-21?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast1220

Friend,

Nancy Pelosi is unbelievable.

She now blames an ‘attitude of lawlessness’ for the crime that is surging around the country but says she doesn't know what caused it.

But we all know the cause; defunding the police. We all knew defunding the police was a horrible idea, but the Democrats kept pushing. Now we have homicides reaching all time high in multiple cities, smash and grab thieves targeting retailers, and afraid Americans.

It’s time to FUND the people who keep us and our communities safe; can I count on you to chip in today to help us fight this crime crisis plaguing our country?>>> (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-12-20-21?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast1220)

Nancy Pelosi and the Radical Left may be blind to the harmful effects of defunding law enforcement, but we're not.

Together we can make our country safe again and fight for law enforcement officers.

Donate any amount today and let’s put an end to the Left’s ineffective policies! >>> (https://secure.winred.com/lori-chavez-deremer-for-congress-e8cab5fb/eblast-12-20-21?utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=eblast1220)

Lori Chavez-DeRemer

**PERSONAL INVITATION:** You’ve been selected to represent 20910 in **Tom’s Health Care Focus Group**
**Invited Participant:** **dpwillis67@gmail.com**
**Representing:** 20910
**Deadline:** 11:59 P.M. on December 19, 2021**[ENTER FOCUS GROUP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39881917/321854394/847095128?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDY3YTAxMC1mYTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxRsBWYOTcl75C0l5qRKW9FZEzdq6cMGHyhtSZYiEbE=&emci=f760b618-1a61-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=ad67a010-fa61-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)**
Hi there -- It’s Jessica, Tom’s campaign manager.

Tom is running for Governor to ensure every Marylander has access to quality, affordable health care -- but he needs to hear from key supporters to ensure his health care plan is as strong as possible. **That’s why we’re _personally_ inviting you to join Tom’s Health Care Focus Group!**

[**Please click here to enter Tom’s focus group, Peter. Tom and I will be reviewing responses first thing tomorrow, so it’s important that your input is submitted before then >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39881918/321854395/847095128?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDY3YTAxMC1mYTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxRsBWYOTcl75C0l5qRKW9FZEzdq6cMGHyhtSZYiEbE=&emci=f760b618-1a61-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=ad67a010-fa61-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)
**[ENTER FOCUS GROUP](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39881919/321854396/847095128?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDY3YTAxMC1mYTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxRsBWYOTcl75C0l5qRKW9FZEzdq6cMGHyhtSZYiEbE=&emci=f760b618-1a61-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=ad67a010-fa61-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)**
This focus group is vitally important because**347,000 Marylanders are still uninsured** , prescription drug costs are _out of control,_ glaring health disparities are leading to more sickness and death in communities of color, and the opioid crisis has ravaged our state.
**As Governor, Tom will work tirelessly to ensure every Marylander has access to the quality, affordable health care they need and deserve -- no matter their income or citizenship status.** But he’s counting on your input to get it done:
[**So please, click here to accept my invitation and join Tom’s Health Care Focus Group. We’re standing by to review your responses >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39881920/321854397/847095128?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDY3YTAxMC1mYTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wxRsBWYOTcl75C0l5qRKW9FZEzdq6cMGHyhtSZYiEbE=&emci=f760b618-1a61-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=ad67a010-fa61-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=14684837)

name: CharlesBooker.org
subject: Focused on the wrong thing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

While our team is focused on getting emergency relief to the people of
Kentucky and helping to rebuild in the aftermath of recent devastating
tornadoes — a new Super PAC, backed by Philadelphia-based Hedge Fund
Manager Jeff Yass, launched an assault on our campaign.

They’re using every fear tactic in the book to try to take us down. Here’s
just a glimpse of the lunacy we’re up against:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14027?refcode=em20211220-1352https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fcb-em-20211220%3Frefcode%3Dem20211220-1352&t=1001&akid=1352%2E346206%2E6VV-PB ][IMG]

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14027?refcode=em20211220-1352&t=1021&akid=1352%2E346206%2E6VV-PB ]While Rand focuses on him, Charles is going to keep doing the work of
the people — right now in Kentucky, and in the U.S. Senate. But we need
your support to get there. Will you please chip in $5 or
whatever you can afford to our campaign?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/14027?refcode=em20211220-1352&t=1022&akid=1352%2E346206%2E6VV-PB ]Contribute $5

It's time to elect someone who's the complete opposite of the disastrous
leadership that Kentucky’s had for ages,
Peter.

Someone who knows what it's like to not have enough money to eat.

Someone who looks at his community and asks, "How can I help?"

Someone who isn't afraid to fight for the right thing — even when it isn't
politically convenient.

Kentucky deserves better leadership than what we’ve been getting for
generations. We believe that electing someone better — creating this
change — is possible.

But change starts by building relationships with Kentuckians who’ve been
left behind, and doing it early. To do it right, we need the resources to
reach all across Kentucky — and we need to be ready to respond to any and
all attacks from Rand’s Super PAC.

name: Team Jayapal
subject: A "no" vote means no to child care, pre-K, paid leave, lower prescription drug prices, fighting climate change, and more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
An obstacle in the Senate.
#
Peter,
Yesterday, Joe Manchin said he could not support the President's popular Build Back Better Act.
When Manchin says he’d vote "no," he’s saying "no" to universal pre-K, paid leave, affordable child care, fighting climate change, Medicare expansion, affordable housing, lower prescription drug costs, home care, and immigration reform. He’s saying "no" to what people across America want, need, and deserve.
Build Back Better _is_ the Democratic agenda. It’s President Biden’s agenda. It’s what we promised people throughout this country. Voters delivered us the House, Senate, and White House to deliver for them. Joe Manchin and the Senate can’t turn their backs on these urgent issues. It’s bad policy and it’s bad politics.
[**We’re not backing down for a second. We’re going to keep pushing for Build Back Better and the popular policies in this bill. Can you help Pramila redouble her efforts to fight for the people with a donation of $3 today?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9057?refcode=em20211220-891&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=891%2E420207%2EbiInjb)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9057?refcode=em20211220-891&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=891%2E420207%2EbiInjb)**
Pramila fought tirelessly for the President’s agenda in the House, even as corporate lobbyists tried to stop Build Back Better. Thanks to her leadership, Democrats were able to pass it through the House last month with our progressive priorities included. And Pramila’s fight to make the largest investment in working people, families, and our communities in decades continues no matter how tough it gets or how much money they spend against us.
We cannot allow our Democratic majorities to go without passing Build Back Better. Pramila knows it and the people know it. Too much is at stake.
[**Peter, can you help fuel our work to keep the pressure on and protect our progressive wins in the Build Back Better Act with a $3 donation today? We have to keep up our fight, and by chipping in today, you would be making a huge contribution to this critical work.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9057?refcode=em20211220-891&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=891%2E420207%2EbiInjb)
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211220-891-footer&t=22&refcode2=891_420207_biInjb&akid=891%2E420207%2EbiInjb)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

body:
but if I have the resources, and do the work, I will win
| | |
---
Friend – I was born in a small home in Jacksonville – the youngest of seven children.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39881954/321855056/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1992-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDY3YTAxMC1mYTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SpZhpUbw9wTnaMg3cj4Zr70cPViOZmaVz9RkKS12bbE=)
Mom was a maid, and Dad was a janitor who worked seven days a week. They did everything they could to support our family and instill the meaning of hard work in me.
The work ahead of us – to defeat Marco Rubio and protect our Senate majority – is hard. It's probably the hardest race I've ever fought. But if I have the resources, and do the work, I will win.

**That's why I'm asking:** **[Can you make a grassroots donation to help me win this battleground Senate race, defeat Marco Rubio and expand our Democratic majority in the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39881955/321855057/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1992-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDY3YTAxMC1mYTYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SpZhpUbw9wTnaMg3cj4Zr70cPViOZmaVz9RkKS12bbE=)**

Val Demings

name: Marcus (mobile)
subject: Meeting people where they are
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
In February of this year, I announced my campaign for Congress in Georgia’s 14th District against Marjorie Taylor Greene.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39882044/321856475/-825069922?refcode=20211220_mm_peopleRS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMmVkYmQ1NC1mYjYxLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fVUViyiTx2SbxpqElTlQv58FTkTqiZkKF3H5N5wZ3TU=) Hi, it’s Marcus Flowers. In February of this year, I announced my campaign for Congress in Georgia’s 14th District against Marjorie Taylor Greene. **When I set out to run for Congress, I made it a priority to meet people where they are. That means talking to them, hearing what they have to say, and what they’re interested in. ** Here’s what I can tell you with confidence: There is a huge percentage of voters in our district who are embarrassed by Marjorie Taylor Greene. _Like all Americans, people in this district want real representation from their Congressmember. And they know that they’re not getting it from Marjorie Taylor Greene._ **I’ve served this country for nearly thirty years -- and I’m committed to bringing that same spirit of service to Congress. name: Laura Loomer
subject: Put the GOP Establishment on Notice!
body:
They've voted for Red Flag Laws and continue to BACK DOWN every time the Leftist Democrat Cabal proposes a new law that chips away at our Republic.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Jt763x9r3dBFkjX892022M6bbQ/bicQZfnzRpH8925wdy5pEHEw)
Patriot,

They've voted for Red Flag Laws and continue to BACK DOWN every time the Leftist Democrat Cabal proposes a new law that chips away at our Republic.

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Jt763x9r3dBFkjX892022M6bbQ/bicQZfnzRpH8925wdy5pEHEw) **The latest is Ilhan Omar 's bill to combat "Islamophobia" worldwide, which PASSED the House!**

It is a shame! And I want the opportunity to fight for you!

[**Donate today and help me get to Washington where I will stand up to the Democrats AND the Establishment, Do-Nothing GOP.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Jt763x9r3dBFkjX892022M6bbQ/bicQZfnzRpH8925wdy5pEHEw)

**We have just 11 days left in the last quarter of the year, and I know my Do-Nothing, RINO opponent is right on my heels.**

[**I have to raise $28,300 by Midnight on New Year 's Eve!**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Jt763x9r3dBFkjX892022M6bbQ/bicQZfnzRpH8925wdy5pEHEw)

[**Will you help?**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Jt763x9r3dBFkjX892022M6bbQ/bicQZfnzRpH8925wdy5pEHEw)

[**Will you chip in?**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Jt763x9r3dBFkjX892022M6bbQ/bicQZfnzRpH8925wdy5pEHEw)

Patriot, look what has happened to the Democrat Party and their hard swing toward Communism because of influence by a few freshman members of Congress: AOC, Ilhan Omar and Rashida Tlaib.

**They drove the Democrats to impeach President Trump . . . TWICE! And they have single-handedly transformed the Democrat Party into the American Communist Party.**

They got their way on ridiculous legislation and planted their poison pills through massive bills . . . while our feckless Republican leaders just threw their hands in the air and did nothing to stop them!

I don't need a squad to influence Congress when I get to Washington, because I can do that on my own. I'm a one-woman squad. That's why MY OWN PARTY is fighting me!

**They don 't want to be forced to give up power and influence when I'm elected!**

But that's not their choice . . . **it 's yours!**

[**Please help me get to Congress today by making your most generous contribution.**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/Jt763x9r3dBFkjX892022M6bbQ/bicQZfnzRpH8925wdy5pEHEw)

More than ever, it's imperative that we send America First Patriots like myself to Congress!

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

subject: We’re hoping you’ll help us out

body:
[1]Erica Smith

Hey,

We think it’s high time that we talk about Sandy Smith, Erica’s far-right,
Madison Cawthorn-backed, insurrectionist, proudly MAGA opponent in North
Carolina’s second district.

Here’s what we’re up against. Sandy Smith:

❌Was proudly at the January 6th insurrection.

❌Has already been endorsed by Madison Cawthron, Paul Gosar, and General
Michael Flynn.

❌Called Erica a “communist” for her commitment to progressive policies
that will support and uplift North Carolinians everywhere.

❌Opposes both a minimum wage increase and universal healthcare.

It’s absolutely critical that we defeat Sandy Smith and protect this
proudly Democratic district from Republican seat-stealing attempts. If
Sandy Smith wins this seat she would be an immediate threat to our
razor-thin democratic majority and progressive legislation like a higher
minimum wage and universal healthcare.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/31656?t=1001&akid=704%2E3698%2Egc5ACW ]Please, donate $5 or more to our campaign today to help
us defeat Sandy Smith, protect the NC-02 House seat, and send someone who
will fight for a better North Carolina that works for all to Congress.

It’s not an exaggeration to say that our country’s future depends on
competitive House races like ours in NC-02.

Sandy Smith has a plan to take advantage of Republicans’ gerrymandering of
this once safe district and steal this seat.

What she doesn’t know is that Erica has run in a racially gerrymandered
district before — and won. She’s represented more than half of the
counties in NC-02 in the state senate, and she’s never lost an election
here. Erica is the only candidate in this race who has the grit,
experience, and expertise it’ll take to protect this seat.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/31656?t=1002&akid=704%2E3698%2Egc5ACW ]If you’re able to spare anything, can you make a contribution today to
help ensure we have the resources we need to have the strongest campaign
possible and fight back against Sandy Smith?

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/31662?refcode=em20211220-704&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=704%2E3698%2Egc5ACW ]Donate $5

Together,

Team Erica Smith

Contribute to Erica's campaign:https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20211220-704-footer&t=1022&refcode2=704_3698_gc5ACW&akid=704%2E3698%2Egc5ACW

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ericaforus.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=704%2E3698%2Egc5ACW

subject: Less than two weeks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
This is a big deadline! |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a1f57dcb94&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
My name is Mark Finchem. I am the Election Integrity, Trump endorsed candidate for Secretary of State in Arizona. I am the only candidate nationwide who has successfully developed ballot counter-fraud measures with fool-proof watermarking that we are pushing to not only be accepted and used in Arizona, but around the nation.

**And I am writing you today because we have a lot of work in front of us, and not much time.**

[_We have under two weeks to hit our fundraising goal of $50,000, and we have $38,850 left. We need this to push forward with the Pima Audit, to pressure AG Mark Brnovich to prosecute those responsible for fraud, and to make sure we are in a position to win in 2022._](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=04f1cb887c&e=44b8c466b0)

_[Can you help me with a generous donation today? ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=022ec76ccd&e=44b8c466b0)_

_Right now, a donor who wishes to remain anonymous, has pledged to match 2 for 1 any donations made in the next 48 hours._

We have been making huge strides ALL year.
* After pushing for and self-funding an Election Integrity hearing in Maricopa, I helped launch America’s Audit in Maricopa, which uncovered massive amounts of fraud.
* I developed foolproof counter-fraud ballot measures and watermarking.
* I have supported grassroots Election Integrity patriots around the country.
* I have been endorsed by President Trump and countless others, speaking at his rallies.
* I have fought for and launched a successful petition to audit Pima County, which will soon be getting underway after we had an Election Integrity hearing in Pima, where 35,000 illegal and fraudulent votes were discovered.

**And it takes this much – and more – to defeat the Anti-American Socialists in 2022. They don’t care about America. They don’t care about Democracy.**

**_All they care about is winning, at any cost._**

[And this is why I so urgently need your help](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f04716b38d&e=44b8c466b0). Again, we have an anonymous donor that will match 2 to 1 any donation made in the next 48 hours.

_[Please help with a rush donation today! Any donation will help!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=104063b3ba&e=44b8c466b0)_

Our campaign has been attacked and silenced by the mainstream, Fake News Media. Our campaign is being attacked on ALL fronts.

**This is because I am the worst nightmare for the media and the Democrats who perpetrated this fraud. I am a former investigator and also a certified Six Sigma Process Engineer. **

This means I am the Election Integrity Conservative in Arizona who can beat the Leftists at their own game. I know what they are up to, and I’ve proved it.

**Now it’s all about the next steps. **

**Again, we must:**
* **Push Forward with the Pima Audit.**
* **Pressure AG Mark Brnovich.**
* **Secure victory for Republicans in 2022.**

[These are three goals which I will never sacrifice on, and three goals which I cannot accomplish alone. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6e048559f3&e=44b8c466b0)

_[Help me complete these critical goals with a donation today! 2022 is just around the corner, and we need a running start. Donate $25, $50, $100, $250, $1,000 or more today!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=60c29c0b11&e=44b8c466b0)_
---

I don’t know about you, Peter, but I’m not about to sit by and allow Susan Wild, Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden to go on a spending spree with my taxpayer dollars while my family gets stuck paying more for our simple Christmas dinner. [**If you agree that our families deserve to celebrate Christmas without paying these ridiculous prices or worrying about Biden’s supply chain failures, chip in $10 now to help fight back against the Far Left.**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=803bf81a1d2842fe8561102a798399cb&_e=JxpC0w1mILSIE2qWHtrXncXXFs66KWsfjZW15t9a0G0bMiRpPQvMPGPHvl247SAQAvYRw-pYv5-2HL3qQsR8Kxm4ltM1i1cdR3N1XN4EiV4EcWXDCRwRzADTbNQRBwhY88UIu5r5QD5wXIlF50GmxaJ3mD6KhQGE6LZMxGPwYHz_pUv0htOUDlTvlMbbFP3b1NWd4f5Pb6CLRI_c0XSWhZpPR_9GAOonSVw-zo8tkDMkQO8UfySppf9EXYhEmrjNqF7BdtPFjuywm0LVSHQj_lIcPNE4n7hyoLQrfHzjgGqhB8X-2Uy5wP4ydvh-ea--WALPrbwGzAThR8Etr7Y-W977uU5F7auh1eHXLMO06bBUohsqBiGnzXnvTWkzR_S2Vm-lrbEEDL0SKnQ8nPUIcptONNUBY5G7H-mp97f6X2KQPAmu5Nsj6Jrn4LasZ76NS2PRUh9FdW4X79TXq03kiJaIPrOzjY2SUdZHE8G8YfoME40PoHRcNgd9HmXyNrUWNzm8McvAo90VoTFIDjFwwA%3D%3D) [**Chip in Now to Help Save Christmas >>>**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=803bf81a1d2842fe8561102a798399cb&_e=JxpC0w1mILSIE2qWHtrXncXXFs66KWsfjZW15t9a0G0bMiRpPQvMPGPHvl247SAQAvYRw-pYv5-2HL3qQsR8Kxm4ltM1i1cdR3N1XN4EiV4EcWXDCRwRzADTbNQRBwhY88UIu5r5QD5wXIlF50GmxaJ3mD6KhQGE6LZMxGPwYHz_pUv0htOUDlTvlMbbFP3b1NWd4f5Pb6CLRI_c0XSWhZpPR_9GAOonSVw-zo8tkDMkQO8UfySppf9EXYhEmrjNqF7BdtPFjuywm0LVSHQj_lIcPNE4n7hyoLQrfHzjgGpHxm_6UHEt46H1fuByxzcluE4ltKJPp0Y1tyCeKep7el3gHTnV_pFICpZrBYMA9BeCpWi2iiyhZmWLulJQs6RjKfVS0jauvjYDjLMtYLnN-eaxXVabzbObEGf63VWleQATF8XztVTZmyIIrOJp-dTD1sS5LPyOXf9LyS90M2T_WvapZWai8oRd4noNGLHpDfsEMwLR61tVWUZWtUBKPna_tM6jUnCVQzgcNvHTH4eayw%3D%3D) This is why we can’t afford to keep radicals like Susan Wild and Nancy Pelosi in power. I’m running for Congress to help restore good values in Washington and make sure that our leaders actually represent our families’ best interests. We’ve been through way too much these past few years to tolerate any more of the Left’s disastrous policies. We certainly can’t take another year of these Democrat attacks on Christmas! clean_body: The Far Left’s policies are threatening to ruin Christmas... again! Biden and Pelosi’s spending spree has caused the worst inflation our country has... Peter, The Far Left’s policies are threatening to ruin Christmas... again! Biden and Pelosi’s spending spree has caused the worst inflation our country has seen in decades. That means our families are stuck paying way more for the same gifts and food after an already-challenging year. After all we’ve been through, our families shouldn’t have to deal with these massive price hikes during the Christmas season. Susan Wild and Nancy Pelosi are doing absolutely nothing to stand up for our families. In fact, they’re actually on board with the very policies that are driving up costs for our families this Christmas. On top of everything, they also refuse to address the rampant supply chain issues that are causing shortages at our stores and major shipping delays ahead of this major holiday. Our families are sick and tired of having the Far Left raise our prices and taxes to pay for trillions of dollars worth of policies that we don’t even want in the first place. I don’t know about you, Peter, but I’m not about to sit by and allow Susan Wild, Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden to go on a spending spree with my taxpayer dollars while my family gets stuck paying more for our simple Christmas dinner. This is why we can’t afford to keep radicals like Susan Wild and Nancy Pelosi in power. They only care about themselves and their Far Left dark-money mega donors. They don’t care about real American families at all! I’m running for Congress to help restore good values in Washington and make sure that our leaders actually represent our families’ best interests. We’ve been through way too much these past few years to tolerate any more of the Left’s disastrous policies. We certainly can’t take another year of these Democrat attacks on Christmas! Thanks for your support, Peter. It means a lot to have you fighting with me to stand up for our families. \-- Lisa Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc.

Peter,

We are days away from the critical election year. 2022 will decide the fate of our nation.

As Sarah continues to fight for Arkansans and Americans alike, she needs the input of her top supporters.

That’s why we are checking in now to hear about the issues that matter most to you. **_Will you take just a few moments to fill out our issue survey?_**

[**WEIGH IN NOW**](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=7d81ff0aae334fa9813b1d94fff269c7&_e=8dkVZciMm6uv3HIHTu1Ljw_HpGXAQQIJOLYacFHgzM7HIaM68_0N5jP38_Kuq7Ezs5kepyR5i38qLrKaYNfiA-42JakjI7ll82LFSALYxkXi6czYRQ9bsAOtUg80LnE5wN37wBa2GVLPHn8jJusiPg8XZjRpp7WPBA2HvsBkPKqvepluJg0GaSzI306648RT_HipYVT_cpPNP6zH2EOprG-eLO2IcpCr1hNFXtTIObRJqqQ1G1iOgUuu0NtCu9vQgWP4097kfeEuMRwrmjzeXcX1Ifc-Uxz8t11UsrFDt1s4pLGirLY809fkUkaoihqcKyIlb_YgL11RWS-84nYq44PcgsZF0JO1HFTKzPQ0gcuGddY0zW5OdaF2RLbLeii5LJtQZN1H0rNbgGm7HjwLT1NXuEyCH3ODxjbmWZiTjvg%3D)

Sarah believes strongly that our country needs leaders with the courage to do what’s right– not what’s politically correct or convenient.

_Sarah will always: _
* _Defend your right to be free of socialism and tyranny._
* _Preserve your Second Amendment right to keep your family safe._
* _Protect your freedom of speech and religious liberty_.

_**She has been tested under fire, successfully managing one crisis after another in one of the most difficult, high-pressure jobs in all of government.**_

You always know where Sarah stands. Sarah stands on the side of freedom.

Now, we just need you to tell us what you think! Can you take our survey and let us know how you feel about some of the biggest issues facing our country?
[**TAKE THE SURVEY**](http://links.shsforgov.com/u/click?_t=1a739425fcea4563aabd0234355111c0&_m=7d81ff0aae334fa9813b1d94fff269c7&_e=8dkVZciMm6uv3HIHTu1Ljw_HpGXAQQIJOLYacFHgzM7HIaM68_0N5jP38_Kuq7Ezs5kepyR5i38qLrKaYNfiA-42JakjI7ll82LFSALYxkXi6czYRQ9bsAOtUg80LnE5wN37wBa2GVLPHn8jJusiPg8XZjRpp7WPBA2HvsBkPKqvepluJg0GaSzI306648RT_HipYVT_cpPNP6zH2EOprFjZAkAUjJQZki5ClQ-n2-7JC-wm4r0i5BGrZ8jZDtdADGtxN4fdDsu7GgHdk_09ci8Jw2NZFJ9WpgKiwzZZUyrMXG4N14eZEn1VfkKTww_UE1nYdwyo6Db4zfY6-Wzh_b2ymRBLLvpCfmQGyzdTQXWx4X4vo-Izqm6K6HMUkG21Mw8d67Ygo32g33Eln-PFoUMteCEJ09YG5eYnW1CV9CM%3D)
Sarah and our campaign team will be reviewing the results, and we look forward to
seeing what issues are most critical as we prepare our 2022 campaign strategy.

Thank you,
Team Sarah

name: Celine Ryan Ciccio
subject: Hold universities accountable
body:
Campus Correspondents write stories that reverberate across America. They hold colleges and universities accountable.
|
---
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59067620:6uIc7AENA:m:1:3253819041:068DC75793035BC8A1FECD7AAA07A8B9:r) Dear Peter, Do you want to help conservative college students take a stand against the left? [**If so, please support the Leadership Institute 's Campus Reform.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59067620:6uIc7AENA:m:1:3253819041:068DC75793035BC8A1FECD7AAA07A8B9:r) LI's Campus Reform features a team of **more than 180 brave student Campus Correspondents**. These dedicated conservative student journalists conduct investigative research, write articles, and appear on national television. Campus Correspondents expose the leftist indoctrination, bias, and abuse they often witness firsthand in the classroom or on campus. [**Fight leftist abuses**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59067620:6uIc7AENA:m:1:3253819041:068DC75793035BC8A1FECD7AAA07A8B9:r) **[Your support today will help:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59067620:6uIc7AENA:m:1:3253819041:068DC75793035BC8A1FECD7AAA07A8B9:r)**
* Hire and train more Campus Correspondents
* Expose more incidents of leftist bias, abuse, and indoctrination
* Hold universities accountable for the leftist nonsense they promote
* Reverse unfair policies, fire abusive professors and administrators, and **score more victories for conservatives**

So much of today's radical leftism starts on college campuses. If not exposed, these leftist abuses go unchecked, and grow ever worse. **If you and I don 't act now to hold colleges and universities accountable, an entire generation of students will graduate hating America.** [**If you want to take a stand against the left and help conservative college students in the process, please support the Leadership Institute 's Campus Reform. Just click here to make your tax-deductible contribution right away.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59067620:6uIc7AENA:m:1:3253819041:068DC75793035BC8A1FECD7AAA07A8B9:r) Thank you so much, Celine Ryan Ciccio
Editor in Chief, Campus Reform [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59067620:6uIc7AENA:m:1:3253819041:068DC75793035BC8A1FECD7AAA07A8B9:r)

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46135509&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE0MjI4MTI4OAS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDMpIuIOIoWKNcfQycEgFq58v2g1MmaqcWHlEhboeG3CVRipD_uotBDtu61G-nDoNJqIjQAsDZ1iHwblfYnjUVe7DhEBleglTO2NmMWQH2GWhXgeu6LB7CIi3IsUH2Cc5uAD-2jHI92Ke7NEsbIumaVkEHLlUSbba6D45BtXgDbdSpG2O1Ob7OUD_62DiUGgCWrY7SAF68zFKxmzHCEz82QMZKDxF2NRoXgJ-sbxPH-wnQ9KMnPHHSwUHy-yVbOqnMXkkBmxIU2tzbmXRZVXujPUkWVRAR7sUWUfzjM3Q5PTemvZMHKad8mOwUQlXjv14NYF6aPlxVrPK2-GUtT0ppuRP5l9D89gUQ8dHXPxAw1xqK0j1lDsTcU5eDEw1kbolh_ddlgPt2WPg1EopNlfccLF7kAylmVkCAsBmUxXABKQXC2EyNaSk9YXwt_hR_KPsNg/3i0/YQYB3NzpR9GT-Zwt2YVB-g/h8/Jo-Y3jq5MuTFLRpVnQt7L7ytacOsVhsmuGnYY1htuQw)

clean_body: Hi friends, As we wind down the last few weeks of 2021, Doug has been busy with holiday parties, events, interviews, and more! | | Hi friends, As we wind down the last few weeks of 2021, Doug has been busy with holiday parties, events, interviews, and more! To keep up with Team Gansler this holiday season, follow Doug on , , and and if you're able, consider making a to support our campaign. Happy Holidays! Jay Satterfield IN CASE YOU MISSED IT The Committee for Montgomery hosted its 32nd Legislative Breakfast, featuring a gubernatorial forum where Doug and his fellow candidates discussed issues like traffic and infrastructure, criminal justice, and our post-COVID economy. | Then, at the Riverside Neighborhood Association meeting, Doug discussed the importance of having a Governor who actually cares about Baltimore and has the experience to engage and work with the city government and communities to make Baltimore safer. | Next, Doug discussed public safety and crime in Baltimore on the C4 and Bryan Nehman podcast. | Then, Doug visited beautiful Western Maryland and had a tremendously productive day in and around Hagerstown and Cumberland that included a meeting with the Mayor of Hagerstown, Emily Keller, to get feedback on development around the new stadium downtown and opioid abuse; kitchen table discussions about economic development in Western Maryland, affordable housing and infrastructure enhancements; and finally, a casual meet and greet at the fantastic Dig Deep Brewing Company! | | | | | Then, Doug had a great time in St. Mary's County talking with local Democrats and enjoying their very festive holiday party! | | | Finally, Doug visited a great group of Frederick County Democrats to discuss our campaign and our proposals for a greener Maryland, better mental health services, and common sense criminal justice reforms like domestic violence courts. | | | | By Authority: Friends of Doug Gansler, Terry Denney, Treasurer; Ana Sol Gutierrez, Chair. Friends of Doug Gansler P.O. Box 31102 Bethesda, MD 20824 United States | | Sent via . name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Our opponent promoted conversion therapy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
If you have a history of supporting hate, you don’t get to represent PA.
#
Derek, there’s something you need to know about our opponent for PA’s Senate seat, Dr. Oz.
In 2012, “The Dr. Oz Show” aired an episode on so-called “reparative therapy” — commonly referred to as “conversion therapy” — which claims to turn LGBTQIA+ people straight.
The episode featured guests from the National Association for Research and Therapy of Homosexuality, a toxic anti-gay group founded to “help” people “diminish their homosexuality” somehow. **Oz presented these homophobes as so-called “experts” and didn’t challenge their views**** _once_****during the episode.**
Guess what?? If you have a history of supporting hate, you don’t get to represent Pennsylvanians in Congress. Point blank. **[You can help us ensure Dr. Oz never, ever becomes PA’s next Senator by chipping in any amount right now.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38844?refcode=em20211220-3907&t=1&akid=3907%2E434096%2E6x_Aoh)**
**[Fight Back: Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38844?refcode=em20211220-3907&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3907%2E434096%2E6x_Aoh)**
John Fetterman, on the other hand, shows up for our LGBTQIA+ communities. Always has, always will. 🏳️🌈🏳️⚧️💪
When marriage equality was still unjustly illegal, he was the *first* elected official in Pennsylvania to officiate same-sex marriages as Mayor of Braddock.
And every time the “flag police” come for John's pride flags hanging on the PA state capitol building, he puts them right back up — and he's gonna keep doing just that.
So if you send John to the U.S. Senate next year, you can know this without a doubt: **He’ll continue to fight boldly, relentlessly, and proudly for LGBTQIA+ rights and freedoms, just like he ALWAYS has.**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38844?refcode=em20211220-3907&t=3&akid=3907%2E434096%2E6x_Aoh)
**[With Dr. Oz spending millions to defeat our grassroots-powered movement, it’s never been more important to show that hate has no home in Pennsylvania. So we’re respectfully asking you to make an important impact on our big, inclusive, and PROUD campaign to flip PA’s Senate seat by making your first donation today.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38844?refcode=em20211220-3907&t=4&akid=3907%2E434096%2E6x_Aoh)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38844?refcode=em20211220-3907&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=3907%2E434096%2E6x_Aoh)**
We need a Senator fighting for equal protection under the law, not a celebrity with a shady track record of promoting homophobic hate groups. Thank you so much for being a part of this campaign as we (always) stick up for what’s right.
—Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211220-3907-footer&t=24&refcode2=3907_434096_6x_Aoh&akid=3907%2E434096%2E6x_Aoh)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

Friend,

Christmas is right around the corner and we wanted to find a way to thank Tim for all of his hard work fighting for us this year.

Tim considers it an honor to represent East Tennessee, and he would be so happy to hear from you. Given his affinity for Bigfoot, we thought this would be the perfect card for him.

**Will you sign this Christmas card to surprise Tim and his family on Christmas?**
[](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=2c6a1db730c54bba8701d81a9ac3548a&_e=59JvzpDVf2BghDJVRAVb18pPKtdR41dDzsfrpzt3pQ-IYrFlYkCfDTSbs5ZbdgUBiFyMEoD7BKmkcswcL5ZeBkDdJgNzqYs9MzZFFAMzOhmtoz_WUozlVMXJmeu7XeRrZHAy8o98anT7NMs49Csu2zl-1p8UV3KsSSFjdDGyIFDBAiJfztaHOKwgGRF9sClnaRqfw1rcjBOJLxEVc3FtYz03suIO2AM7LiYo37IP8h8ASDukm0fYZW8m4Z3fRlahZrMSRnJPkb89CXrOVxE4x4XJNxSWQLL1CNQ_BaPyNCEWmhq36cUD57LxuRIEkULD7CTgFPajEMsNqdvQsZbnZ2RUCbyXTko4xlNo-PLEIOMeLCFT8ALB-AGpm23P_wvcbjNrmMme3_Zvyl32Dm0H4OjWDys96ErDj8zhdV445VDBoSl5SrHSPAq4ygcl1wr4)
Help us send some Christmas cheer to the Burchetts. We know Tim will be thrilled when we show him this card.

We hope to see your name!

clean_body: Tis the season 🎄 | | Friend, Christmas is right around the corner and we wanted to find a way to thank Tim for all of his hard work fighting for us this year. Tim considers it an honor to represent East Tennessee, and he would be so happy to hear from you. Given his affinity for Bigfoot, we thought this would be the perfect card for him. Will you sign this Christmas card to surprise Tim and his family on Christmas? Help us send some Christmas cheer to the Burchetts. We know Tim will be thrilled when we show him this card. We hope to see your name! Team Burchett Stay in Touch 👇 | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

* Opened our borders to millions of illegal immigrants _(who are now getting $450K each but aren’t required to get tested for COVID-19!)_
* Forced Americans to choose between getting injected against their will or unemployment.

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: What my friend Laurie had to say:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
|
---
| | Can I share the email below with you? It's from my friend, Laurie, who I've known since our kids were little – and is now an elected member of the board at Portland Community College. To show her support, and encourage you to join our campaign, **Laurie will personally match every donation up to $100 to our campaign, up to a max of $2500, that's made before December 31.** _See her note below._ **[Will you help me maximize our opportunity by donating right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39882531/321860673/-1783354292?refcode=2021-12-20-cremonawagner&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=0f104701-0762-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjEwNDcwMS0wNzYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yssaG-kQQP7clXWA0gFfkBD6AzQBmRUFD7AL31EF8Ng=)** Thanks! _Andrea_ Forwarded Message [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39882533/321860675/-1783354292?refcode=2021-12-20-cremonawagner&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=0f104701-0762-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjEwNDcwMS0wNzYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yssaG-kQQP7clXWA0gFfkBD6AzQBmRUFD7AL31EF8Ng=) Friends, I first met Andrea Salinas around 15 years ago. My son, Carlo, and her daughter, Amelia, were toddlers running around in diapers. (They're going to be so embarrassed when they see this email!) We were both new moms trying to figure out how to balance raising kids with demanding jobs, and though we had been introduced through mutual friends, we quickly realized that we had shared values and priorities in life. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39882534/321860676/-1783354292?refcode=2021-12-20-cremonawagner&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=0f104701-0762-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjEwNDcwMS0wNzYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yssaG-kQQP7clXWA0gFfkBD6AzQBmRUFD7AL31EF8Ng=)Now, my friend Andrea is running for Congress in the new Sixth District here in Oregon. Let me tell you a little bit about the Andrea Salinas that I know:** Andrea believes powerfully that every family should have affordable housing, child care, and health care; good schools; and clean air, land, and water. Her sense of fairness comes through loud and clear – everyone should do their part, and pay their fair share, to make our communities as best as they can be. And most importantly: Andrea knows how to get things done. Lots of people have lots of opinions. But if you want to get something done – call Andrea Salinas. Again and again and again, I've watched her up close as she puts her values into action. At the legislature, she successfully fought to pass the nation's most progressive paid family leave law and the nation's most progressive reproductive health care law. I am so thrilled that Andrea is stepping up to run for Congress. So, here's the deal: **I'm going to personally match every donation up to $100 made to Andrea's campaign between now and New Year's Eve, up to a total of $2500.** When she wins... when she does amazing things in Congress.... you're going to be so proud that you were part of her team from the very beginning. **[Will you make a donation to Andrea Salinas for Congress right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39882535/321860677/-1783354292?refcode=2021-12-20-cremonawagner&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=0f104701-0762-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjEwNDcwMS0wNzYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yssaG-kQQP7clXWA0gFfkBD6AzQBmRUFD7AL31EF8Ng=)** I really appreciate you. _Laurie_ [DONATE TO ANDREA NOW!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39882536/321860678/-1783354292?refcode=2021-12-20-cremonawagner&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=0f104701-0762-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjEwNDcwMS0wNzYyLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yssaG-kQQP7clXWA0gFfkBD6AzQBmRUFD7AL31EF8Ng=) |
---|---|---

subject: When the stakes are high, we must be bold
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND PROVIDED BY DR
body:
We need to have conversations. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a21b25718995/when-the-stakes-are-high-we-must-be-bold?e=33b11688c1)
---
| |
---
| | **THE STAKES ARE TOO HIGH FOR MY VOICE TO BE MUTED BY THE POLITICAL ESTABLISHMENT**. Do you want to criticize me for having a forbidden conversation with a democrat?

**Have at it!**

I'm the candidate willing to go anywhere, anytime, anyhow in order to understand better how to heal Minnesota. We've led before, we're leading now, and we'll continue to lead.**_I thank you for giving me the courage to withstand the political attacks._**

See my full video below:
---
| [ ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=c6717baf7c&e=33b11688c1)
---
| You've been clear: it's time for a different kind of candidate - one who is serious about going places Republicans traditionally won't! _**Please click on the button below**_ and consider caucusing for us! The stakes are far too high for us to keep doing the same thing over and over again. Refusing to stand on the sidelines, getting into the arena - that's how I know you stand at my side. That's how we defeat the status quo:
---
| [ ](https://DrScottJensen.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0a6593cc14b86d0dcb3944b28&id=ba90813438&e=33b11688c1)

| -Dr. Scott Jensen
Republican Candidate for Governor

name: Dory MacMillan, CheriBeasley.com
subject: Good news from The Charlotte Observer’s analysis >>
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
While Republicans fight it out, we need to get to work and focus on setting ourselves up for a historic victory in 2022.
#

Friends -
You need to see The Charlotte Observer Editorial Board’s headline on what having “Cheri Beasley as [Democrat’s] presumptive nominee” means for our campaign:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?refcode=em211220-1-ma&refcode2=160.357359.aFHlyy&t=1&akid=160%2E357359%2EaFHlyy)
The editorial board said this matters because of the **“obvious benefit for Democrats: the ability to unite early behind one candidate while Republicans are mired in a costly primary brawl between U.S. Rep. Ted Budd and former North Carolina Gov. Pat McCrory.”**
**[The Charlotte Observer said this is “a race where every advantage will matter,” so we have to capitalize on this opportunity to start our general election strong. Will you make a $3 donation now to help us win this race and elect Cheri Beasley?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?refcode=em211220-1-ma&refcode2=160.357359.aFHlyy&t=2&akid=160%2E357359%2EaFHlyy)**
Look, it’s not easy to win statewide in North Carolina, but with a strong campaign and the right candidate it is possible — Cheri’s proven that twice before.
That’s why the nonpartisan Cook Political Report has rated our Senate race as a true toss up in 2022.
And as The Charlotte Observer points out the contrast could not be clearer right now: “With Budd and McCrory largely intent on each other,” Democrats can “remind voters of something different riding on this race: history. Beasley would be the first Black U.S. senator to be elected in North Carolina, and she would be only the third Black woman to serve in the Senate.”
So while Republicans fight it out, we need to get to work and focus on setting ourselves up for a historic victory in 2022.
**[Cheri is counting on lots of people to chip in today — whether that's $3 or whatever you can spare. Can you step up and make sure we have the resources we need to flip this seat?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?refcode=em211220-1-ma&refcode2=160.357359.aFHlyy&t=3&akid=160%2E357359%2EaFHlyy)**
Thanks,
Dory MacMillan
Communications Director
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?refcode=em211220-1-ma&refcode2=160.357359.aFHlyy&t=4&akid=160%2E357359%2EaFHlyy)**

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=5&akid=160%2E357359%2EaFHlyy). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=160%2E357359%2EaFHlyy). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=160_357359_aFHlyy&akid=160%2E357359%2EaFHlyy) today to help us make history.

Pat McCrory.” Look, it’s not easy to win statewide in North Carolina, but with a strong campaign and the right candidate it is possible — Cheri’s proven that twice before. That’s why the nonpartisan Cook Political Report has rated our Senate race as a true toss up in 2022. And as The Charlotte Observer points out the contrast could not be clearer right now: “With Budd and McCrory largely intent on each other,” Democrats can “remind voters of something different riding on this race: history. Beasley would be the first Black U.S. senator to be elected in North Carolina, and she would be only the third Black woman to serve in the Senate.” So while Republicans fight it out, we need to get to work and focus on setting ourselves up for a historic victory in 2022. Thanks, Dory MacMillan Communications Director Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina Cheri Beasley for North Carolina PO Box 28778 Raleigh, NC 27611

| Dear friend, The job of a legislator is to be more than a talking head. **Divisive rhetoric and inflammatory remarks are not what Utahns deserve.** We deserve a senator who will put ego aside and address the pressing issues of our state. This is what I did for 10 years in the Utah House and what I will do in the U.S. Senate— _**and I need your help to get there.**_ With your support, **I can bring leadership to the U.S. Senate that is more representative of you and your values.** Each donation helps us share that opportunity with neighbors and friends across the state. Can you donate $22, $72, $122, or whatever you can afford to help end the divisive rhetoric that is plaguing our democracy?

| | |

| Hi Friend,

Fresh off of winning the Conservative Grounds straw poll with 68% of the vote, Amanda Makki will be back THIS Wednesday to discuss election integrity, the House Democrats’ election bill H.R. 1, local District Attorneys (DA) and the tragedy that happened in Waukesha last month, with six people dead because of lax regulating of criminals by the DA.

Amanda will be joined by Tom Sylke who also worked the Wisconsin recount.

Mark your calendar and be there for a candid conversation!

Conservative Grounds
Wednesday, December 22nd
5:30-7:00 p.m.
13344 66th St N. Largo, FL 33771

Team Makki

clean_body: Please accept your Founding Membership in this must-win race. | Friend, There’s simply too much at stake in our race for Texas’ new 38th congressional district, so I wanted to be sure to give you one last chance before we close the books on 2021. In just a few short weeks we will be kicking off an election year that is bound to usher in a red wave the likes of which the Democrats could not possibly imagine... We WILL take back the People’s House from Nancy Pelosi’s control. But as 1 of the 5 critical seats we need to FLIP the majority, I’m counting on grassroots patriots like YOU to accept your Founding Membership with my campaign to power us to victory in this MUST-WIN race before we close out the year. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Former U.S. Army Captain Republican for Congress \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Wesley Hunt Subject: I wanted you to hear this from me directly Sent: Wed, Jul 7th, 2021 To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, I will never forget the support you showed me and my family during my congressional race last year. Thanks to you, a first time political candidate and U.S. Army veteran was able to win the GOP primary with 61% of the vote and nearly defeat a Democrat with millions in California special interest money. This time we are going to complete the mission and bring our conservative values to Washington. That’s why I’m turning to YOU first to become a Founding Member of my 2022 Campaign to win Texas’ NEW congressional seat. Conservatives only need to win 5 SEATS to take back the House from Democrat control. Thankfully for us, Texas is gaining 2 NEW CONGRESSIONAL DISTRICTS while California and New York are losing 2. In other words, the fate of the House majority will be decided right here in Texas by you and me, Friend. name: Morgan Harper
subject: Bellefontaine, Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Investing in our communities, and small businesses is how we revitalize Ohio and build our state stronger and better than ever.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211220-466-footer-ak&t=2&akid=466%2E90090%2EJzG05v)
Hi, it’s Morgan. 👋
This weekend I had the pleasure and privilege of visiting Bellefontaine, Ohio. While I was there I was able to pay a visit to a few local businesses from the community.
For the last ten years, Bellefontaine has gone through a massive revitalization that’s brought new life to the downtown and its surrounding areas. But for decades before that, it was a ghost town with 80% of the first floor retail locations boarded-up or abandoned.
Interacting with multiple small business owners in Bellefontaine gave me a sense of optimism and inspiration.
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18517?t=3&akid=466%2E90090%2EJzG05v)
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18517?t=4&akid=466%2E90090%2EJzG05v)
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18517?t=5&akid=466%2E90090%2EJzG05v)
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18517?t=6&akid=466%2E90090%2EJzG05v)
Every person I met was a trailblazer meeting the challenges they faced as small business owners head-on to continue to grow and thrive.
The most important takeaway for me, however, is the promise of Ohio’s future. It isn’t going to come from corrupt corporations buying our politicians. It’s going to come from Ohioans, like the homegrown entrepreneurs I met in Bellefontaine, who care about where they work and live.
**[If you’re with me, can you make a contribution to our campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio right now? Every donation counts.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18517?t=7&akid=466%2E90090%2EJzG05v) **
I believe we can make this happen all across Ohio if we have people in Congress who are _not_ bought and paid for by the monopolies that are responsible for devastating many small towns—and if we make sure people have health care, childcare, and equal access to capital to start businesses.
**The passion in Bellefontaine was palpable.****As Senator, I want to make this possible in every community across Ohio.**
[**_I’m committed to fighting tooth and nail to give political and economic power back to working people across Ohio. We’re not a corporate-backed campaign, and we actively REJECT corporate PAC donations to our campaign for U.S. Senate. That means we depend on folks like you to pitch in $5 — or anything you can — to help support our grassroots efforts. Can I count on your support today_**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18517?t=8&akid=466%2E90090%2EJzG05v)[**?**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18517?t=9&akid=466%2E90090%2EJzG05v)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18642?refcode=em20211220-466&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=28&akid=466%2E90090%2EJzG05v)**
Thank you for being in the fight with me,
Morgan
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18517?t=29&akid=466%2E90090%2EJzG05v)
Morgan for U.S. Senate in Ohio
Morgan Harper is an Ohio native and unapologetically progressive lawyer, activist, and community organizer. She is fighting against the far-right and the corporate elite in a campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio. 2022 is a critical election year, where we can create an Ohio that works for the everyday working person, who’s been cast aside in the name of corporate interests. Our campaign does not take fossil fuel, corporate, or super PAC donations. [**_Please support Morgan Harper today by donating anything you can to our grassroots movement._**](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18452?t=30&akid=466%2E90090%2EJzG05v)**
****[Donate Now »](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18517?t=31&akid=466%2E90090%2EJzG05v)**
---
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20211220-466-footer&t=32&refcode2=466_90090_JzG05v&akid=466%2E90090%2EJzG05v)**
---

name: Ryan Zinke
subject: You won’t believe who is on the Nice List
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
It’s not all rosy though. The White House and Nancy Pelosi’s House Democrats won’t take this blow laying down. | Fellow American,

You’re never going to believe this, but as we’re rapidly approaching Christmas I wanted to reach out with the news that West Virginia’s Democratic Senator Joe Manchin is on Santa’s Nice List this year!

Thanks to Joe Manchin and the Republicans in the Senate, Joe Biden’s BBB plan is D.E.A.D. Senator Manchin told Fox News yesterday that there is no way he can support this big government spending spree. Truly a Christmas Miracle for all of us who care about our country and our children’s futures.

It’s not all rosy though. The White House and Nancy Pelosi’s House Democrats won’t take this blow laying down. We already know they are attempting to dismantle ALL of the progress we made under President Trump, now they are trying to make sure we don’t take back the House since their grip on the Senate is slipping.

Americans are paying the price. RECORD INFLATION. RECORD UNEMPLOYMENT. GUN CONFISCATION – we must act before it’s too late.

We need to flip 5 seats to take the House and Montana is a PERFECT opportunity for a pickup.

clean_body: It’s not all rosy though. The White House and Nancy Pelosi’s House Democrats won’t take this blow laying down. | Fellow American, You’re never going to believe this, but as we’re rapidly approaching Christmas I wanted to reach out with the news that West Virginia’s Democratic Senator Joe Manchin is on Santa’s Nice List this year! Thanks to Joe Manchin and the Republicans in the Senate, Joe Biden’s BBB plan is D.E.A.D. Senator Manchin told Fox News yesterday that there is no way he can support this big government spending spree. Truly a Christmas Miracle for all of us who care about our country and our children’s futures. It’s not all rosy though. The White House and Nancy Pelosi’s House Democrats won’t take this blow laying down. We already know they are attempting to dismantle ALL of the progress we made under President Trump, now they are trying to make sure we don’t take back the House since their grip on the Senate is slipping. Americans are paying the price. RECORD INFLATION. RECORD UNEMPLOYMENT. GUN CONFISCATION – we must act before it’s too late. We need to flip 5 seats to take the House and Montana is a PERFECT opportunity for a pickup. | | | | | | I proudly stood with President Trump and was honored to have received his endorsement of my campaign. body:
We need your help now!
| | | [](https://go.dscc.org/go/5976?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211220-ActionRequired-USPSDelaysRef-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211220-ActionRequired-USPSDelaysRef-Pros-sl1&akid=2308%2E9716520%2EnFsAY5)

**URGENT: USPS announces slower delivery times**

We need your signature NOW to fight back against Trump loyalist Louis DeJoy and his policies that are harming the USPS! [**Click here to sign our petition OPPOSING DeJoy's delays to mail delivery, post office closures, and more >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/5976?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211220-ActionRequired-USPSDelaysRef-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211220-ActionRequired-USPSDelaysRef-Pros-sl1&akid=2308%2E9716520%2EnFsAY5)

| Deadline | TONIGHT
---|---
Status | NOT SIGNED

| [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/5976?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211220-ActionRequired-USPSDelaysRef-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211220-ActionRequired-USPSDelaysRef-Pros-sl1&akid=2308%2E9716520%2EnFsAY5)
---

This is unacceptable:

**FIRST:** Donald Trump appointed megadonor Louis DeJoy to be Postmaster General.

**THEN:** DeJoy dismantled sorting machines right before the 2020 election, closed post offices, raised prices, and set a goal to _DELAY_ up to 40% of First Class Mail!

**NOW:** We’re seeing even more negative effects of DeJoy’s actions. Missed delivery times are nearly _TWICE their target limits,_ even with the new, lower standards!

The time is now to stand up for more than 600,000 dedicated Postal Service employees and demand an END to DeJoy's sabotage. **Too many Americans rely on the Postal Service for us to abandon this fight, and we don’t have ANY time to lose.**

| [](https://go.dscc.org/go/5976?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211220-ActionRequired-USPSDelaysRef-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211220-ActionRequired-USPSDelaysRef-Pros-sl1&akid=2308%2E9716520%2EnFsAY5)
_"The U.S. Postal Service is an essential pillar of American life. We simply cannot let [them] destroy it."_

\- President Joe Biden
---

**STAND WITH BIDEN:**
**[Click here to sign our petition OPPOSING DeJoy's harmful delays to mail delivery, post office closures, and more>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/5976?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211220-ActionRequired-USPSDelaysRef-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211220-ActionRequired-USPSDelaysRef-Pros-sl1&akid=2308%2E9716520%2EnFsAY5)**

| [Add My Name](https://go.dscc.org/go/5976?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211220-ActionRequired-USPSDelaysRef-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211220-ActionRequired-USPSDelaysRef-Pros-sl1&akid=2308%2E9716520%2EnFsAY5)

body:
It’s not all rosy though. The White House and Nancy Pelosi’s House Democrats won’t take this blow laying down. | Peter,

You’re never going to believe this, but as we’re rapidly approaching Christmas I wanted to reach out with the news that West Virginia’s Democratic Senator Joe Manchin is on Santa’s Nice List this year!

Thanks to Joe Manchin and the Republicans in the Senate, Joe Biden’s BBB plan is D.E.A.D. Senator Manchin told Fox News yesterday that there is no way he can support this big government spending spree. Truly a Christmas Miracle for all of us who care about our country and our children’s futures.

It’s not all rosy though. The White House and Nancy Pelosi’s House Democrats won’t take this blow laying down. We already know they are attempting to dismantle ALL of the progress we made under President Trump, now they are trying to make sure we don’t take back the House since their grip on the Senate is slipping.

Americans are paying the price. RECORD INFLATION. RECORD UNEMPLOYMENT. GUN CONFISCATION – we must act before it’s too late.

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: America's Green Beret
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress Michael Waltz is a member of the Army National Guard
body:
Fellow Conservative, I’ll make this quick.

With the radical Left tearing away at the very fibers that make America great, we need strong leaders more than ever _ _ to face them head-on.

**That’s why I’m proud to support Mike Waltz, a decorated combat veteran and America’s first and only Green Beret in Congress.** [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d7735b428db142a8903e6f6a39ab5939&_e=Zz2-uRVW3z_NVq-Un6MYwksL3bLm4N2zjs62LcBB8Y8oBJ8leMTTTifJElUrXdwFWQ6VMFFSiBFEJ6NE5N5hWquaMdp9TvNpnJkHux24iXwrvmtYUrP_vXft4DITXHIqCgNXR3rObI8O5QW2s9rRQxBBY0CsjIroVoevKZ7Up-iv18Ebeio7q_YDqBJKv9U9efxW7u14npvfLw-yZPAenYPUOp_773_k-zz6SeETU1fiVIdOv92AU6e62xje6wEDFq_rx4hEM4nbywFhuE6VRoInR5SnZ0wW5i264Y687dANzQL-pj_CPoKRgYKB37Ofcx-Y0gGWZ_RLN1LlnYbX-bENJrpyWXHJZQHzWItREJhSARvwX1ZWXC4Egw6OYht8) **Mike has never backed down from a fight, Fellow Conservative.**

And just like he took on our enemies in Afghanistan,** he’s continued his service to America by defending our great nation from Democrat politicians who want to destroy it.**

While the Democrats like Joe Biden ignore the threat of Communist China, Mike is showing strength and resolve in Congress to protect the American people.

He brings the same courage and dedication he brought to his military career to fight for the American people every day, and I’m proud to be building our great nation’s future with him.
